# Hackers'Pub Android ŌĆö Full UI Redesign

**Date:** 2026-03-19
**Status:** Approved
**Goal:** Replace the default Material Design 3 styling with a custom, Ivory-inspired design system that gives Hackers'Pub a distinctive, editorial identity across both light and dark themes.

## Design Philosophy

Platform-agnostic custom identity ŌĆö not Material, not iOS-native, but a unique Hackers'Pub look inspired by Ivory (Tapbots' Mastodon client). Near-monochrome palette with Deep Stone accent. Typography-first: font weight carries emphasis rather than color. Semantic colors (red, green) reserved for interactive state changes, giving them maximum impact against the neutral base.

## Design System

### Color Palette

#### Light Theme
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `background` | `#FFFFFF` | Screen background |
| `surface` | `#F2F2F7` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
| `textPrimary` | `#1C1C1E` | Headlines, names, primary content |
| `textBody` | `#3A3A3C` | Body text, post content |
| `textSecondary` | `#AEAEB2` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tab labels |
| `accent` | `#44403C` | Active tab icons/labels, links (via weight), follow buttons, interactive elements |
| `accentMuted` | `#78716C` | Hashtags, relationship tags background at 10% opacity |
| `divider` | `#F2F2F7` | Hairline separators between posts |
| `buttonOutline` | `#D6D3D1` | Secondary button borders |
| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Heart reactions, error states, notification dots |
| `share` | `#34D399` | Share/repost active state |

#### Dark Theme
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `background` | `#171717` | Screen background |
| `surface` | `#262626` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
| `textPrimary` | `#FAFAFA` | Headlines, names |
| `textBody` | `#D4D4D4` | Body text |
| `textSecondary` | `#737373` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tabs |
| `accent` | `#D6D3D1` | Active tab icons/labels, interactive elements (inverted stone) |
| `accentMuted` | `#A8A29E` | Hashtags, tags |
| `divider` | `#262626` | Hairline separators |
| `buttonOutline` | `#525252` | Secondary button borders |
| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Same as light |
| `share` | `#34D399` | Same as light |

### Typography

System default (Roboto on Android). No custom fonts ŌĆö emphasis via weight hierarchy only.

| Style | Size | Weight | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|-------|
| `titleLarge` | 22sp | 700 (Bold) | Screen titles (Timeline, Explore, etc.) |
| `titleMedium` | 20sp | 700 (Bold) | Profile name |
| `bodyLargeSemiBold` | 15sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Author names in post cards |
| `bodyLarge` | 15sp | 400 (Regular) | Post content, bio text |
| `bodyMedium` | 14sp | 400 (Regular) | Stats labels, settings items |
| `labelMedium` | 13sp | 400 (Regular) | Handles, timestamps, engagement counts |
| `labelSmall` | 12sp | 500 (Medium) | Hashtags, relationship tags |
| `caption` | 11sp | 500 (Medium) | Tag pills, repost indicators |
| `tabLabel` | 10sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Bottom tab labels |

**Letter spacing:** -0.3sp on `titleLarge` for tighter headline feel. Default elsewhere.

### Spacing

Base unit: 4dp. Consistent throughout.

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `xs` | 4dp | Fine spacing (between name and handle) |
| `sm` | 8dp | Compact spacing (engagement icon gaps) |
| `md` | 12dp | Element spacing (avatar-to-text gap, between post sections) |
| `lg` | 16dp | Standard padding (screen edges, post padding) |
| `xl` | 24dp | Section spacing (stats row gaps) |
| `xxl` | 32dp | Large section spacing (sign-in margins) |

### Shapes

| Element | Radius | Size |
|---------|--------|------|
| Avatar (timeline) | Circle | 42dp |
| Avatar (profile) | Circle | 80dp |
| Avatar (repost indicator) | Circle | 16dp |
| Pill buttons (Follow, etc.) | 20dp | Height ~36dp |
| Icon buttons (compose, etc.) | Circle | 28dp |
| Relationship tags | Full capsule | Auto-width |
| Notification dot | Circle | 8dp |

No card elevation or shadows anywhere. Post separation via hairline dividers only.

### Icons

Outlined stroke icons (Feather/Lucide style), 22dp for tab bar, 16dp for engagement bar. Stroke width 1.5dp.

- Active state: filled icon with accent color
- Inactive state: outlined icon with secondary color
- Engagement active states per action:
  - Reply: `accent` color when active (user has replied)
  - Share/Repost: `share` green (`#34D399`) when active
  - Reaction/Heart: `reaction` red (`#E8453C`) when active, filled
  - Quote: `accent` color when active (user has quoted)
  - External share: no active state, always `textSecondary`

### Bottom Navigation Bar

- Height: 56dp (standard)
- Background: `background` color (white in light, `#171717` in dark)
- Top border: 1dp hairline in `divider` color
- 4 tabs (authenticated): Home, Explore, Alerts, Search
- 4 tabs (unauthenticated): Local, Fediverse, Search, Sign In
- Icon size: 22dp, stroke width 1.5dp
- Label: 10sp/600 (`tabLabel`), 3dp below icon
- Active tab: filled icon + label in `accent` color
- Inactive tab: outlined icon + label in `textSecondary` color
- Notification dot: 8dp red circle (`reaction` color), positioned top-right of Alerts icon with 2dp white border

### Media Grid

- Images: 8dp border-radius on all corners
- Single image: full width, max-height 300dp, `contentScale = Crop`
- Two images: side-by-side, 4dp gap between
- Three+ images: 2x2 grid, 4dp gaps
- Container: no border, no elevation, clips to rounded shape

## Screen Specifications

### Timeline Screen

**Header:**
- Large bold title "Timeline" (22sp/700) top-left
- Right side: compose button (28dp circle, surface background, + icon) and user avatar (28dp circle)
- No border below header ŌĆö content starts immediately

**Content:**
- Vertical scrolling list (LazyColumn)
- Posts separated by 1dp hairline dividers (`divider` color) with 16dp horizontal margin
- Pull-to-refresh support

**Post Card Layout:**
- 16dp horizontal padding, 12dp vertical padding
- Repost indicator (if shared): 16dp avatar + repost icon + actor name, caption size, secondary color, indented to align with post content (54dp left padding = 42dp avatar + 12dp gap)
- Author row: 42dp circular avatar, 12dp gap, then name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, `textPrimary`) + timestamp (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`) on same baseline
- Body text: 15sp/400, `textBody` color, 4dp below author row
- Hashtags: 11sp/500, `accentMuted` color, 6dp below body
- Engagement bar: 10dp below content, icons (16dp) + counts (13sp), 18dp gaps between items. Muted by default, semantic colors when active (red heart filled, green repost)

**Quoted Post (if present):**
- Indented block below body text
- 1dp border in `divider` color, 8dp border-radius, 8dp padding
- Smaller avatar (32dp), author info, truncated content

**Floating Action Button:** None ŌĆö compose is in the header

### Post Detail Screen

**Header:** Back arrow (left) + ellipsis menu (right), title "Post" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`)

**Post Content (expanded view):**
- Same author row as timeline post card (avatar, name, handle)
- Full body text rendering (no truncation), `bodyLarge`
- Full timestamp below body: absolute date/time format, `labelMedium`, `textSecondary`
- Visibility indicator: icon + label, `caption`, `textSecondary`

**Article posts:** If post type is Article, show article title in `titleMedium` (20sp/700) above body content, with an "Article" badge (`caption`, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, capsule shape)

**Engagement Stats Row:**
- Horizontal row below post content, 12dp vertical padding
- Counts displayed as: "12 Shares ┬Ę 23 Reactions ┬Ę 4 Quotes"
- `bodyMedium`, counts in `textPrimary` (bold), labels in `textSecondary`
- Tappable ŌĆö opens bottom sheet with actor list

**Action Bar:**
- Below stats, separated by hairline dividers above and below
- Full-width row with evenly spaced action icons: Reply, Share, React, Quote, Delete (owner only), External Share
- Icons: 20dp, `textSecondary` by default, semantic colors when active
- Delete icon: `reaction` red color

**Reaction Groups:**
- Below action bar if reactions exist
- Horizontal scrollable row of emoji pills
- Each pill: emoji + count, `surface` background, 16dp border-radius, 8dp horizontal padding
- Active (user reacted): `accent` at 10% opacity background, `accent` text

**Reaction Picker (bottom sheet):**
- Modal bottom sheet, `background` color
- Grid of available emoji reactions, 7 columns
- Each cell: 40dp, 8dp border-radius
- Active reactions highlighted with `accent` at 15% opacity background
- Close button top-right

**Shares/Quotes List (bottom sheet):**
- Modal bottom sheet with navigation title ("Shares" or "Quotes")
- List of actor rows: 40dp circular avatar, name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`), handle (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`)
- "Load more" button at bottom if paginated
- Empty state: centered "No shares yet" / "No quotes yet"

**Reply Thread:**
- Below the main post, same post card format as timeline
- Replies listed with hairline dividers
- Reply FAB: 56dp circle, `accent` background, white reply icon, bottom-right positioned, 16dp margin from edges

### Profile Screen

**Header:** Back arrow (left) + ellipsis menu (right), no title text

**Profile Section (centered):**
- 80dp circular avatar
- Name: 20sp/700, 12dp below avatar
- Handle: 14sp/400, `textSecondary`, 2dp below name
- Bio: 14sp/400, `textBody`, centered, 10dp below handle, 24dp horizontal margin
- Stats row: 24dp gap between items, centered, 14dp below bio
  - Each stat: count (16sp/700) above label (12sp/secondary)
  - Three items: Posts, Followers, Following
- Action buttons: 16dp below stats, centered
  - Follow: pill button, `accent` background, white text, 28dp horizontal padding
  - Share: pill button, transparent, `buttonOutline` border, share icon only
- Relationship tag: "Follows you" capsule, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, 11sp/500, 10dp below buttons

**Content:** Hairline divider, then post list identical to timeline (without avatars if showing own profile ŌĆö keep avatars for consistency)

### Notifications Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Notifications" (same as timeline)

**Notification Rows:**
- 42dp actor avatar (circular), 12dp gap
- Action text: actor name (bold) + action description + timestamp
- Notification type indicated by text ("liked your post", "shared your post", "followed you")
- Notification type icons: all use `textSecondary` color (monochrome, consistent with design philosophy ŌĆö no per-type color coding)
- Hairline dividers between items
- Unread indicator: red dot (8dp) on the Alerts tab icon
- Empty state: centered text "No notifications yet"

### Explore Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Explore"

**Segmented Tabs:** Below header, "Local" / "Global" segmented control
- Active tab: `accent` text, underline indicator
- Inactive tab: `textSecondary`

**Content:** Same post list as timeline, scoped to local or global feed

### Search Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Search"

**Search Bar:** Rounded text field below header, `surface` background, 12dp border-radius, search icon left-aligned, 16dp horizontal margin

**Results:** Actor rows (avatar + name + handle) and post cards, depending on result type

### Compose Screen

**Header:** Navigation bar style
- Left: "Cancel" text button (`accent` color)
- Right: "Post" pill button (`accent` background, white text), disabled state at 40% opacity
- Title: "Compose", "Reply", or "Quoting" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, 15sp/600)

**Content:**
- Reply indicator (if replying): "Replying to @handle" in `textSecondary`, 13sp
- Text editor: full-width, 15sp, placeholder "What's on your mind?"
- Markdown support with live preview toggle

**Bottom toolbar:** Visibility selector, language picker ŌĆö subtle icons in `textSecondary`

### Settings Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Settings"

**Content:** Grouped list sections with section headers (13sp/500, uppercase, `textSecondary`)

Sections:
- **App Info:** Logo (80dp, 16dp corner radius), app name, version
- **Typography:** Font size slider (0.75xŌĆō2.0x)
- **Timeline:** Markdown truncation options
- **Engagement:** Confirmation toggles
- **Links:** In-app browser toggle
- **App Icons:** Alternative icon selection

Each row: standard list item, 16dp padding, `textPrimary` label, `textSecondary` value/description. Hairline dividers between rows.

### Sign-In Screen

**Layout:** Centered vertically

- Logo: 120dp, centered
- Title: "Hackers' Pub" (22sp/700), 16dp below logo
- Subtitle: "Sign in to continue" (14sp, `textSecondary`), 4dp below title
- Username field: rounded border (12dp radius), `surface` background, 32dp below subtitle, 32dp horizontal margin
- Verification code field: same style (appears after username submission)
- Primary button: pill shape, `accent` background, white text, full width within margins
- Error text: `error` color, 13sp, below button

## Migration Strategy

This redesign replaces the existing Material Design 3 theming while keeping the same Compose architecture. Changes are purely in the UI layer:

1. **Theme.kt** ŌĆö Replace M3 color scheme with custom color tokens
2. **Spacing.kt** ŌĆö Already exists, minor adjustments to values
3. **New: Typography.kt** ŌĆö Define custom text styles (not M3 Typography)
4. **New: Shapes.kt** ŌĆö Define shape tokens
5. **New: Icons.kt** ŌĆö Custom icon set (if switching from Material Icons to Feather/Lucide)
6. **Each screen** ŌĆö Replace M3 components (TopAppBar, FloatingActionButton, etc.) with custom composables
7. **PostCard** ŌĆö Restyle engagement bar, remove card elevation, update spacing
8. **CompactTopBar** ŌĆö Replace with new LargeTitle header composable

No changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. Pure visual transformation.

## Out of Scope

- Custom animations/transitions (can be added later)
- Custom font families (using system Roboto)
- Tablet/landscape layouts
- Widget design
- Onboarding flow

lines: Each row: standard list item, 16dp padding, `textPrimary` label, `textSecondary` value/description. Hairline dividers between rows.

input.new_string:
No changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. Pure visual transformation.

**Note on profile stats:** The current data model (`Actor`) does not include follower/following/post counts. The stats row in the profile screen should only display stats that are available from the API. If counts are not available, omit the stats row entirely rather than showing zeros.

**Note on font scaling:** The custom typography definitions serve as base values. The existing `LocalFontScale` mechanism continues to apply ŌĆö all `sp` values are multiplied by the user's font scale preference (0.75xŌĆō2.0x).

- Reply FAB: 56dp circle, `accent` background, white reply icon, bottom-right positioned, 16dp margin from edges

### Profile Screen

**Header:** Back arrow (left) + ellipsis menu (right), no title text

**Profile Section (centered):**
- 80dp circular avatar
- Name: 20sp/700, 12dp below avatar
- Handle: 14sp/400, `textSecondary`, 2dp below name
- Bio: 14sp/400, `textBody`, centered, 10dp below handle, 24dp horizontal margin
- Stats row: 24dp gap between items, centered, 14dp below bio
  - Each stat: count (16sp/700) above label (12sp/secondary)
  - Three items: Posts, Followers, Following
- Action buttons: 16dp below stats, centered
  - Follow: pill button, `accent` background, white text, 28dp horizontal padding
  - Share: pill button, transparent, `buttonOutline` border, share icon only
- Relationship tag: "Follows you" capsule, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, 11sp/500, 10dp below buttons

**Content:** Hairline divider, then post list identical to timeline (without avatars if showing own profile ŌĆö keep avatars for consistency)

### Notifications Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Notifications" (same as timeline)

**Notification Rows:**
- 42dp actor avatar (circular), 12dp gap
- Action text: actor name (bold) + action description + timestamp
- Notification type indicated by text ("liked your post", "shared your post", "followed you")
- Notification type icons: all use `textSecondary` color (monochrome, consistent with design philosophy ŌĆö no per-type color coding)
- Hairline dividers between items
- Unread indicator: red dot (8dp) on the Alerts tab icon
- Empty state: centered text "No notifications yet"

### Explore Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Explore"

**Segmented Tabs:** Below header, "Local" / "Global" segmented control
- Active tab: `accent` text, underline indicator
- Inactive tab: `textSecondary`

**Content:** Same post list as timeline, scoped to local or global feed

### Search Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Search"

**Search Bar:** Rounded text field below header, `surface` background, 12dp border-radius, search icon left-aligned, 16dp horizontal margin

**Results:** Actor rows (avatar + name + handle) and post cards, depending on result type

### Compose Screen

**Header:** Navigation bar style
- Left: "Cancel" text button (`accent` color)
- Right: "Post" pill button (`accent` background, white text), disabled state at 40% opacity
- Title: "Compose", "Reply", or "Quoting" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, 15sp/600)

**Content:**
- Reply indicator (if replying): "Replying to @handle" in `textSecondary`, 13sp
- Text editor: full-width, 15sp, placeholder "What's on your mind?"
- Markdown support with live preview toggle

**Bottom toolbar:** Visibility selector, language picker ŌĆö subtle icons in `textSecondary`

### Settings Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Settings"

**Content:** Grouped list sections with section headers (13sp/500, uppercase, `textSecondary`)

Sections:
- **App Info:** Logo (80dp, 16dp corner radius), app name, version
- **Typography:** Font size slider (0.75xŌĆō2.0x)
- **Timeline:** Markdown truncation options
- **Engagement:** Confirmation toggles
- **Links:** In-app browser toggle
- **About:** Open source licenses, links

Each row: standard list item, 16dp padding, `textPrimary` label, `textSecondary` value/description. Hairline dividers between rows.

### Sign-In Screen

**Layout:** Centered vertically

- Logo: 120dp, centered
- Title: "Hackers' Pub" (22sp/700), 16dp below logo
- Subtitle: "Sign in to continue" (14sp, `textSecondary`), 4dp below title
- Username field: rounded border (12dp radius), `surface` background, 32dp below subtitle, 32dp horizontal margin
- Verification code field: same style (appears after username submission)
- Primary button: pill shape, `accent` background, white text, full width within margins
- Error text: `error` color, 13sp, below button

## Migration Strategy

This redesign replaces the existing Material Design 3 theming while keeping the same Compose architecture. Changes are purely in the UI layer:

1. **Theme.kt** ŌĆö Replace M3 color scheme with custom color tokens
2. **Spacing.kt** ŌĆö Already exists, minor adjustments to values
3. **New: Typography.kt** ŌĆö Define custom text styles (not M3 Typography)
4. **New: Shapes.kt** ŌĆö Define shape tokens
5. **New: Icons.kt** ŌĆö Custom icon set (if switching from Material Icons to Feather/Lucide)
6. **Each screen** ŌĆö Replace M3 components (TopAppBar, FloatingActionButton, etc.) with custom composables
7. **PostCard** ŌĆö Restyle engagement bar, remove card elevation, update spacing
8. **CompactTopBar** ŌĆö Replace with new LargeTitle header composable

No changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. Pure visual transformation.

## Out of Scope

- Custom animations/transitions (can be added later)
- Custom font families (using system Roboto)
- Tablet/landscape layouts
- Widget design
- Onboarding flow

lines: No changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. Pure visual transformation.

+**Note on profile stats:** The current data model (`Actor`) does not include follower/following/post counts. The stats row in the profile screen should only display stats that are available from the API. If counts are not available, omit the stats row entirely rather than showing zeros.

+**Note on font scaling:** The custom typography definitions serve as base values. The existing `LocalFontScale` mechanism continues to apply ŌĆö all `sp` values are multiplied by the user's font scale preference (0.75xŌĆō2.0x).

content.content:
1ŌåÆ# Hackers'Pub Android ŌĆö Full UI Redesign
     2ŌåÆ
     3ŌåÆ**Date:** 2026-03-19
     4ŌåÆ**Status:** Approved
     5ŌåÆ**Goal:** Replace the default Material Design 3 styling with a custom, Ivory-inspired design system that gives Hackers'Pub a distinctive, editorial identity across both light and dark themes.
     6ŌåÆ
     7ŌåÆ## Design Philosophy
     8ŌåÆ
     9ŌåÆPlatform-agnostic custom identity ŌĆö not Material, not iOS-native, but a unique Hackers'Pub look inspired by Ivory (Tapbots' Mastodon client). Near-monochrome palette with Deep Stone accent. Typography-first: font weight carries emphasis rather than color. Semantic colors (red, green) reserved for interactive state changes, giving them maximum impact against the neutral base.
    10ŌåÆ
    11ŌåÆ## Design System
    12ŌåÆ
    13ŌåÆ### Color Palette
    14ŌåÆ
    15ŌåÆ#### Light Theme
    16ŌåÆ| Token | Value | Usage |
    17ŌåÆ|-------|-------|-------|
    18ŌåÆ| `background` | `#FFFFFF` | Screen background |
    19ŌåÆ| `surface` | `#F2F2F7` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
    20ŌåÆ| `textPrimary` | `#1C1C1E` | Headlines, names, primary content |
    21ŌåÆ| `textBody` | `#3A3A3C` | Body text, post content |
    22ŌåÆ| `textSecondary` | `#AEAEB2` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tab labels |
    23ŌåÆ| `accent` | `#44403C` | Active tab icons/labels, links (via weight), follow buttons, interactive elements |
    24ŌåÆ| `accentMuted` | `#78716C` | Hashtags, relationship tags background at 10% opacity |
    25ŌåÆ| `divider` | `#F2F2F7` | Hairline separators between posts |
    26ŌåÆ| `buttonOutline` | `#D6D3D1` | Secondary button borders |
    27ŌåÆ| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Heart reactions, error states, notification dots |
    28ŌåÆ| `share` | `#34D399` | Share/repost active state |
    29ŌåÆ
    30ŌåÆ#### Dark Theme
    31ŌåÆ| Token | Value | Usage |
    32ŌåÆ|-------|-------|-------|
    33ŌåÆ| `background` | `#171717` | Screen background |
    34ŌåÆ| `surface` | `#262626` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
    35ŌåÆ| `textPrimary` | `#FAFAFA` | Headlines, names |
    36ŌåÆ| `textBody` | `#D4D4D4` | Body text |
    37ŌåÆ| `textSecondary` | `#737373` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tabs |
    38ŌåÆ| `accent` | `#D6D3D1` | Active tab icons/labels, interactive elements (inverted stone) |
    39ŌåÆ| `accentMuted` | `#A8A29E` | Hashtags, tags |
    40ŌåÆ| `divider` | `#262626` | Hairline separators |
    41ŌåÆ| `buttonOutline` | `#525252` | Secondary button borders |
    42ŌåÆ| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Same as light |
    43ŌåÆ| `share` | `#34D399` | Same as light |
    44ŌåÆ
    45ŌåÆ### Typography
    46ŌåÆ
    47ŌåÆSystem default (Roboto on Android). No custom fonts ŌĆö emphasis via weight hierarchy only.
    48ŌåÆ
    49ŌåÆ| Style | Size | Weight | Usage |
    50ŌåÆ|-------|------|--------|-------|
    51ŌåÆ| `titleLarge` | 22sp | 700 (Bold) | Screen titles (Timeline, Explore, etc.) |
    52ŌåÆ| `titleMedium` | 20sp | 700 (Bold) | Profile name |
    53ŌåÆ| `bodyLargeSemiBold` | 15sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Author names in post cards |
    54ŌåÆ| `bodyLarge` | 15sp | 400 (Regular) | Post content, bio text |
    55ŌåÆ| `bodyMedium` | 14sp | 400 (Regular) | Stats labels, settings items |
    56ŌåÆ| `labelMedium` | 13sp | 400 (Regular) | Handles, timestamps, engagement counts |
    57ŌåÆ| `labelSmall` | 12sp | 500 (Medium) | Hashtags, relationship tags |
    58ŌåÆ| `caption` | 11sp | 500 (Medium) | Tag pills, repost indicators |
    59ŌåÆ| `tabLabel` | 10sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Bottom tab labels |
    60ŌåÆ
    61ŌåÆ**Letter spacing:** -0.3sp on `titleLarge` for tighter headline feel. Default elsewhere.
    62ŌåÆ
    63ŌåÆ### Spacing
    64ŌåÆ
    65ŌåÆBase unit: 4dp. Consistent throughout.
    66ŌåÆ
    67ŌåÆ| Token | Value | Usage |
    68ŌåÆ|-------|-------|-------|
    69ŌåÆ| `xs` | 4dp | Fine spacing (between name and handle) |
    70ŌåÆ| `sm` | 8dp | Compact spacing (engagement icon gaps) |
    71ŌåÆ| `md` | 12dp | Element spacing (avatar-to-text gap, between post sections) |
    72ŌåÆ| `lg` | 16dp | Standard padding (screen edges, post padding) |
    73ŌåÆ| `xl` | 24dp | Section spacing (stats row gaps) |
    74ŌåÆ| `xxl` | 32dp | Large section spacing (sign-in margins) |
    75ŌåÆ
    76ŌåÆ### Shapes
    77ŌåÆ
    78ŌåÆ| Element | Radius | Size |
    79ŌåÆ|---------|--------|------|
    80ŌåÆ| Avatar (timeline) | Circle | 42dp |
    81ŌåÆ| Avatar (profile) | Circle | 80dp |
    82ŌåÆ| Avatar (repost indicator) | Circle | 16dp |
    83ŌåÆ| Pill buttons (Follow, etc.) | 20dp | Height ~36dp |
    84ŌåÆ| Icon buttons (compose, etc.) | Circle | 28dp |
    85ŌåÆ| Relationship tags | Full capsule | Auto-width |
    86ŌåÆ| Notification dot | Circle | 8dp |
    87ŌåÆ
    88ŌåÆNo card elevation or shadows anywhere. Post separation via hairline dividers only.
    89ŌåÆ
    90ŌåÆ### Icons
    91ŌåÆ
    92ŌåÆOutlined stroke icons (Feather/Lucide style), 22dp for tab bar, 16dp for engagement bar. Stroke width 1.5dp.
    93ŌåÆ
    94ŌåÆ- Active state: filled icon with accent color
    95ŌåÆ- Inactive state: outlined icon with secondary color
    96ŌåÆ- Engagement active states per action:
    97ŌåÆ  - Reply: `accent` color when active (user has replied)
    98ŌåÆ  - Share/Repost: `share` green (`#34D399`) when active
    99ŌåÆ  - Reaction/Heart: `reaction` red (`#E8453C`) when active, filled
   100ŌåÆ  - Quote: `accent` color when active (user has quoted)
   101ŌåÆ  - External share: no active state, always `textSecondary`
   102ŌåÆ
   103ŌåÆ### Bottom Navigation Bar
   104ŌåÆ
   105ŌåÆ- Height: 56dp (standard)
   106ŌåÆ- Background: `background` color (white in light, `#171717` in dark)
   107ŌåÆ- Top border: 1dp hairline in `divider` color
   108ŌåÆ- 4 tabs (authenticated): Home, Explore, Alerts, Search
   109ŌåÆ- 4 tabs (unauthenticated): Local, Fediverse, Search, Sign In
   110ŌåÆ- Icon size: 22dp, stroke width 1.5dp
   111ŌåÆ- Label: 10sp/600 (`tabLabel`), 3dp below icon
   112ŌåÆ- Active tab: filled icon + label in `accent` color
   113ŌåÆ- Inactive tab: outlined icon + label in `textSecondary` color
   114ŌåÆ- Notification dot: 8dp red circle (`reaction` color), positioned top-right of Alerts icon with 2dp white border
   115ŌåÆ
   116ŌåÆ### Media Grid
   117ŌåÆ
   118ŌåÆ- Images: 8dp border-radius on all corners
   119ŌåÆ- Single image: full width, max-height 300dp, `contentScale = Crop`
   120ŌåÆ- Two images: side-by-side, 4dp gap between
   121ŌåÆ- Three+ images: 2x2 grid, 4dp gaps
   122ŌåÆ- Container: no border, no elevation, clips to rounded shape
   123ŌåÆ
   124ŌåÆ## Screen Specifications
   125ŌåÆ
   126ŌåÆ### Timeline Screen
   127ŌåÆ
   128ŌåÆ**Header:**
   129ŌåÆ- Large bold title "Timeline" (22sp/700) top-left

   132ŌåÆ
   133ŌåÆ**Content:**

   141ŌåÆ- Author row: 42dp circular avatar, 12dp gap, then name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, `textPrimary`) + timestamp (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`) on same baseline
   142ŌåÆ- Body text: 15sp/400, `textBody` color, 4dp below author row

   144ŌåÆ- Engagement bar: 10dp below content, icons (16dp) + counts (13sp), 18dp gaps between items. Muted by default, semantic colors when active (red heart filled, green repost)

   151ŌåÆ**Floating Action Button:** None ŌĆö compose is in the header

   153ŌåÆ### Post Detail Screen

   157ŌåÆ**Post Content (expanded view):**

   182ŌåÆ
   183ŌåÆ**Reaction Picker (bottom sheet):**

   192ŌåÆ- List of actor rows: 40dp circular avatar, name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`), handle (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`)

   195ŌåÆ
   196ŌåÆ**Reply Thread:**
   197ŌåÆ- Below the main post, same post card format as timeline
   198ŌåÆ- Replies listed with hairline dividers
   199ŌåÆ- Reply FAB: 56dp circle, `accent` background, white reply icon, bottom-right positioned, 16dp margin from edges
   200ŌåÆ
   201ŌåÆ### Profile Screen
   202ŌåÆ
   203ŌåÆ**Header:** Back arrow (left) + ellipsis menu (right), no title text
   204ŌåÆ
   205ŌåÆ**Profile Section (centered):**
   206ŌåÆ- 80dp circular avatar
   207ŌåÆ- Name: 20sp/700, 12dp below avatar
   208ŌåÆ- Handle: 14sp/400, `textSecondary`, 2dp below name
   209ŌåÆ- Bio: 14sp/400, `textBody`, centered, 10dp below handle, 24dp horizontal margin
   210ŌåÆ- Stats row: 24dp gap between items, centered, 14dp below bio
   211ŌåÆ  - Each stat: count (16sp/700) above label (12sp/secondary)
   212ŌåÆ  - Three items: Posts, Followers, Following
   213ŌåÆ- Action buttons: 16dp below stats, centered
   214ŌåÆ  - Follow: pill button, `accent` background, white text, 28dp horizontal padding
   215ŌåÆ  - Share: pill button, transparent, `buttonOutline` border, share icon only
   216ŌåÆ- Relationship tag: "Follows you" capsule, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, 11sp/500, 10dp below buttons
   217ŌåÆ
   218ŌåÆ**Content:** Hairline divider, then post list identical to timeline (without avatars if showing own profile ŌĆö keep avatars for consistency)
   219ŌåÆ
   220ŌåÆ### Notifications Screen
   221ŌåÆ
   222ŌåÆ**Header:** Large bold title "Notifications" (same as timeline)
   223ŌåÆ
   224ŌåÆ**Notification Rows:**
   225ŌåÆ- 42dp actor avatar (circular), 12dp gap
   226ŌåÆ- Action text: actor name (bold) + action description + timestamp
   227ŌåÆ- Notification type indicated by text ("liked your post", "shared your post", "followed you")
   228ŌåÆ- Notification type icons: all use `textSecondary` color (monochrome, consistent with design philosophy ŌĆö no per-type color coding)

   232ŌåÆ
   233ŌåÆ### Explore Screen
   234ŌåÆ
   235ŌåÆ**Header:** Large bold title "Explore"
   236ŌåÆ
   237ŌåÆ**Segmented Tabs:** Below header, "Local" / "Global" segmented control
   238ŌåÆ- Active tab: `accent` text, underline indicator
   239ŌåÆ- Inactive tab: `textSecondary`

   241ŌåÆ**Content:** Same post list as timeline, scoped to local or global feed
   242ŌåÆ
   243ŌåÆ### Search Screen
   244ŌåÆ
   245ŌåÆ**Header:** Large bold title "Search"
   246ŌåÆ
   247ŌåÆ**Search Bar:** Rounded text field below header, `surface` background, 12dp border-radius, search icon left-aligned, 16dp horizontal margin
   248ŌåÆ
   249ŌåÆ**Results:** Actor rows (avatar + name + handle) and post cards, depending on result type
   250ŌåÆ
   251ŌåÆ### Compose Screen
   252ŌåÆ
   253ŌåÆ**Header:** Navigation bar style
   254ŌåÆ- Left: "Cancel" text button (`accent` color)
   255ŌåÆ- Right: "Post" pill button (`accent` background, white text), disabled state at 40% opacity
   256ŌåÆ- Title: "Compose", "Reply", or "Quoting" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, 15sp/600)
   257ŌåÆ
   258ŌåÆ**Content:**
   259ŌåÆ- Reply indicator (if replying): "Replying to @handle" in `textSecondary`, 13sp
   260ŌåÆ- Text editor: full-width, 15sp, placeholder "What's on your mind?"
   261ŌåÆ- Markdown support with live preview toggle
   262ŌåÆ
   263ŌåÆ**Bottom toolbar:** Visibility selector, language picker ŌĆö subtle icons in `textSecondary`
   264ŌåÆ
   265ŌåÆ### Settings Screen
   266ŌåÆ
   267ŌåÆ**Header:** Large bold title "Settings"
   268ŌåÆ
   269ŌåÆ**Content:** Grouped list sections with section headers (13sp/500, uppercase, `textSecondary`)
   270ŌåÆ
   271ŌåÆSections:
   272ŌåÆ- **App Info:** Logo (80dp, 16dp corner radius), app name, version
   273ŌåÆ- **Typography:** Font size slider (0.75xŌĆō2.0x)
   274ŌåÆ- **Timeline:** Markdown truncation options
   275ŌåÆ- **Engagement:** Confirmation toggles
   276ŌåÆ- **Links:** In-app browser toggle
   277ŌåÆ- **About:** Open source licenses, links
   278ŌåÆ
   279ŌåÆEach row: standard list item, 16dp padding, `textPrimary` label, `textSecondary` value/description. Hairline dividers between rows.
   280ŌåÆ
   281ŌåÆ### Sign-In Screen
   282ŌåÆ
   283ŌåÆ**Layout:** Centered vertically
   284ŌåÆ
   285ŌåÆ- Logo: 120dp, centered
   286ŌåÆ- Title: "Hackers' Pub" (22sp/700), 16dp below logo
   287ŌåÆ- Subtitle: "Sign in to continue" (14sp, `textSecondary`), 4dp below title
   288ŌåÆ- Username field: rounded border (12dp radius), `surface` background, 32dp below subtitle, 32dp horizontal margin
   289ŌåÆ- Verification code field: same style (appears after username submission)
   290ŌåÆ- Primary button: pill shape, `accent` background, white text, full width within margins
   291ŌåÆ- Error text: `error` color, 13sp, below button
   292ŌåÆ
   293ŌåÆ## Migration Strategy
   294ŌåÆ
   295ŌåÆThis redesign replaces the existing Material Design 3 theming while keeping the same Compose architecture. Changes are purely in the UI layer:
   296ŌåÆ
   297ŌåÆ1. **Theme.kt** ŌĆö Replace M3 color scheme with custom color tokens
   298ŌåÆ2. **Spacing.kt** ŌĆö Already exists, minor adjustments to values
   299ŌåÆ3. **New: Typography.kt** ŌĆö Define custom text styles (not M3 Typography)
   300ŌåÆ4. **New: Shapes.kt** ŌĆö Define shape tokens
   301ŌåÆ5. **New: Icons.kt** ŌĆö Custom icon set (if switching from Material Icons to Feather/Lucide)
   302ŌåÆ6. **Each screen** ŌĆö Replace M3 components (TopAppBar, FloatingActionButton, etc.) with custom composables
   303ŌåÆ7. **PostCard** ŌĆö Restyle engagement bar, remove card elevation, update spacing
   304ŌåÆ8. **CompactTopBar** ŌĆö Replace with new LargeTitle header composable
   305ŌåÆ
   306ŌåÆNo changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. Pure visual transformation.
   307ŌåÆ
   308ŌåÆ**Note on profile stats:** The current data model (`Actor`) does not include follower/following/post counts. The stats row in the profile screen should only display stats that are available from the API. If counts are not available, omit the stats row entirely rather than showing zeros.
   309ŌåÆ
   310ŌåÆ**Note on font scaling:** The custom typography definitions serve as base values. The existing `LocalFontScale` mechanism continues to apply ŌĆö all `sp` values are multiplied by the user's font scale preference (0.75xŌĆō2.0x).
   311ŌåÆ
   312ŌåÆ## Out of Scope
   313ŌåÆ
   314ŌåÆ- Custom animations/transitions (can be added later)
   315ŌåÆ- Custom font families (using system Roboto)
   316ŌåÆ- Tablet/landscape layouts
   317ŌåÆ- Widget design
   318ŌåÆ- Onboarding flow
   319ŌåÆ

   121ŌåÆ@Composable
   122ŌåÆfun HackersPubApp(
   123ŌåÆ    deepLinkData: pub.hackers.android.DeepLinkData? = null,
   124ŌåÆ    viewModel: AppViewModel = hiltViewModel()
   125ŌåÆ) {
   126ŌåÆ    val navController = rememberNavController()
   127ŌåÆ    val isLoggedIn by viewModel.isLoggedIn.collectAsState(initial = false)
   128ŌåÆ
   129ŌåÆ    val fontSizePercent by viewModel.preferencesManager.fontSizePercent.collectAsState(initial = 100)
   130ŌåÆ
   131ŌåÆ    // Handle deep link for verification
   132ŌåÆ    LaunchedEffect(deepLinkData) {
   133ŌåÆ        deepLinkData?.let {
   134ŌåÆ            navController.navigate("signin?token=${it.token}&code=${it.code}")
   135ŌåÆ        }
   136ŌåÆ    }
   137ŌåÆ
   138ŌåÆ    ProvideInAppBrowserUriHandler(preferencesManager = viewModel.preferencesManager) {
   139ŌåÆ    CompositionLocalProvider(LocalFontScale provides (fontSizePercent / 100f)) {
   140ŌåÆ
   141ŌåÆ    val bottomNavItems = if (isLoggedIn) {
   142ŌåÆ        listOf(Screen.Timeline, Screen.Notifications, Screen.Explore, Screen.Search, Screen.Settings)
   143ŌåÆ    } else {
   144ŌåÆ        listOf(Screen.Explore, Screen.Search, Screen.Settings)
   145ŌåÆ    }
   146ŌåÆ
   147ŌåÆ    val navBackStackEntry by navController.currentBackStackEntryAsState()
   148ŌåÆ    val currentDestination = navBackStackEntry?.destination
   149ŌåÆ    val showBottomBar = bottomNavItems.any { it.route == currentDestination?.route }
   150ŌåÆ
   151ŌåÆ    Scaffold(
   152ŌåÆ        bottomBar = {
   153ŌåÆ            if (showBottomBar) {
   154ŌåÆ                NavigationBar(

   220ŌåÆ                TextButton(onClick = { viewModel.dismissDeleteError() }) {
   221ŌåÆ                    Text(stringResource(R.string.ok))
   222ŌåÆ                }
   223ŌåÆ            }
   224ŌåÆ        )
   225ŌåÆ    }
   226ŌåÆ
   227ŌåÆ    Scaffold(
   228ŌåÆ        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   229ŌåÆ        topBar = {
   230ŌåÆ            CompactTopBar(
   231ŌåÆ                title = if (uiState.post?.typename == "Article") "Article" else "Post",
   232ŌåÆ                navigationIcon = {
   233ŌåÆ                    IconButton(onClick = onNavigateBack) {
   234ŌåÆ                        Icon(
   235ŌåÆ                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack,
   236ŌåÆ                            contentDescription = "Back"
   237ŌåÆ                        )
   238ŌåÆ                    }
   239ŌåÆ                },
   240ŌåÆ                actions = {
   241ŌåÆ                    if (uiState.canDelete) {
   242ŌåÆ                        PostDetailActionMenu(
   243ŌåÆ                            isDeleting = uiState.isDeleting,
   244ŌåÆ                            onDelete = {
   245ŌåÆ                                if (confirmBeforeDelete) {
   246ŌåÆ                                    showDeleteConfirmation = true
   247ŌåÆ                                } else {
   248ŌåÆ                                    viewModel.deletePost()
   249ŌåÆ                                }
   250ŌåÆ                            }
   251ŌåÆ                        )
   252ŌåÆ                    }
   253ŌåÆ                }
   254ŌåÆ            )
   255ŌåÆ        },
   256ŌåÆ        floatingActionButton = {
   257ŌåÆ            if (uiState.post != null && isLoggedIn) {
   258ŌåÆ                FloatingActionButton(
   259ŌåÆ                    onClick = { onReplyClick(postId) }
   260ŌåÆ                ) {
   261ŌåÆ                    Icon(
   262ŌåÆ                        imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,
   263ŌåÆ                        contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reply)
   264ŌåÆ                    )
   265ŌåÆ                }
   266ŌåÆ            }
   267ŌåÆ        }
   268ŌåÆ    ) { paddingValues ->
   269ŌåÆ        Box(
   270ŌåÆ            modifier = Modifier
   271ŌåÆ                .fillMaxSize()
   272ŌåÆ                .padding(paddingValues)
   273ŌåÆ        ) {
   274ŌåÆ            when {
   275ŌåÆ                uiState.isLoading -> {
   276ŌåÆ                    FullScreenLoading()
   277ŌåÆ                }
   278ŌåÆ                uiState.error != null -> {
   279ŌåÆ                    ErrorMessage(
   280ŌåÆ                        message = uiState.error ?: stringResource(R.string.error_generic),
   281ŌåÆ                        onRetry = { viewModel.loadPost(postId) }
   282ŌåÆ                    )
   283ŌåÆ                }
   284ŌåÆ                uiState.post != null -> {
   285ŌåÆ                    PullToRefreshBox(
   286ŌåÆ                        isRefreshing = uiState.isRefreshing,
   287ŌåÆ                        onRefresh = { viewModel.refresh() }
   288ŌåÆ                    ) {
   289ŌåÆ                        PostDetailContent(
   290ŌåÆ                            post = uiState.post!!,
   291ŌåÆ                            reactionGroups = uiState.reactionGroups,
   292ŌåÆ                            replies = uiState.replies,
   293ŌåÆ                            hasMoreReplies = uiState.hasMoreReplies,
   294ŌåÆ                            isLoadingMoreReplies = uiState.isLoadingMoreReplies,
   295ŌåÆ                            onLoadMoreReplies = { viewModel.loadMoreReplies() },
   296ŌåÆ                            onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
   297ŌåÆ                            onPostClick = onPostClick,
   298ŌåÆ                            onReplyClick = { onReplyClick(postId) },
   299ŌåÆ                            onShareClick = {
   300ŌåÆ                                if (confirmBeforeShare) {
   301ŌåÆ                                    showShareConfirmation = true
   302ŌåÆ                                } else {
   303ŌåÆ                                    if (uiState.post!!.viewerHasShared) {
   304ŌåÆ                                        viewModel.unsharePost()
   305ŌåÆ                                    } else {
   306ŌåÆ                                        viewModel.sharePost()
   307ŌåÆ                                    }
   308ŌåÆ                                }
   309ŌåÆ                            },
   310ŌåÆ                            onReactionClick = { emoji -> viewModel.toggleReaction(emoji) },
   311ŌåÆ                            onReactionPickerClick = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() },
   312ŌåÆ                            onQuoteClick = { onQuoteClick(postId) },
   313ŌåÆ                            onSharesClick = { viewModel.showSharesSheet() },
   314ŌåÆ                            onQuotesClick = { viewModel.showQuotesSheet() },
   315ŌåÆ                            onExternalShareClick = {
   316ŌåÆ                                val shareUrl = uiState.post?.url
   317ŌåÆ                                    ?: uiState.post?.iri
   318ŌåÆ                                if (shareUrl != null) {
   319ŌåÆ                                    val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   320ŌåÆ                                        action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   321ŌåÆ                                        putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, shareUrl)
   322ŌåÆ                                        type = "text/plain"
   323ŌåÆ                                    }
   324ŌåÆ                                    context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   325ŌåÆ                                }
   326ŌåÆ                            }
   327ŌåÆ                        )
   328ŌåÆ                    }
   329ŌåÆ                }
   330ŌåÆ            }
   331ŌåÆ        }
   332ŌåÆ    }
   333ŌåÆ}
   334ŌåÆ
   335ŌåÆ@Composable
   336ŌåÆprivate fun PostDetailActionMenu(
   337ŌåÆ    isDeleting: Boolean,
   338ŌåÆ    onDelete: () -> Unit
   339ŌåÆ) {
   340ŌåÆ    var expanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   341ŌåÆ
   342ŌåÆ    Box {
   343ŌåÆ        IconButton(onClick = { expanded = true }) {
   344ŌåÆ            Icon(
   345ŌåÆ                imageVector = Icons.Filled.MoreVert,
   346ŌåÆ                contentDescription = "More actions"
   347ŌåÆ            )
   348ŌåÆ        }
   349ŌåÆ
   350ŌåÆ        DropdownMenu(
   351ŌåÆ            expanded = expanded,
   352ŌåÆ            onDismissRequest = { expanded = false }
   353ŌåÆ        ) {
   354ŌåÆ            DropdownMenuItem(
   355ŌåÆ                text = {
   356ŌåÆ                    Text(
   357ŌåÆ                        text = stringResource(R.string.delete_post),
   358ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   359ŌåÆ                    )
   360ŌåÆ                },
   361ŌåÆ                leadingIcon = {
   362ŌåÆ                    Icon(
   363ŌåÆ                        imageVector = Icons.Filled.Delete,
   364ŌåÆ                        contentDescription = null,
   365ŌåÆ                        tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   366ŌåÆ                    )
   367ŌåÆ                },
   368ŌåÆ                onClick = {
   369ŌåÆ                    expanded = false
   370ŌåÆ                    onDelete()
   371ŌåÆ                },
   372ŌåÆ                enabled = !isDeleting
   373ŌåÆ            )
   374ŌåÆ        }
   375ŌåÆ    }
   376ŌåÆ}

   378ŌåÆ@Composable
   379ŌåÆprivate fun PostDetailContent(
   380ŌåÆ    post: Post,
   381ŌåÆ    reactionGroups: List<ReactionGroup>,
   382ŌåÆ    replies: List<Post>,
   383ŌåÆ    hasMoreReplies: Boolean = false,
   384ŌåÆ    isLoadingMoreReplies: Boolean = false,
   385ŌåÆ    onLoadMoreReplies: () -> Unit = {},
   386ŌåÆ    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
   387ŌåÆ    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
   388ŌåÆ    onShareClick: () -> Unit,
   389ŌåÆ    onReplyClick: () -> Unit,
   390ŌåÆ    onReactionClick: (String) -> Unit,
   391ŌåÆ    onReactionPickerClick: () -> Unit,
   392ŌåÆ    onQuoteClick: () -> Unit,
   393ŌåÆ    onSharesClick: () -> Unit,
   394ŌåÆ    onQuotesClick: () -> Unit,
   395ŌåÆ    onExternalShareClick: () -> Unit
   396ŌåÆ) {
   397ŌåÆ    val dateFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("MMM d, yyyy 'at' h:mm a")
   398ŌåÆ        .withZone(ZoneId.systemDefault())
   399ŌåÆ
   400ŌåÆ    LazyColumn {
   401ŌåÆ        item {
   402ŌåÆ            Column(
   403ŌåÆ                modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)
   404ŌåÆ            ) {
   405ŌåÆ                // Reply target preview
   406ŌåÆ                if (post.replyTarget != null) {
   407ŌåÆ                    ReplyTargetPreview(
   408ŌåÆ                        post = post.replyTarget!!,
   409ŌåÆ                        onClick = { onPostClick(post.replyTarget!!.id) },
   410ŌåÆ                        onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   411ŌåÆ                    )
   412ŌåÆ
   413ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   414ŌåÆ
   415ŌåÆ                    Row(
   416ŌåÆ                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   417ŌåÆ                        modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 4.dp)
   418ŌåÆ                    ) {
   419ŌåÆ                        Icon(
   420ŌåÆ                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,
   421ŌåÆ                            contentDescription = null,
   422ŌåÆ                            modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp),
   423ŌåÆ                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   424ŌåÆ                        )
   425ŌåÆ                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   426ŌåÆ                        Text(
   427ŌåÆ                            text = "${stringResource(R.string.replying_to)} @${post.replyTarget!!.actor.handle}",
   428ŌåÆ                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   429ŌåÆ                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   430ŌåÆ                        )
   431ŌåÆ                    }
   432ŌåÆ
   433ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   434ŌåÆ                    HorizontalDivider()
   435ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   436ŌåÆ                }
   437ŌåÆ
   438ŌåÆ                Row(
   439ŌåÆ                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   440ŌåÆ                ) {
   441ŌåÆ                    AsyncImage(
   442ŌåÆ                        model = post.actor.avatarUrl,
   443ŌåÆ                        contentDescription = null,
   444ŌåÆ                        modifier = Modifier
   445ŌåÆ                            .size(48.dp)
   446ŌåÆ                            .clip(CircleShape)
   447ŌåÆ                            .clickable { onProfileClick(post.actor.handle) },
   448ŌåÆ                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   449ŌåÆ                    )
   450ŌåÆ
   451ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   452ŌåÆ
   453ŌåÆ                    Column(
   454ŌåÆ                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onProfileClick(post.actor.handle) }
   455ŌåÆ                    ) {
   456ŌåÆ                        Text(
   457ŌåÆ                            text = post.actor.name ?: post.actor.handle,
   458ŌåÆ                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   459ŌåÆ                            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   460ŌåÆ                        )
   461ŌåÆ                        Text(
   462ŌåÆ                            text = "@${post.actor.handle}",
   463ŌåÆ                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   464ŌåÆ                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   465ŌåÆ                        )
   466ŌåÆ                    }
   467ŌåÆ                }
   468ŌåÆ
   469ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   470ŌåÆ
   471ŌåÆ                val isArticle = post.typename == "Article"
   472ŌåÆ
   473ŌåÆ                post.name?.let { title ->
   474ŌåÆ                    Text(
   475ŌåÆ                        text = title,
   476ŌåÆ                        style = if (isArticle) MaterialTheme.typography.headlineLarge else MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
   477ŌåÆ                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
   478ŌåÆ                    )
   479ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(if (isArticle) 12.dp else 8.dp))
   480ŌåÆ                    if (isArticle) {
   481ŌåÆ                        HorizontalDivider()
   482ŌåÆ                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   483ŌåÆ                    }
   484ŌåÆ                }
   485ŌåÆ
   486ŌåÆ                HtmlContent(
   487ŌåÆ                    html = post.content,
   488ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   489ŌåÆ                    onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   490ŌåÆ                )
   491ŌåÆ
   492ŌåÆ                if (post.media.isNotEmpty()) {
   493ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   494ŌåÆ                    MediaGrid(media = post.media)
   495ŌåÆ                }
   496ŌåÆ
   497ŌåÆ                if (post.quotedPost != null) {
   498ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   499ŌåÆ                    QuotedPostPreview(
   500ŌåÆ                        post = post.quotedPost!!,
   501ŌåÆ                        onClick = { onPostClick(post.quotedPost!!.id) },
   502ŌåÆ                        onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   503ŌåÆ                    )
   504ŌåÆ                }
   505ŌåÆ
   506ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   507ŌåÆ
   508ŌåÆ                Row(
   509ŌåÆ                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   510ŌåÆ                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   511ŌåÆ                ) {
   512ŌåÆ                    Text(
   513ŌåÆ                        text = dateFormatter.format(post.published),
   514ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   515ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   516ŌåÆ                    )
   517ŌåÆ
   518ŌåÆ                    if (post.visibility != pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.PUBLIC) {
   519ŌåÆ                        Text(
   520ŌåÆ                            text = "\u00B7",
   521ŌåÆ                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   522ŌåÆ                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   523ŌåÆ                        )
   524ŌåÆ                        Icon(
   525ŌåÆ                            imageVector = when (post.visibility) {
   526ŌåÆ                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> Icons.Outlined.Lock
   527ŌåÆ                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> Icons.Outlined.Group
   528ŌåÆ                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.DIRECT -> Icons.Outlined.Lock
   529ŌåÆ                                else -> Icons.Filled.Public
   530ŌåÆ                            },
   531ŌåÆ                            contentDescription = when (post.visibility) {
   532ŌåÆ                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> "Unlisted"
   533ŌåÆ                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> "Followers only"
   534ŌåÆ                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.DIRECT -> "Direct"
   535ŌåÆ                                else -> "Public"
   536ŌåÆ                            },
   537ŌåÆ                            modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp),
   538ŌåÆ                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   539ŌåÆ                        )
   540ŌåÆ                    }
   541ŌåÆ                }
   542ŌåÆ
   543ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   544ŌåÆ
   545ŌåÆ                Row(
   546ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   547ŌåÆ                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(16.dp)
   548ŌåÆ                ) {
   549ŌåÆ                    Text(
   550ŌåÆ                        text = "${post.engagementStats.replies} ${stringResource(R.string.replies)}",
   551ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   552ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   553ŌåÆ                    )
   554ŌåÆ                    Text(
   555ŌåÆ                        text = "${post.engagementStats.shares} ${stringResource(R.string.shares)}",
   556ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   557ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   558ŌåÆ                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onSharesClick() }
   559ŌåÆ                    )
   560ŌåÆ                    Text(
   561ŌåÆ                        text = "${post.engagementStats.reactions} ${stringResource(R.string.reactions)}",
   562ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   563ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   564ŌåÆ                    )
   565ŌåÆ                    Text(
   566ŌåÆ                        text = "${post.engagementStats.quotes} ${stringResource(R.string.quotes)}",
   567ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   568ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   569ŌåÆ                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onQuotesClick() }
   570ŌåÆ                    )
   571ŌåÆ                }
   572ŌåÆ
   573ŌåÆ                if (reactionGroups.isNotEmpty()) {
   574ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   575ŌåÆ                    Row {
   576ŌåÆ                        reactionGroups.forEach { group ->
   577ŌåÆ                            Card(
   578ŌåÆ                                onClick = {
   579ŌåÆ                                    group.emoji?.let { onReactionClick(it) }
   580ŌåÆ                                },
   581ŌåÆ                                shape = RoundedCornerShape(16.dp),
   582ŌåÆ                                colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   583ŌåÆ                                    containerColor = if (group.viewerHasReacted)
   584ŌåÆ                                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.2f)
   585ŌåÆ                                    else
   586ŌåÆ                                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
   587ŌåÆ                                ),
   588ŌåÆ                                modifier = Modifier.padding(end = 8.dp)
   589ŌåÆ                            ) {
   590ŌåÆ                                Row(
   591ŌåÆ                                    modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 6.dp),
   592ŌåÆ                                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   593ŌåÆ                                ) {
   594ŌåÆ                                    if (group.emoji != null) {
   595ŌåÆ                                        Text(text = group.emoji)
   596ŌåÆ                                    } else if (group.customEmoji != null) {
   597ŌåÆ                                        AsyncImage(
   598ŌåÆ                                            model = group.customEmoji.imageUrl,
   599ŌåÆ                                            contentDescription = group.customEmoji.name,
   600ŌåÆ                                            modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)
   601ŌåÆ                                        )
   602ŌåÆ                                    }
   603ŌåÆ                                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   604ŌåÆ                                    Text(
   605ŌåÆ                                        text = group.count.toString(),
   606ŌåÆ                                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   607ŌåÆ                                        color = if (group.viewerHasReacted)
   608ŌåÆ                                            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   609ŌåÆ                                        else
   610ŌåÆ                                            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface
   611ŌåÆ                                    )
   612ŌåÆ                                }
   613ŌåÆ                            }
   614ŌåÆ                        }
   615ŌåÆ                    }
   616ŌåÆ                }
   617ŌåÆ
   618ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   619ŌåÆ
   620ŌåÆ                Row {
   621ŌåÆ                    IconButton(onClick = onReplyClick) {
   622ŌåÆ                        Icon(
   623ŌåÆ                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,
   624ŌåÆ                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reply),
   625ŌåÆ                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   626ŌåÆ                        )
   627ŌåÆ                    }
   628ŌåÆ                    IconButton(onClick = onShareClick) {
   629ŌåÆ                        Icon(
   630ŌåÆ                            imageVector = Icons.Filled.Repeat,
   631ŌåÆ                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.share),
   632ŌåÆ                            tint = if (post.viewerHasShared)
   633ŌåÆ                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   634ŌåÆ                            else
   635ŌåÆ                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   636ŌåÆ                        )
   637ŌåÆ                    }
   638ŌåÆ                    IconButton(onClick = onReactionPickerClick) {
   639ŌåÆ                        Icon(
   640ŌåÆ                            imageVector = Icons.Outlined.AddReaction,
   641ŌåÆ                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reactions),
   642ŌåÆ                            tint = if (reactionGroups.any { it.viewerHasReacted })
   643ŌåÆ                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   644ŌåÆ                            else
   645ŌåÆ                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   646ŌåÆ                        )
   647ŌåÆ                    }
   648ŌåÆ                    IconButton(onClick = onQuoteClick) {
   649ŌåÆ                        Icon(
   650ŌåÆ                            imageVector = Icons.Outlined.FormatQuote,
   651ŌåÆ                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.quotes),
   652ŌåÆ                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   653ŌåÆ                        )
   654ŌåÆ                    }
   655ŌåÆ                    IconButton(onClick = onExternalShareClick) {
   656ŌåÆ                        Icon(
   657ŌåÆ                            imageVector = Icons.Outlined.Share,
   658ŌåÆ                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.share),
   659ŌåÆ                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   660ŌåÆ                        )
   661ŌåÆ                    }
   662ŌåÆ                }
   663ŌåÆ            }
   664ŌåÆ
   665ŌåÆ            HorizontalDivider()
   666ŌåÆ        }
   667ŌåÆ
   668ŌåÆ        if (replies.isNotEmpty()) {
   669ŌåÆ            item {
   670ŌåÆ                Text(
   671ŌåÆ                    text = stringResource(R.string.replies),
   672ŌåÆ                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   673ŌåÆ                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   674ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)
   675ŌåÆ                )
   676ŌåÆ            }
   677ŌåÆ
   678ŌåÆ            items(
   679ŌåÆ                items = replies,
   680ŌåÆ                key = { it.id }
   681ŌåÆ            ) { reply ->
   682ŌåÆ                PostCard(
   683ŌåÆ                    post = reply,
   684ŌåÆ                    onClick = { onPostClick(reply.id) },
   685ŌåÆ                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
   686ŌåÆ                    onQuotedPostClick = onPostClick
   687ŌåÆ                )
   688ŌåÆ                HorizontalDivider(thickness = 0.5.dp)
   689ŌåÆ            }
   690ŌåÆ
   691ŌåÆ            if (isLoadingMoreReplies) {
   692ŌåÆ                item {
   693ŌåÆ                    LoadingItem()
   694ŌåÆ                }
   695ŌåÆ            } else if (hasMoreReplies) {
   696ŌåÆ                item {

content.text:
I now have a thorough understanding of both the design spec and the existing codebase. Let me verify the blocker fixes systematically.

---

**APPROVED**

All four previously identified blockers have been adequately resolved:

**B1: Post Detail Screen -- RESOLVED.** The spec now includes a comprehensive "Post Detail Screen" section (lines 153-200) covering the header, expanded post content, article post variant, engagement stats row, action bar, reaction groups, reaction picker bottom sheet, shares/quotes list bottom sheet, and reply thread. This aligns well with the existing `PostDetailScreen.kt` implementation and provides sufficient detail for the redesign.

**B2: Bottom Navigation Bar -- RESOLVED.** A dedicated "Bottom Navigation Bar" section (lines 103-114) now specifies height (56dp), background color per theme, top border treatment, tab sets for both authenticated and unauthenticated states, icon sizing, label typography, active/inactive styling, and notification dot placement. This maps cleanly to the existing `HackersPubApp.kt` navigation setup.

**B3: Author name typography conflict -- RESOLVED.** The `bodyLargeSemiBold` style (line 53) is explicitly defined at 15sp/600, distinct from `bodyLarge` at 15sp/400. The post card layout correctly references `bodyLargeSemiBold` for author names (line 141), eliminating the ambiguity.

**B4: Engagement active colors incomplete -- RESOLVED.** All five engagement actions are individually specified (lines 97-101): Reply uses `accent`, Share/Repost uses `share` green, Reaction/Heart uses `reaction` red (filled), Quote uses `accent`, and External Share has no active state (always `textSecondary`). This is complete and unambiguous.

**No new blockers introduced.** The spec is internally consistent, maps to existing screens and navigation structure, and the migration strategy (lines 293-306) correctly identifies it as a UI-layer-only change. The notes about profile stats availability (line 308) and font scaling compatibility (line 310) are pragmatic safeguards. The tab configuration in the spec (4 tabs authenticated, 4 tabs unauthenticated -- line 108-109) differs from the current implementation (5 tabs authenticated with Settings, 3 tabs unauthenticated) but this is an intentional redesign choice, not an error -- Settings moves elsewhere or is accessed differently.

content.text:
Base directory for this skill: /Users/kodingwarrior/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-plugins-official/superpowers/5.0.5/skills/writing-plans

# Writing Plans

## Overview

Write comprehensive implementation plans assuming the engineer has zero context for our codebase and questionable taste. Document everything they need to know: which files to touch for each task, code, testing, docs they might need to check, how to test it. Give them the whole plan as bite-sized tasks. DRY. YAGNI. TDD. Frequent commits.

Assume they are a skilled developer, but know almost nothing about our toolset or problem domain. Assume they don't know good test design very well.

**Announce at start:** "I'm using the writing-plans skill to create the implementation plan."

**Context:** This should be run in a dedicated worktree (created by brainstorming skill).

**Save plans to:** `docs/superpowers/plans/YYYY-MM-DD-<feature-name>.md`
- (User preferences for plan location override this default)

## Scope Check

If the spec covers multiple independent subsystems, it should have been broken into sub-project specs during brainstorming. If it wasn't, suggest breaking this into separate plans ŌĆö one per subsystem. Each plan should produce working, testable software on its own.

## File Structure

Before defining tasks, map out which files will be created or modified and what each one is responsible for. This is where decomposition decisions get locked in.

- Design units with clear boundaries and well-defined interfaces. Each file should have one clear responsibility.
- You reason best about code you can hold in context at once, and your edits are more reliable when files are focused. Prefer smaller, focused files over large ones that do too much.
- Files that change together should live together. Split by responsibility, not by technical layer.
- In existing codebases, follow established patterns. If the codebase uses large files, don't unilaterally restructure - but if a file you're modifying has grown unwieldy, including a split in the plan is reasonable.

This structure informs the task decomposition. Each task should produce self-contained changes that make sense independently.

## Bite-Sized Task Granularity

**Each step is one action (2-5 minutes):**
- "Write the failing test" - step
- "Run it to make sure it fails" - step
- "Implement the minimal code to make the test pass" - step
- "Run the tests and make sure they pass" - step
- "Commit" - step

## Plan Document Header

**Every plan MUST start with this header:**

```markdown
# [Feature Name] Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** [One sentence describing what this builds]

**Architecture:** [2-3 sentences about approach]

**Tech Stack:** [Key technologies/libraries]

---
```

## Task Structure

````markdown
### Task N: [Component Name]

**Files:**
- Create: `exact/path/to/file.py`
- Modify: `exact/path/to/existing.py:123-145`
- Test: `tests/exact/path/to/test.py`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the failing test**

```python
def test_specific_behavior():
    result = function(input)
    assert result == expected
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Run test to verify it fails**

Run: `pytest tests/path/test.py::test_name -v`
Expected: FAIL with "function not defined"

- [ ] **Step 3: Write minimal implementation**

```python
def function(input):
    return expected
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Run test to verify it passes**

Run: `pytest tests/path/test.py::test_name -v`
Expected: PASS

- [ ] **Step 5: Commit**

```bash
git add tests/path/test.py src/path/file.py
git commit -m "feat: add specific feature"
```
````

## Remember
- Exact file paths always
- Complete code in plan (not "add validation")
- Exact commands with expected output
- Reference relevant skills with @ syntax
- DRY, YAGNI, TDD, frequent commits

## Plan Review Loop

After writing the complete plan:

1. Dispatch a single plan-document-reviewer subagent (see plan-document-reviewer-prompt.md) with precisely crafted review context ŌĆö never your session history. This keeps the reviewer focused on the plan, not your thought process.
   - Provide: path to the plan document, path to spec document
2. If ŌØī Issues Found: fix the issues, re-dispatch reviewer for the whole plan
3. If Ō£ģ Approved: proceed to execution handoff

**Review loop guidance:**
- Same agent that wrote the plan fixes it (preserves context)
- If loop exceeds 3 iterations, surface to human for guidance
- Reviewers are advisory ŌĆö explain disagreements if you believe feedback is incorrect

## Execution Handoff

After saving the plan, offer execution choice:

**"Plan complete and saved to `docs/superpowers/plans/<filename>.md`. Two execution options:**

**1. Subagent-Driven (recommended)** - I dispatch a fresh subagent per task, review between tasks, fast iteration

**2. Inline Execution** - Execute tasks in this session using executing-plans, batch execution with checkpoints

**Which approach?"**

**If Subagent-Driven chosen:**
- **REQUIRED SUB-SKILL:** Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development
- Fresh subagent per task + two-stage review

**If Inline Execution chosen:**
- **REQUIRED SUB-SKILL:** Use superpowers:executing-plans
- Batch execution with checkpoints for review


ARGUMENTS: Create an implementation plan for the Hackers'Pub Android full UI redesign based on the approved design spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-19-android-redesign-design.md. The project is a Jetpack Compose Android app at /Users/kodingwarrior/fediverse/hackerspub-android. The redesign replaces Material Design 3 styling with a custom Ivory-inspired design system. No changes to ViewModels, data layer, or navigation ŌĆö pure UI transformation.

Let me first thoroughly explore the codebase to understand the current structure before writing the plan.

    19ŌåÆdata class DeepLinkData(

    21ŌåÆ    val code: String

    23ŌåÆ
    24ŌåÆ@AndroidEntryPoint
    25ŌåÆclass MainActivity : ComponentActivity() {
    26ŌåÆ
    27ŌåÆ    private var deepLinkData by mutableStateOf<DeepLinkData?>(null)

    29ŌåÆ    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {

    51ŌåÆ        val data = intent?.data ?: return
    52ŌåÆ        if (data.scheme == "hackerspub" && data.host == "verify") {

    57ŌåÆ            }
    58ŌåÆ        }
    59ŌåÆ    }
    60ŌåÆ}

   467ŌåÆ@Composable
   468ŌåÆfun MediaGrid(media: List<pub.hackers.android.domain.model.Media>) {
   469ŌåÆ    when (media.size) {
   470ŌåÆ        1 -> {
   471ŌåÆ            MediaImage(
   472ŌåÆ                url = media[0].url,
   473ŌåÆ                alt = media[0].alt,
   474ŌåÆ                modifier = Modifier
   475ŌåÆ                    .fillMaxWidth()
   476ŌåÆ                    .height(200.dp)
   477ŌåÆ                    .clip(RoundedCornerShape(12.dp))
   478ŌåÆ            )
   479ŌåÆ        }
   480ŌåÆ        2 -> {
   481ŌåÆ            Row(
   482ŌåÆ                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   483ŌåÆ            ) {
   484ŌåÆ                media.forEach { item ->
   485ŌåÆ                    MediaImage(
   486ŌåÆ                        url = item.url,
   487ŌåÆ                        alt = item.alt,
   488ŌåÆ                        modifier = Modifier
   489ŌåÆ                            .weight(1f)
   490ŌåÆ                            .height(150.dp)
   491ŌåÆ                            .clip(RoundedCornerShape(12.dp))
   492ŌåÆ                    )
   493ŌåÆ                }
   494ŌåÆ            }
   495ŌåÆ        }
   496ŌåÆ        else -> {
   497ŌåÆ            Column(
   498ŌåÆ                verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   499ŌåÆ            ) {
   500ŌåÆ                Row(
   501ŌåÆ                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   502ŌåÆ                ) {
   503ŌåÆ                    media.take(2).forEach { item ->
   504ŌåÆ                        MediaImage(
   505ŌåÆ                            url = item.url,
   506ŌåÆ                            alt = item.alt,
   507ŌåÆ                            modifier = Modifier
   508ŌåÆ                                .weight(1f)
   509ŌåÆ                                .height(100.dp)
   510ŌåÆ                                .clip(RoundedCornerShape(12.dp))
   511ŌåÆ                        )
   512ŌåÆ                    }
   513ŌåÆ                }
   514ŌåÆ                if (media.size > 2) {
   515ŌåÆ                    Row(
   516ŌåÆ                        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   517ŌåÆ                    ) {
   518ŌåÆ                        media.drop(2).take(2).forEach { item ->
   519ŌåÆ                            MediaImage(
   520ŌåÆ                                url = item.url,
   521ŌåÆ                                alt = item.alt,
   522ŌåÆ                                modifier = Modifier
   523ŌåÆ                                    .weight(1f)
   524ŌåÆ                                    .height(100.dp)
   525ŌåÆ                                    .clip(RoundedCornerShape(12.dp))
   526ŌåÆ                            )
   527ŌåÆ                        }
   528ŌåÆ                    }
   529ŌåÆ                }
   530ŌåÆ            }
   531ŌåÆ        }
   532ŌåÆ    }
   533ŌåÆ}

   535ŌåÆ@Composable
   536ŌåÆprivate fun MediaImage(
   537ŌåÆ    url: String,
   538ŌåÆ    alt: String?,
   539ŌåÆ    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
   540ŌåÆ) {
   541ŌåÆ    val context = LocalContext.current
   542ŌåÆ    var showMenu by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   543ŌåÆ
   544ŌåÆ    Box {
   545ŌåÆ        AsyncImage(
   546ŌåÆ            model = url,
   547ŌåÆ            contentDescription = alt,
   548ŌåÆ            modifier = modifier.combinedClickable(
   549ŌåÆ                onClick = {
   550ŌåÆ                    // Open image in browser/viewer
   551ŌåÆ                    val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, Uri.parse(url))
   552ŌåÆ                    context.startActivity(intent)
   553ŌåÆ                },
   554ŌåÆ                onLongClick = { showMenu = true }
   555ŌåÆ            ),
   556ŌåÆ            contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   557ŌåÆ        )
   558ŌåÆ
   559ŌåÆ        DropdownMenu(
   560ŌåÆ            expanded = showMenu,
   561ŌåÆ            onDismissRequest = { showMenu = false }
   562ŌåÆ        ) {
   563ŌåÆ            DropdownMenuItem(
   564ŌåÆ                text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.share)) },
   565ŌåÆ                onClick = {
   566ŌåÆ                    showMenu = false
   567ŌåÆ                    val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   568ŌåÆ                        action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   569ŌåÆ                        putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, url)
   570ŌåÆ                        type = "text/plain"
   571ŌåÆ                    }
   572ŌåÆ                    context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   573ŌåÆ                }
   574ŌåÆ            )
   575ŌåÆ            DropdownMenuItem(
   576ŌåÆ                text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.open_in_browser)) },
   577ŌåÆ                onClick = {
   578ŌåÆ                    showMenu = false
   579ŌåÆ                    val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, Uri.parse(url))
   580ŌåÆ                    context.startActivity(intent)
   581ŌåÆ                }
   582ŌåÆ            )
   583ŌåÆ        }
   584ŌåÆ    }
   585ŌåÆ}
   586ŌåÆ
   587ŌåÆprivate fun formatRelativeTime(instant: Instant): String {
   588ŌåÆ    val now = Instant.now()
   589ŌåÆ    val duration = Duration.between(instant, now)
   590ŌåÆ
   591ŌåÆ    return when {
   592ŌåÆ        duration.toMinutes() < 1 -> "now"
   593ŌåÆ        duration.toMinutes() < 60 -> "${duration.toMinutes()}m"
   594ŌåÆ        duration.toHours() < 24 -> "${duration.toHours()}h"
   595ŌåÆ        duration.toDays() < 7 -> "${duration.toDays()}d"
   596ŌåÆ        duration.toDays() < 30 -> "${duration.toDays() / 7}w"
   597ŌåÆ        duration.toDays() < 365 -> "${duration.toDays() / 30}mo"
   598ŌåÆ        else -> "${duration.toDays() / 365}y"
   599ŌåÆ    }
   600ŌåÆ}
   601ŌåÆ
   602ŌåÆprivate fun formatCount(count: Int): String {
   603ŌåÆ    return when {
   604ŌåÆ        count < 1000 -> count.toString()
   605ŌåÆ        count < 1_000_000 -> String.format("%.1fK", count / 1000.0)
   606ŌåÆ        else -> String.format("%.1fM", count / 1_000_000.0)
   607ŌåÆ    }
   608ŌåÆ}
