    39ŌåÆval SUPPORTED_REACTION_EMOJIS = listOf("ŌØż’ĖÅ", "­¤Äē", "­¤śé", "­¤ś▓", "­¤żö", "­¤śó", "­¤æĆ")
    40ŌåÆ
    41ŌåÆ@Composable
    42ŌåÆfun ReactionPicker(
    43ŌåÆ    reactionGroups: List<ReactionGroup>,
    44ŌåÆ    isSubmitting: Boolean,
    45ŌåÆ    onEmojiSelect: (String) -> Unit,
    46ŌåÆ    onClose: () -> Unit
    47ŌåÆ) {
    48ŌåÆ    val groupsByEmoji = reactionGroups
    49ŌåÆ        .filter { it.emoji != null }
    50ŌåÆ        .associateBy { it.emoji!! }
    51ŌåÆ
    52ŌåÆ    val selectedGroups = reactionGroups
    53ŌåÆ        .filter { it.viewerHasReacted }
    54ŌåÆ        .sortedWith(compareBy { group ->
    55ŌåÆ            group.emoji?.let { SUPPORTED_REACTION_EMOJIS.indexOf(it).takeIf { i -> i >= 0 } ?: Int.MAX_VALUE }
    56ŌåÆ                ?: Int.MAX_VALUE
    57ŌåÆ        })
    58ŌåÆ
    59ŌåÆ    Column(
    60ŌåÆ        modifier = Modifier
    61ŌåÆ            .fillMaxWidth()
    62ŌåÆ            .padding(16.dp)
    63ŌåÆ    ) {
    64ŌåÆ        Row(
    65ŌåÆ            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
    66ŌåÆ            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
    67ŌåÆ            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
    68ŌåÆ        ) {
    69ŌåÆ            Text(
    70ŌåÆ                text = stringResource(R.string.reactions),
    71ŌåÆ                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    72ŌåÆ                fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
    73ŌåÆ            )
    74ŌåÆ            IconButton(
    75ŌåÆ                onClick = onClose,
    76ŌåÆ                modifier = Modifier
    77ŌåÆ                    .size(30.dp)
    78ŌåÆ                    .clip(CircleShape)
    79ŌåÆ                    .background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant)
    80ŌåÆ            ) {
    81ŌåÆ                Icon(
    82ŌåÆ                    imageVector = Icons.Filled.Close,
    83ŌåÆ                    contentDescription = "Close",
    84ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp)
    85ŌåÆ                )
    86ŌåÆ            }
    87ŌåÆ        }
    88ŌåÆ
    89ŌåÆ        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
    90ŌåÆ
    91ŌåÆ        LazyVerticalGrid(
    92ŌåÆ            columns = GridCells.Fixed(7),
    93ŌåÆ            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp),
    94ŌåÆ            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp),
    95ŌåÆ            modifier = Modifier.height(80.dp)
    96ŌåÆ        ) {
    97ŌåÆ            items(SUPPORTED_REACTION_EMOJIS) { emoji ->
    98ŌåÆ                val existingGroup = groupsByEmoji[emoji]
    99ŌåÆ
   100ŌåÆ                Column(
   101ŌåÆ                    horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
   102ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier
   103ŌåÆ                        .clip(RoundedCornerShape(8.dp))
   104ŌåÆ                        .background(
   105ŌåÆ                            if (existingGroup?.viewerHasReacted == true)
   106ŌåÆ                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.2f)
   107ŌåÆ                            else
   108ŌåÆ                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.5f)
   109ŌåÆ                        )
   110ŌåÆ                        .clickable(enabled = !isSubmitting) { onEmojiSelect(emoji) }
   111ŌåÆ                        .padding(vertical = 8.dp)
   112ŌåÆ                ) {
   113ŌåÆ                    Text(
   114ŌåÆ                        text = emoji,
   115ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall
   116ŌåÆ                    )
   117ŌåÆ                    Text(
   118ŌåÆ                        text = (existingGroup?.count ?: 0).toString(),
   119ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   120ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   121ŌåÆ                    )
   122ŌåÆ                }
   123ŌåÆ            }
   124ŌåÆ        }
   125ŌåÆ
   126ŌåÆ        if (selectedGroups.isNotEmpty()) {
   127ŌåÆ            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   128ŌåÆ            HorizontalDivider()
   129ŌåÆ            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   130ŌåÆ
   131ŌåÆ            Row(
   132ŌåÆ                modifier = Modifier.horizontalScroll(rememberScrollState()),
   133ŌåÆ                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   134ŌåÆ            ) {
   135ŌåÆ                selectedGroups.forEach { group ->
   136ŌåÆ                    Row(
   137ŌåÆ                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   138ŌåÆ                        modifier = Modifier
   139ŌåÆ                            .clip(RoundedCornerShape(50))
   140ŌåÆ                            .background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.2f))
   141ŌåÆ                            .clickable(enabled = !isSubmitting && group.emoji != null) {
   142ŌåÆ                                group.emoji?.let { onEmojiSelect(it) }
   143ŌåÆ                            }
   144ŌåÆ                            .padding(horizontal = 10.dp, vertical = 6.dp)
   145ŌåÆ                    ) {
   146ŌåÆ                        if (group.emoji != null) {
   147ŌåÆ                            Text(text = group.emoji)
   148ŌåÆ                        } else if (group.customEmoji != null) {
   149ŌåÆ                            AsyncImage(
   150ŌåÆ                                model = group.customEmoji.imageUrl,
   151ŌåÆ                                contentDescription = group.customEmoji.name,
   152ŌåÆ                                modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp)
   153ŌåÆ                            )
   154ŌåÆ                        }
   155ŌåÆ                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(6.dp))
   156ŌåÆ                        Text(
   157ŌåÆ                            text = group.count.toString(),
   158ŌåÆ                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium
   159ŌåÆ                        )
   160ŌåÆ                    }
   161ŌåÆ                }
   162ŌåÆ            }
   163ŌåÆ        }
   164ŌåÆ    }
   165ŌåÆ}

    67ŌåÆ@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)

    69ŌåÆfun NotificationsScreen(
    70ŌåÆ    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
    71ŌåÆ    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
    72ŌåÆ    onComposeClick: () -> Unit = {},
    73ŌåÆ    viewModel: NotificationsViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    74ŌåÆ) {
    75ŌåÆ    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    76ŌåÆ    val listState = rememberLazyListState()
    77ŌåÆ    val lifecycleOwner = LocalLifecycleOwner.current
    78ŌåÆ
    79ŌåÆ    DisposableEffect(lifecycleOwner) {
    80ŌåÆ        val observer = LifecycleEventObserver { _, event ->
    81ŌåÆ            if (event == Lifecycle.Event.ON_RESUME) {
    82ŌåÆ                viewModel.refreshIfStale()
    83ŌåÆ            }
    84ŌåÆ        }
    85ŌåÆ        lifecycleOwner.lifecycle.addObserver(observer)
    86ŌåÆ        onDispose { lifecycleOwner.lifecycle.removeObserver(observer) }
    87ŌåÆ    }
    88ŌåÆ
    89ŌåÆ    val shouldLoadMore by remember {
    90ŌåÆ        derivedStateOf {
    91ŌåÆ            val lastVisibleItem = listState.layoutInfo.visibleItemsInfo.lastOrNull()
    92ŌåÆ            lastVisibleItem != null && lastVisibleItem.index >= listState.layoutInfo.totalItemsCount - 3
    93ŌåÆ        }
    94ŌåÆ    }
    95ŌåÆ
    96ŌåÆ    LaunchedEffect(shouldLoadMore) {
    97ŌåÆ        if (shouldLoadMore && uiState.hasNextPage && !uiState.isLoadingMore) {
    98ŌåÆ            viewModel.loadMore()
    99ŌåÆ        }
   100ŌåÆ    }
   101ŌåÆ
   102ŌåÆ    Scaffold(
   103ŌåÆ        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   104ŌåÆ        topBar = {
   105ŌåÆ            CompactTopBar(title = stringResource(R.string.nav_notifications))
   106ŌåÆ        },
   107ŌåÆ        floatingActionButton = {
   108ŌåÆ            FloatingActionButton(onClick = onComposeClick) {
   109ŌåÆ                Icon(
   110ŌåÆ                    imageVector = Icons.Default.Add,
   111ŌåÆ                    contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.compose)
   112ŌåÆ                )
   113ŌåÆ            }
   114ŌåÆ        }
   115ŌåÆ    ) { paddingValues ->
   116ŌåÆ        Box(
   117ŌåÆ            modifier = Modifier
   118ŌåÆ                .fillMaxSize()
   119ŌåÆ                .padding(paddingValues)
   120ŌåÆ        ) {
   121ŌåÆ            when {
   122ŌåÆ                uiState.isLoading && uiState.notifications.isEmpty() -> {
   123ŌåÆ                    FullScreenLoading()
   124ŌåÆ                }
   125ŌåÆ                uiState.error != null && uiState.notifications.isEmpty() -> {
   126ŌåÆ                    ErrorMessage(
   127ŌåÆ                        message = uiState.error ?: stringResource(R.string.error_generic),
   128ŌåÆ                        onRetry = { viewModel.refresh() }
   129ŌåÆ                    )
   130ŌåÆ                }
   131ŌåÆ                uiState.notifications.isEmpty() -> {
   132ŌåÆ                    ErrorMessage(
   133ŌåÆ                        message = stringResource(R.string.no_notifications),
   134ŌåÆ                        icon = Icons.Outlined.NotificationsOff
   135ŌåÆ                    )
   136ŌåÆ                }
   137ŌåÆ                else -> {
   138ŌåÆ                    PullToRefreshBox(
   139ŌåÆ                        isRefreshing = uiState.isRefreshing,
   140ŌåÆ                        onRefresh = { viewModel.refresh() }
   141ŌåÆ                    ) {
   142ŌåÆ                        LazyColumn(state = listState) {
   143ŌåÆ                            items(
   144ŌåÆ                                items = uiState.notifications,
   145ŌåÆ                                key = { it.id }
   146ŌåÆ                            ) { notification ->
   147ŌåÆ                                NotificationItem(
   148ŌåÆ                                    notification = notification,
   149ŌåÆ                                    onPostClick = onPostClick,
   150ŌåÆ                                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   151ŌåÆ                                )
   152ŌåÆ                                HorizontalDivider(thickness = 0.5.dp)
   153ŌåÆ                            }
   154ŌåÆ
   155ŌåÆ                            if (uiState.isLoadingMore) {
   156ŌåÆ                                item {
   157ŌåÆ                                    LoadingItem()
   158ŌåÆ                                }
   159ŌåÆ                            }
   160ŌåÆ                        }
   161ŌåÆ                    }
   162ŌåÆ                }
   163ŌåÆ            }
   164ŌåÆ        }
   165ŌåÆ    }
   166ŌåÆ}

   168ŌåÆ@Composable

   206ŌåÆ
   207ŌåÆ    val post = when (notification) {

   210ŌåÆ        is Notification.Quote -> notification.post

   215ŌåÆ
   216ŌåÆ    val actor = notification.actors.firstOrNull()
   217ŌåÆ

   220ŌåÆ

   245ŌåÆ        } else {

   251ŌåÆ            )
   252ŌåÆ        }
   253ŌåÆ
   254ŌåÆ        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   255ŌåÆ
   256ŌåÆ        Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {

   262ŌåÆ                        modifier = Modifier
   263ŌåÆ                            .size(32.dp)
   264ŌåÆ                            .clip(CircleShape)

   266ŌåÆ                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   267ŌåÆ                    )

   269ŌåÆ                }
   270ŌåÆ
   271ŌåÆ                Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   272ŌåÆ                    Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   273ŌåÆ                        val actorDisplayName = actor?.name ?: actor?.handle ?: "Someone"
   274ŌåÆ                        val allActors = notification.actors
   275ŌåÆ                        val actorLabel = when {

   277ŌåÆ                            allActors.size > 2 -> "$actorDisplayName and ${allActors.size - 1} others"
   278ŌåÆ                            else -> actorDisplayName

   280ŌåÆ                        Text(

   288ŌåÆ                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   289ŌåÆ                        Text(

   291ŌåÆ                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   292ŌåÆ                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   293ŌåÆ                        )
   294ŌåÆ                    }
   295ŌåÆ                    Text(

   301ŌåÆ            }
   302ŌåÆ
   303ŌåÆ            val shouldHavePost = notification is Notification.Mention ||
   304ŌåÆ                notification is Notification.Reply ||
   305ŌåÆ                notification is Notification.Quote ||
   306ŌåÆ                notification is Notification.Share ||
   307ŌåÆ                notification is Notification.React
   308ŌåÆ
   309ŌåÆ            if (post != null) {
   310ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.size(8.dp))
   311ŌåÆ                HtmlContent(
   312ŌåÆ                    html = post.content,
   313ŌåÆ                    maxLines = 3,
   314ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   315ŌåÆ                    onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   316ŌåÆ                )
   317ŌåÆ            } else if (shouldHavePost) {
   318ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.size(8.dp))
   319ŌåÆ                Text(
   320ŌåÆ                    text = stringResource(R.string.notification_post_unavailable),
   321ŌåÆ                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   322ŌåÆ                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.6f),
   323ŌåÆ                    fontStyle = androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontStyle.Italic
   324ŌåÆ                )
   325ŌåÆ            }
   326ŌåÆ        }
   327ŌåÆ    }
   328ŌåÆ}
   329ŌåÆ
   330ŌåÆprivate fun formatRelativeTime(instant: Instant): String {
   331ŌåÆ    val now = Instant.now()
   332ŌåÆ    val duration = Duration.between(instant, now)
   333ŌåÆ
   334ŌåÆ    return when {
   335ŌåÆ        duration.toMinutes() < 1 -> "now"
   336ŌåÆ        duration.toMinutes() < 60 -> "${duration.toMinutes()}m"
   337ŌåÆ        duration.toHours() < 24 -> "${duration.toHours()}h"
   338ŌåÆ        duration.toDays() < 7 -> "${duration.toDays()}d"
   339ŌåÆ        else -> "${duration.toDays() / 7}w"
   340ŌåÆ    }
   341ŌåÆ}

    55ŌåÆfun SettingsScreen(

   369ŌåÆ                DropdownMenu(

   383ŌåÆ                            }
   384ŌåÆ                        )
   385ŌåÆ                    }
   386ŌåÆ                }
   387ŌåÆ            }
   388ŌåÆ        }
   389ŌåÆ    )
   390ŌåÆ}

   126ŌåÆ                            val normalizedHandle = if (profileHandle.startsWith("@")) profileHandle else "@$profileHandle"
   127ŌåÆ                            val profileUrl = "https://hackers.pub/$normalizedHandle"
   128ŌåÆ                            val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   129ŌåÆ                                action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   130ŌåÆ                                putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, profileUrl)
   131ŌåÆ                                type = "text/plain"
   132ŌåÆ                            }
   133ŌåÆ                            context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   134ŌåÆ                        }) {

   137ŌåÆ                                contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.share)
   138ŌåÆ                            )

   146ŌåÆ                            onRemoveFollower = { viewModel.removeFollower() },
   147ŌåÆ                            onBlock = { viewModel.blockActor() },

   150ŌåÆ                    }
   151ŌåÆ                }

   153ŌåÆ        }
   154ŌåÆ    ) { paddingValues ->

   183ŌåÆ                                    viewerFollows = uiState.viewerFollows,
   184ŌåÆ                                    followsViewer = uiState.followsViewer,
   185ŌåÆ                                    viewerBlocks = uiState.viewerBlocks,
   186ŌåÆ                                    isPerformingAction = uiState.isPerformingAction,
   187ŌåÆ                                    onFollowClick = { viewModel.followActor() },
   188ŌåÆ                                    onUnfollowClick = { viewModel.unfollowActor() },
   189ŌåÆ                                    onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   190ŌåÆ                                )
   191ŌåÆ                                HorizontalDivider()
   192ŌåÆ                            }
   193ŌåÆ
   194ŌåÆ                            items(
   195ŌåÆ                                items = uiState.posts,
   196ŌåÆ                                key = { it.id }
   197ŌåÆ                            ) { post ->
   198ŌåÆ                                PostCard(
   199ŌåÆ                                    post = post,
   200ŌåÆ                                    onClick = { onPostClick(post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id) },
   201ŌåÆ                                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
   202ŌåÆ                                    onReplyClick = { onReplyClick(post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id) },
   203ŌåÆ                                    onShareClick = {
   204ŌåÆ                                        val targetId = post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id
   205ŌåÆ                                        if (post.viewerHasShared) {
   206ŌåÆ                                            viewModel.unsharePost(targetId)
   207ŌåÆ                                        } else {
   208ŌåÆ                                            viewModel.sharePost(targetId)
   209ŌåÆ                                        }
   210ŌåÆ                                    },
   211ŌåÆ                                    onQuoteClick = { onQuoteClick(post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id) },
   212ŌåÆ                                    onExternalShareClick = {
   213ŌåÆ                                        val displayPost = post.sharedPost ?: post
   214ŌåÆ                                        val shareUrl = displayPost.url ?: displayPost.iri
   215ŌåÆ                                        if (shareUrl != null) {
   216ŌåÆ                                            val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   217ŌåÆ                                                action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   218ŌåÆ                                                putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, shareUrl)
   219ŌåÆ                                                type = "text/plain"
   220ŌåÆ                                            }
   221ŌåÆ                                            context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   222ŌåÆ                                        }
   223ŌåÆ                                    },
   224ŌåÆ                                    onQuotedPostClick = onPostClick
   225ŌåÆ                                )
   226ŌåÆ                                HorizontalDivider(thickness = 0.5.dp)
   227ŌåÆ                            }
   228ŌåÆ
   229ŌåÆ                            if (uiState.isLoadingMore) {
   230ŌåÆ                                item {
   231ŌåÆ                                    LoadingItem()
   232ŌåÆ                                }
   233ŌåÆ                            }
   234ŌåÆ                        }
   235ŌåÆ                    }
   236ŌåÆ                }
   237ŌåÆ            }
   238ŌåÆ        }
   239ŌåÆ    }
   240ŌåÆ}

   242ŌåÆ@Composable
   243ŌåÆprivate fun ProfileActionMenu(
   244ŌåÆ    followsViewer: Boolean,
   245ŌåÆ    viewerBlocks: Boolean,
   246ŌåÆ    isPerformingAction: Boolean,

   248ŌåÆ    onBlock: () -> Unit,

   261ŌåÆ        DropdownMenu(

   287ŌåÆ                enabled = !isPerformingAction
   288ŌåÆ            )
   289ŌåÆ        }
   290ŌåÆ    }
   291ŌåÆ}

   293ŌåÆ@Composable
   294ŌåÆprivate fun ProfileHeader(
   295ŌåÆ    avatarUrl: String,
   296ŌåÆ    name: String?,
   297ŌåÆ    handle: String,
   298ŌåÆ    bio: String?,
   299ŌåÆ    isViewer: Boolean,
   300ŌåÆ    viewerFollows: Boolean,
   301ŌåÆ    followsViewer: Boolean,

   331ŌåÆ
   332ŌåÆ        Row(

   334ŌåÆ            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.Center

   342ŌåÆ
   343ŌåÆ            if (!isViewer && (followsViewer || viewerBlocks)) {

   349ŌåÆ            }
   350ŌåÆ        }
   351ŌåÆ
   352ŌåÆ        if (!isViewer) {
   353ŌåÆ            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   354ŌåÆ
   355ŌåÆ            if (viewerFollows) {
   356ŌåÆ                Button(
   357ŌåÆ                    onClick = onUnfollowClick,
   358ŌåÆ                    enabled = !isPerformingAction,
   359ŌåÆ                    colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(
   360ŌåÆ                        containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   361ŌåÆ                    ),
   362ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.width(200.dp)
   363ŌåÆ                ) {
   364ŌåÆ                    if (isPerformingAction) {
   365ŌåÆ                        CircularProgressIndicator(
   366ŌåÆ                            modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp),
   367ŌåÆ                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onError,
   368ŌåÆ                            strokeWidth = 2.dp
   369ŌåÆ                        )
   370ŌåÆ                    } else {
   371ŌåÆ                        Text(stringResource(R.string.unfollow))
   372ŌåÆ                    }
   373ŌåÆ                }
   374ŌåÆ            } else {
   375ŌåÆ                Button(
   376ŌåÆ                    onClick = onFollowClick,
   377ŌåÆ                    enabled = !isPerformingAction,
   378ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.width(200.dp)
   379ŌåÆ                ) {
   380ŌåÆ                    if (isPerformingAction) {
   381ŌåÆ                        CircularProgressIndicator(
   382ŌåÆ                            modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp),
   383ŌåÆ                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   384ŌåÆ                            strokeWidth = 2.dp
   385ŌåÆ                        )
   386ŌåÆ                    } else {
   387ŌåÆ                        Text(stringResource(R.string.follow))
   388ŌåÆ                    }
   389ŌåÆ                }
   390ŌåÆ            }
   391ŌåÆ        }
   392ŌåÆ
   393ŌåÆ        if (!bio.isNullOrBlank()) {
   394ŌåÆ            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   395ŌåÆ            HtmlContent(
   396ŌåÆ                html = bio,
   397ŌåÆ                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   398ŌåÆ                onMentionClick = onMentionClick
   399ŌåÆ            )
   400ŌåÆ        }
   401ŌåÆ    }
   402ŌåÆ}

    80ŌåÆ@Composable
    81ŌåÆfun ComposeScreen(
    82ŌåÆ    replyToId: String?,
    83ŌåÆ    quotedPostId: String? = null,
    84ŌåÆ    onPostSuccess: () -> Unit,
    85ŌåÆ    onNavigateBack: () -> Unit,
    86ŌåÆ    viewModel: ComposeViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    87ŌåÆ) {
    88ŌåÆ    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    89ŌåÆ    val snackbarHostState = remember { SnackbarHostState() }
    90ŌåÆ    var showVisibilityMenu by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    91ŌåÆ    var showPreview by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    92ŌåÆ
    93ŌåÆ    // Track TextFieldValue for cursor position
    94ŌåÆ    var textFieldValue by remember {
    95ŌåÆ        mutableStateOf(TextFieldValue(text = uiState.content))
    96ŌåÆ    }
    97ŌåÆ
    98ŌåÆ    // Track cursor and text field positions for popup placement
    99ŌåÆ    var cursorRect by remember { mutableStateOf(Rect.Zero) }
   100ŌåÆ    var textFieldBounds by remember { mutableStateOf(Rect.Zero) }
   101ŌåÆ    var textLayoutResult by remember { mutableStateOf<TextLayoutResult?>(null) }
   102ŌåÆ    val scrollState = rememberScrollState()
   103ŌåÆ    val density = LocalDensity.current
   104ŌåÆ    val popupHeight = with(density) { 200.dp.toPx() } // Estimated popup height
   105ŌåÆ
   106ŌåÆ    // Sync TextFieldValue with ViewModel state changes (e.g., when mention is selected)
   107ŌåÆ    LaunchedEffect(uiState.content, uiState.cursorPosition) {
   108ŌåÆ        if (textFieldValue.text != uiState.content) {
   109ŌåÆ            textFieldValue = TextFieldValue(
   110ŌåÆ                text = uiState.content,
   111ŌåÆ                selection = TextRange(uiState.cursorPosition)
   112ŌåÆ            )
   113ŌåÆ        }
   114ŌåÆ    }
   115ŌåÆ
   116ŌåÆ    LaunchedEffect(replyToId) {
   117ŌåÆ        replyToId?.let { viewModel.setReplyTarget(it) }
   118ŌåÆ    }
   119ŌåÆ
   120ŌåÆ    LaunchedEffect(quotedPostId) {
   121ŌåÆ        quotedPostId?.let { viewModel.setQuotedPost(it) }
   122ŌåÆ    }
   123ŌåÆ
   124ŌåÆ    LaunchedEffect(uiState.isPosted) {
   125ŌåÆ        if (uiState.isPosted) {
   126ŌåÆ            onPostSuccess()
   127ŌåÆ        }
   128ŌåÆ    }
   129ŌåÆ
   130ŌåÆ    LaunchedEffect(uiState.error) {
   131ŌåÆ        uiState.error?.let {
   132ŌåÆ            snackbarHostState.showSnackbar(it)
   133ŌåÆ            viewModel.clearError()
   134ŌåÆ        }
   135ŌåÆ    }
   136ŌåÆ
   137ŌåÆ    Scaffold(
   138ŌåÆ        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   139ŌåÆ        topBar = {
   140ŌåÆ            CompactTopBar(
   141ŌåÆ                title = when {
   142ŌåÆ                    replyToId != null -> stringResource(R.string.reply)
   143ŌåÆ                    quotedPostId != null -> stringResource(R.string.quoting)
   144ŌåÆ                    else -> stringResource(R.string.compose)
   145ŌåÆ                },
   146ŌåÆ                navigationIcon = {
   147ŌåÆ                    IconButton(onClick = onNavigateBack) {
   148ŌåÆ                        Icon(
   149ŌåÆ                            imageVector = Icons.Default.Close,
   150ŌåÆ                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.cancel)
   151ŌåÆ                        )
   152ŌåÆ                    }
   153ŌåÆ                },
   154ŌåÆ                actions = {
   155ŌåÆ                    Button(
   156ŌåÆ                        onClick = { viewModel.post() },
   157ŌåÆ                        enabled = uiState.content.isNotBlank() && !uiState.isPosting
   158ŌåÆ                    ) {
   159ŌåÆ                        Text(stringResource(R.string.post))
   160ŌåÆ                    }
   161ŌåÆ                }
   162ŌåÆ            )
   163ŌåÆ        },
   164ŌåÆ        snackbarHost = { SnackbarHost(snackbarHostState) }
   165ŌåÆ    ) { paddingValues ->
   166ŌåÆ        Column(
   167ŌåÆ            modifier = Modifier
   168ŌåÆ                .fillMaxSize()
   169ŌåÆ                .padding(paddingValues)
   170ŌåÆ                .padding(16.dp)
   171ŌåÆ        ) {
   172ŌåÆ            // Reply target preview
   173ŌåÆ            if (uiState.isLoadingReplyTarget) {
   174ŌåÆ                CircularProgressIndicator(
   175ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier
   176ŌåÆ                        .size(24.dp)
   177ŌåÆ                        .align(Alignment.CenterHorizontally)
   178ŌåÆ                )
   179ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   180ŌåÆ            } else if (uiState.replyTargetPost != null) {
   181ŌåÆ                Text(
   182ŌåÆ                    text = "${stringResource(R.string.replying_to)} @${uiState.replyTargetPost!!.actor.handle}",
   183ŌåÆ                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   184ŌåÆ                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   185ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 4.dp)
   186ŌåÆ                )
   187ŌåÆ                ReplyTargetPreview(
   188ŌåÆ                    post = uiState.replyTargetPost!!,
   189ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.alpha(0.6f)
   190ŌåÆ                )
   191ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   192ŌåÆ            }
   193ŌåÆ
   194ŌåÆ            // Quoted post preview
   195ŌåÆ            if (uiState.isLoadingQuotedPost) {
   196ŌåÆ                QuoteIndicator(isLoading = true)
   197ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   198ŌåÆ            } else if (uiState.quotedPost != null) {
   199ŌåÆ                QuoteIndicator(isLoading = false, post = uiState.quotedPost)
   200ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   201ŌåÆ            } else if (uiState.quotedPostLoadFailed) {
   202ŌåÆ                QuoteIndicator(isLoading = false, failed = true)
   203ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   204ŌåÆ            }
   205ŌåÆ
   206ŌåÆ            // Edit/Preview toggle
   207ŌåÆ            TabRow(
   208ŌåÆ                selectedTabIndex = if (showPreview) 1 else 0
   209ŌåÆ            ) {
   210ŌåÆ                Tab(
   211ŌåÆ                    selected = !showPreview,
   212ŌåÆ                    onClick = { showPreview = false },

   269ŌåÆ                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(4.dp),
   270ŌåÆ                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface,
   271ŌåÆ                    border = BorderStroke(1.dp, MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline)
   272ŌåÆ                ) {
   273ŌåÆ                    Box(

   275ŌåÆ                            .fillMaxSize()
   276ŌåÆ                            .padding(16.dp)

   278ŌåÆ                    ) {
   279ŌåÆ                        BasicTextField(

   281ŌåÆ                            onValueChange = { newValue: TextFieldValue ->
   282ŌåÆ                                textFieldValue = newValue

   287ŌåÆ                            },
   288ŌåÆ                            onTextLayout = { result: TextLayoutResult ->
   289ŌåÆ                                textLayoutResult = result
   290ŌåÆ                                // Update cursor position
   291ŌåÆ                                val cursorPos = textFieldValue.selection.start
   292ŌåÆ                                    .coerceIn(0, textFieldValue.text.length)
   293ŌåÆ                                cursorRect = if (textFieldValue.text.isNotEmpty() || cursorPos == 0) {
   294ŌåÆ                                    result.getCursorRect(cursorPos)

   298ŌåÆ                            },
   299ŌåÆ                            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),

   305ŌåÆ                            decorationBox = { innerTextField ->

   314ŌåÆ                                    innerTextField()

   320ŌåÆ
   321ŌåÆ                // Mention autocomplete popup
   322ŌåÆ                if (uiState.mentionSuggestions.isNotEmpty() || uiState.isLoadingMentions) {
   323ŌåÆ                    // Calculate cursor position accounting for padding and scroll
   324ŌåÆ                    val paddingPx = with(density) { 16.dp.toPx() }

   326ŌåÆ                    val cursorXInBox = cursorRect.left + paddingPx
   327ŌåÆ
   328ŌåÆ                    // Clamp to visible area
   329ŌåÆ                    val visibleCursorY = cursorYInBox.coerceIn(paddingPx, textFieldBounds.height - paddingPx)
   330ŌåÆ
   331ŌåÆ                    Popup(

   333ŌåÆ                        offset = IntOffset(

   348ŌåÆ                            },

   350ŌåÆ                        )
   351ŌåÆ                    }
   352ŌåÆ                }

   356ŌåÆ            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   357ŌåÆ
   358ŌåÆ            Row(

   361ŌåÆ            ) {

   103ŌåÆ    var showShareConfirmation by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   104ŌåÆ
   105ŌåÆ    // Navigate back after successful deletion
   106ŌåÆ    LaunchedEffect(uiState.isDeleted) {

   111ŌåÆ
   112ŌåÆ    // Reaction picker bottom sheet
   113ŌåÆ    if (uiState.showReactionPicker) {

   116ŌåÆ            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)

   118ŌåÆ            ReactionPicker(

   122ŌåÆ                onClose = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() }

   125ŌåÆ    }
   126ŌåÆ
   127ŌåÆ    // Shares bottom sheet
   128ŌåÆ    if (uiState.showSharesSheet) {
   129ŌåÆ        ModalBottomSheet(
   130ŌåÆ            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissSharesSheet() },
   131ŌåÆ            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
   132ŌåÆ        ) {
   133ŌåÆ            SharesSheet(
   134ŌåÆ                actors = uiState.shareActors,
   135ŌåÆ                isLoading = uiState.isLoadingShares,
   136ŌåÆ                onProfileClick = { handle ->

   138ŌåÆ                    onProfileClick(handle)
   139ŌåÆ                },
   140ŌåÆ                onClose = { viewModel.dismissSharesSheet() }
   141ŌåÆ            )
   142ŌåÆ        }
   143ŌåÆ    }
   144ŌåÆ
   145ŌåÆ    // Quotes bottom sheet
   146ŌåÆ    if (uiState.showQuotesSheet) {
   147ŌåÆ        ModalBottomSheet(
   148ŌåÆ            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet() },
   149ŌåÆ            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
   150ŌåÆ        ) {
   151ŌåÆ            QuotesSheet(
   152ŌåÆ                posts = uiState.quotePosts,
   153ŌåÆ                isLoading = uiState.isLoadingQuotes,
   154ŌåÆ                onPostClick = { id ->
   155ŌåÆ                    viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet()
   156ŌåÆ                    onPostClick(id)
   157ŌåÆ                },
   158ŌåÆ                onClose = { viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet() }
   159ŌåÆ            )
   160ŌåÆ        }
   161ŌåÆ    }
   162ŌåÆ
   163ŌåÆ    if (showDeleteConfirmation) {
   164ŌåÆ        AlertDialog(
   165ŌåÆ            onDismissRequest = { showDeleteConfirmation = false },
   166ŌåÆ            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.delete_post_confirm_title)) },
   167ŌåÆ            text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.delete_post_confirm)) },
   168ŌåÆ            confirmButton = {

   171ŌåÆ                        showDeleteConfirmation = false
   172ŌåÆ                        viewModel.deletePost()
   173ŌåÆ                    }
   174ŌåÆ                ) {
   175ŌåÆ                    Text(
   176ŌåÆ                        stringResource(R.string.delete_post),
   177ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   178ŌåÆ                    )
   179ŌåÆ                }
   180ŌåÆ            },
   181ŌåÆ            dismissButton = {
   182ŌåÆ                TextButton(onClick = { showDeleteConfirmation = false }) {
   183ŌåÆ                    Text(stringResource(R.string.cancel))
   184ŌåÆ                }
   185ŌåÆ            }
   186ŌåÆ        )
   187ŌåÆ    }
   188ŌåÆ
   189ŌåÆ    if (showShareConfirmation) {
   190ŌåÆ        val hasShared = uiState.post?.viewerHasShared == true
   191ŌåÆ        AlertDialog(
   192ŌåÆ            onDismissRequest = { showShareConfirmation = false },
   193ŌåÆ            title = {
   194ŌåÆ                Text(stringResource(if (hasShared) R.string.unshare_confirm_title else R.string.share_confirm_title))
   195ŌåÆ            },
   196ŌåÆ            confirmButton = {
   197ŌåÆ                TextButton(
   198ŌåÆ                    onClick = {
   199ŌåÆ                        showShareConfirmation = false
   200ŌåÆ                        if (hasShared) viewModel.unsharePost() else viewModel.sharePost()
   201ŌåÆ                    }
   202ŌåÆ                ) {
   203ŌåÆ                    Text(stringResource(if (hasShared) R.string.unshare_confirm_action else R.string.share_confirm_action))
   204ŌåÆ                }
   205ŌåÆ            },
   206ŌåÆ            dismissButton = {
   207ŌåÆ                TextButton(onClick = { showShareConfirmation = false }) {
   208ŌåÆ                    Text(stringResource(R.string.cancel))
   209ŌåÆ                }
   210ŌåÆ            }
   211ŌåÆ        )
   212ŌåÆ    }
   213ŌåÆ
   214ŌåÆ    if (uiState.deleteError != null) {
   215ŌåÆ        AlertDialog(
   216ŌåÆ            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissDeleteError() },
   217ŌåÆ            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.action_error)) },
   218ŌåÆ            text = { Text(uiState.deleteError ?: "") },
   219ŌåÆ            confirmButton = {
   220ŌåÆ                TextButton(onClick = { viewModel.dismissDeleteError() }) {
   221ŌåÆ                    Text(stringResource(R.string.ok))
   222ŌåÆ                }
   223ŌåÆ            }
   224ŌåÆ        )
   225ŌåÆ    }
   226ŌåÆ
   227ŌåÆ    Scaffold(
   228ŌåÆ        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   229ŌåÆ        topBar = {
   230ŌåÆ            CompactTopBar(
   231ŌåÆ                title = if (uiState.post?.typename == "Article") "Article" else "Post",
   232ŌåÆ                navigationIcon = {
   233ŌåÆ                    IconButton(onClick = onNavigateBack) {
   234ŌåÆ                        Icon(
   235ŌåÆ                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack,
   236ŌåÆ                            contentDescription = "Back"
   237ŌåÆ                        )
   238ŌåÆ                    }
   239ŌåÆ                },
   240ŌåÆ                actions = {
   241ŌåÆ                    if (uiState.canDelete) {
   242ŌåÆ                        PostDetailActionMenu(
   243ŌåÆ                            isDeleting = uiState.isDeleting,
   244ŌåÆ                            onDelete = {
   245ŌåÆ                                if (confirmBeforeDelete) {
   246ŌåÆ                                    showDeleteConfirmation = true
   247ŌåÆ                                } else {
   248ŌåÆ                                    viewModel.deletePost()
   249ŌåÆ                                }
   250ŌåÆ                            }
   251ŌåÆ                        )
   252ŌåÆ                    }
   253ŌåÆ                }
   254ŌåÆ            )
   255ŌåÆ        },
   256ŌåÆ        floatingActionButton = {
   257ŌåÆ            if (uiState.post != null && isLoggedIn) {
   258ŌåÆ                FloatingActionButton(
   259ŌåÆ                    onClick = { onReplyClick(postId) }
   260ŌåÆ                ) {
   261ŌåÆ                    Icon(
   262ŌåÆ                        imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,
   263ŌåÆ                        contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reply)
   264ŌåÆ                    )
   265ŌåÆ                }
   266ŌåÆ            }
   267ŌåÆ        }
   268ŌåÆ    ) { paddingValues ->
   269ŌåÆ        Box(
   270ŌåÆ            modifier = Modifier
   271ŌåÆ                .fillMaxSize()
   272ŌåÆ                .padding(paddingValues)
   273ŌåÆ        ) {
   274ŌåÆ            when {
   275ŌåÆ                uiState.isLoading -> {
   276ŌåÆ                    FullScreenLoading()
   277ŌåÆ                }
   278ŌåÆ                uiState.error != null -> {
   279ŌåÆ                    ErrorMessage(
   280ŌåÆ                        message = uiState.error ?: stringResource(R.string.error_generic),
   281ŌåÆ                        onRetry = { viewModel.loadPost(postId) }
   282ŌåÆ                    )
   283ŌåÆ                }
   284ŌåÆ                uiState.post != null -> {
   285ŌåÆ                    PullToRefreshBox(
   286ŌåÆ                        isRefreshing = uiState.isRefreshing,
   287ŌåÆ                        onRefresh = { viewModel.refresh() }
   288ŌåÆ                    ) {
   289ŌåÆ                        PostDetailContent(
   290ŌåÆ                            post = uiState.post!!,
   291ŌåÆ                            reactionGroups = uiState.reactionGroups,
   292ŌåÆ                            replies = uiState.replies,
   293ŌåÆ                            hasMoreReplies = uiState.hasMoreReplies,
   294ŌåÆ                            isLoadingMoreReplies = uiState.isLoadingMoreReplies,
   295ŌåÆ                            onLoadMoreReplies = { viewModel.loadMoreReplies() },
   296ŌåÆ                            onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
   297ŌåÆ                            onPostClick = onPostClick,
   298ŌåÆ                            onReplyClick = { onReplyClick(postId) },
   299ŌåÆ                            onShareClick = {
   300ŌåÆ                                if (confirmBeforeShare) {
   301ŌåÆ                                    showShareConfirmation = true
   302ŌåÆ                                } else {
   303ŌåÆ                                    if (uiState.post!!.viewerHasShared) {
   304ŌåÆ                                        viewModel.unsharePost()
   305ŌåÆ                                    } else {
   306ŌåÆ                                        viewModel.sharePost()
   307ŌåÆ                                    }
   308ŌåÆ                                }
   309ŌåÆ                            },
   310ŌåÆ                            onReactionClick = { emoji -> viewModel.toggleReaction(emoji) },
   311ŌåÆ                            onReactionPickerClick = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() },
   312ŌåÆ                            onQuoteClick = { onQuoteClick(postId) },
   313ŌåÆ                            onSharesClick = { viewModel.showSharesSheet() },
   314ŌåÆ                            onQuotesClick = { viewModel.showQuotesSheet() },
   315ŌåÆ                            onExternalShareClick = {
   316ŌåÆ                                val shareUrl = uiState.post?.url
   317ŌåÆ                                    ?: uiState.post?.iri
   318ŌåÆ                                if (shareUrl != null) {
   319ŌåÆ                                    val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   320ŌåÆ                                        action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   321ŌåÆ                                        putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, shareUrl)
   322ŌåÆ                                        type = "text/plain"
   323ŌåÆ                                    }
   324ŌåÆ                                    context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   325ŌåÆ                                }
   326ŌåÆ                            }
   327ŌåÆ                        )
   328ŌåÆ                    }
   329ŌåÆ                }
   330ŌåÆ            }
   331ŌåÆ        }
   332ŌåÆ    }
   333ŌåÆ}

   378ŌåÆ@Composable
   379ŌåÆprivate fun PostDetailContent(
   380ŌåÆ    post: Post,
   381ŌåÆ    reactionGroups: List<ReactionGroup>,
   382ŌåÆ    replies: List<Post>,
   383ŌåÆ    hasMoreReplies: Boolean = false,
   384ŌåÆ    isLoadingMoreReplies: Boolean = false,
   385ŌåÆ    onLoadMoreReplies: () -> Unit = {},
   386ŌåÆ    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
   387ŌåÆ    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
   388ŌåÆ    onShareClick: () -> Unit,
   389ŌåÆ    onReplyClick: () -> Unit,
   390ŌåÆ    onReactionClick: (String) -> Unit,
   391ŌåÆ    onReactionPickerClick: () -> Unit,
   392ŌåÆ    onQuoteClick: () -> Unit,
   393ŌåÆ    onSharesClick: () -> Unit,
   394ŌåÆ    onQuotesClick: () -> Unit,
   395ŌåÆ    onExternalShareClick: () -> Unit
   396ŌåÆ) {
   397ŌåÆ    val dateFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("MMM d, yyyy 'at' h:mm a")
   398ŌåÆ        .withZone(ZoneId.systemDefault())
   399ŌåÆ
   400ŌåÆ    LazyColumn {
   401ŌåÆ        item {
   402ŌåÆ            Column(
   403ŌåÆ                modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)
   404ŌåÆ            ) {
   405ŌåÆ                // Reply target preview
   406ŌåÆ                if (post.replyTarget != null) {
   407ŌåÆ                    ReplyTargetPreview(
   408ŌåÆ                        post = post.replyTarget!!,
   409ŌåÆ                        onClick = { onPostClick(post.replyTarget!!.id) },
   410ŌåÆ                        onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   411ŌåÆ                    )
   412ŌåÆ
   413ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   414ŌåÆ
   415ŌåÆ                    Row(
   416ŌåÆ                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   417ŌåÆ                        modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 4.dp)
   418ŌåÆ                    ) {
   419ŌåÆ                        Icon(
   420ŌåÆ                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,
   421ŌåÆ                            contentDescription = null,
   422ŌåÆ                            modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp),
   423ŌåÆ                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   424ŌåÆ                        )
   425ŌåÆ                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   426ŌåÆ                        Text(
   427ŌåÆ                            text = "${stringResource(R.string.replying_to)} @${post.replyTarget!!.actor.handle}",
   428ŌåÆ                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   429ŌåÆ                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   430ŌåÆ                        )
   431ŌåÆ                    }
   432ŌåÆ
   433ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   434ŌåÆ                    HorizontalDivider()
   435ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   436ŌåÆ                }
   437ŌåÆ
   438ŌåÆ                Row(
   439ŌåÆ                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   440ŌåÆ                ) {
   441ŌåÆ                    AsyncImage(
   442ŌåÆ                        model = post.actor.avatarUrl,
   443ŌåÆ                        contentDescription = null,
   444ŌåÆ                        modifier = Modifier
   445ŌåÆ                            .size(48.dp)
   446ŌåÆ                            .clip(CircleShape)
   447ŌåÆ                            .clickable { onProfileClick(post.actor.handle) },
   448ŌåÆ                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   449ŌåÆ                    )
   450ŌåÆ
   451ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   452ŌåÆ
   453ŌåÆ                    Column(
   454ŌåÆ                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onProfileClick(post.actor.handle) }
   455ŌåÆ                    ) {
   456ŌåÆ                        Text(
   457ŌåÆ                            text = post.actor.name ?: post.actor.handle,
   458ŌåÆ                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   459ŌåÆ                            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   460ŌåÆ                        )
   461ŌåÆ                        Text(
   462ŌåÆ                            text = "@${post.actor.handle}",
   463ŌåÆ                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   464ŌåÆ                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   465ŌåÆ                        )
   466ŌåÆ                    }
   467ŌåÆ                }
   468ŌåÆ
   469ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   470ŌåÆ
   471ŌåÆ                val isArticle = post.typename == "Article"
   472ŌåÆ
   473ŌåÆ                post.name?.let { title ->
   474ŌåÆ                    Text(
   475ŌåÆ                        text = title,
   476ŌåÆ                        style = if (isArticle) MaterialTheme.typography.headlineLarge else MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
   477ŌåÆ                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
   478ŌåÆ                    )
   479ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(if (isArticle) 12.dp else 8.dp))
   480ŌåÆ                    if (isArticle) {
   481ŌåÆ                        HorizontalDivider()
   482ŌåÆ                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   483ŌåÆ                    }
   484ŌåÆ                }
   485ŌåÆ
   486ŌåÆ                HtmlContent(
   487ŌåÆ                    html = post.content,
   488ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   489ŌåÆ                    onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   490ŌåÆ                )
   491ŌåÆ
   492ŌåÆ                if (post.media.isNotEmpty()) {
   493ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   494ŌåÆ                    MediaGrid(media = post.media)
   495ŌåÆ                }
   496ŌåÆ
   497ŌåÆ                if (post.quotedPost != null) {
   498ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   499ŌåÆ                    QuotedPostPreview(
   500ŌåÆ                        post = post.quotedPost!!,
   501ŌåÆ                        onClick = { onPostClick(post.quotedPost!!.id) },
   502ŌåÆ                        onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   503ŌåÆ                    )
   504ŌåÆ                }
   505ŌåÆ
   506ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   507ŌåÆ
   508ŌåÆ                Row(
   509ŌåÆ                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   510ŌåÆ                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   511ŌåÆ                ) {
   512ŌåÆ                    Text(
   513ŌåÆ                        text = dateFormatter.format(post.published),
   514ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   515ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   516ŌåÆ                    )
   517ŌåÆ
   518ŌåÆ                    if (post.visibility != pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.PUBLIC) {
   519ŌåÆ                        Text(
   520ŌåÆ                            text = "\u00B7",
   521ŌåÆ                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   522ŌåÆ                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   523ŌåÆ                        )
   524ŌåÆ                        Icon(
   525ŌåÆ                            imageVector = when (post.visibility) {
   526ŌåÆ                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> Icons.Outlined.Lock
   527ŌåÆ                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> Icons.Outlined.Group
   528ŌåÆ                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.DIRECT -> Icons.Outlined.Lock
   529ŌåÆ                                else -> Icons.Filled.Public
   530ŌåÆ                            },
   531ŌåÆ                            contentDescription = when (post.visibility) {
   532ŌåÆ                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> "Unlisted"
   533ŌåÆ                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> "Followers only"
   534ŌåÆ                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.DIRECT -> "Direct"
   535ŌåÆ                                else -> "Public"
   536ŌåÆ                            },
   537ŌåÆ                            modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp),
   538ŌåÆ                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   539ŌåÆ                        )
   540ŌåÆ                    }
   541ŌåÆ                }
   542ŌåÆ
   543ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   544ŌåÆ
   545ŌåÆ                Row(
   546ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   547ŌåÆ                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(16.dp)
   548ŌåÆ                ) {
   549ŌåÆ                    Text(
   550ŌåÆ                        text = "${post.engagementStats.replies} ${stringResource(R.string.replies)}",
   551ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   552ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   553ŌåÆ                    )
   554ŌåÆ                    Text(
   555ŌåÆ                        text = "${post.engagementStats.shares} ${stringResource(R.string.shares)}",
   556ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   557ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   558ŌåÆ                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onSharesClick() }
   559ŌåÆ                    )
   560ŌåÆ                    Text(
   561ŌåÆ                        text = "${post.engagementStats.reactions} ${stringResource(R.string.reactions)}",
   562ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   563ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   564ŌåÆ                    )
   565ŌåÆ                    Text(
   566ŌåÆ                        text = "${post.engagementStats.quotes} ${stringResource(R.string.quotes)}",
   567ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   568ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   569ŌåÆ                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onQuotesClick() }
   570ŌåÆ                    )
   571ŌåÆ                }
   572ŌåÆ
   573ŌåÆ                if (reactionGroups.isNotEmpty()) {
   574ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   575ŌåÆ                    Row {
   576ŌåÆ                        reactionGroups.forEach { group ->
   577ŌåÆ                            Card(
   578ŌåÆ                                onClick = {
   579ŌåÆ                                    group.emoji?.let { onReactionClick(it) }

    43ŌåÆ@Composable
    44ŌåÆfun SignInScreen(
    45ŌåÆ    deepLinkToken: String? = null,
    46ŌåÆ    deepLinkCode: String? = null,
    47ŌåÆ    onSignInSuccess: () -> Unit,
    48ŌåÆ    onNavigateBack: () -> Unit,
    49ŌåÆ    viewModel: SignInViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    50ŌåÆ) {
    51ŌåÆ    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    52ŌåÆ    val snackbarHostState = remember { SnackbarHostState() }
    53ŌåÆ    val keyboardController = LocalSoftwareKeyboardController.current
    54ŌåÆ
    55ŌåÆ    LaunchedEffect(deepLinkToken, deepLinkCode) {
    56ŌåÆ        if (deepLinkToken != null && deepLinkCode != null) {
    57ŌåÆ            viewModel.verifyWithDeepLink(deepLinkToken, deepLinkCode)
    58ŌåÆ        }
    59ŌåÆ    }
    60ŌåÆ
    61ŌåÆ    LaunchedEffect(uiState.isSignedIn) {
    62ŌåÆ        if (uiState.isSignedIn) {
    63ŌåÆ            onSignInSuccess()
    64ŌåÆ        }
    65ŌåÆ    }
    66ŌåÆ
    67ŌåÆ    LaunchedEffect(uiState.error) {
    68ŌåÆ        uiState.error?.let {
    69ŌåÆ            snackbarHostState.showSnackbar(it)
    70ŌåÆ            viewModel.clearError()
    71ŌåÆ        }
    72ŌåÆ    }
    73ŌåÆ
    74ŌåÆ    Scaffold(
    75ŌåÆ        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
    76ŌåÆ        topBar = {
    77ŌåÆ            CompactTopBar(
    78ŌåÆ                title = stringResource(R.string.sign_in),
    79ŌåÆ                navigationIcon = {

    81ŌåÆ                        Icon(
    82ŌåÆ                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack,
    83ŌåÆ                            contentDescription = "Back"

    85ŌåÆ                    }
    86ŌåÆ                }
    87ŌåÆ            )
    88ŌåÆ        },
    89ŌåÆ        snackbarHost = { SnackbarHost(snackbarHostState) }
    90ŌåÆ    ) { paddingValues ->
    91ŌåÆ        Column(
    92ŌåÆ            modifier = Modifier
    93ŌåÆ                .fillMaxSize()
    94ŌåÆ                .padding(paddingValues)
    95ŌåÆ                .padding(horizontal = 32.dp),
    96ŌåÆ            horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
    97ŌåÆ            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.Center
    98ŌåÆ        ) {
    99ŌåÆ            if (uiState.step == SignInStep.USERNAME) {
   100ŌåÆ                UsernameStep(
   101ŌåÆ                    username = uiState.username,
   102ŌåÆ                    onUsernameChange = viewModel::updateUsername,
   103ŌåÆ                    onSubmit = {
   104ŌåÆ                        keyboardController?.hide()
   105ŌåÆ                        viewModel.sendVerificationCode()
   106ŌåÆ                    },
   107ŌåÆ                    isLoading = uiState.isLoading
   108ŌåÆ                )
   109ŌåÆ            } else {
   110ŌåÆ                VerificationStep(
   111ŌåÆ                    code = uiState.code,
   112ŌåÆ                    onCodeChange = viewModel::updateCode,
   113ŌåÆ                    onSubmit = {
   114ŌåÆ                        keyboardController?.hide()
   115ŌåÆ                        viewModel.verifyCode()
   116ŌåÆ                    },
   117ŌåÆ                    onBack = viewModel::goBackToUsername,
   118ŌåÆ                    isLoading = uiState.isLoading
   119ŌåÆ                )
   120ŌåÆ            }
   121ŌåÆ        }
   122ŌåÆ    }
   123ŌåÆ}

   125ŌåÆ@Composable

### SUMMARY OF KEY FINDINGS

**Global Theme Colors Used Throughout:**
- Primary: `#262626` (light mode) / `#FAFAFA` (dark mode)
- Surface/Background: `#FFFFFF` (light) / `#262626` (dark)
- Accent colors: Blues (`#2563EB`, `#60A5FA`), reds for errors
- Notification-specific colors: 6 distinct colors for different notification types

**Material3 Components Most Used:**
1. `Scaffold` - Every screen
2. `Text` - Ubiquitous
3. `Icon` / `IconButton` - Throughout
4. `Card` / `Surface` - Content containers
5. `NavigationBar` / `Tab` - Navigation
6. `FloatingActionButton` - Call-to-action
7. `MaterialTheme` references - Color and typography

**Spacing System:**
- Consistent use of 4dp base unit (xs through xxl)
- Most common: 12.dp, 16.dp, 8.dp for padding/spacing

**Typography Usage:**
- `titleMedium` - Section headers
- `bodyMedium` - Main content
- `bodySmall` - Secondary text
- `labelSmall` - Badges, counts
- `headlineSmall` / `headlineLarge` - Major headings

**Design System Observations:**
- No custom Material Design overrides
- Clean, minimal top bar design (CompactTopBar at 48.dp)
- Heavy use of Material3 defaults
- Consistent color theming (light/dark modes fully implemented)
- Navigation via bottom bar + detail screens as modals/overlays

- Any imports from androidx.compose.material3

This information is critical for planning exactly what needs to change in each file.

### SUMMARY OF KEY FINDINGS

**Global Theme Colors Used Throughout:**
- Primary: `#262626` (light mode) / `#FAFAFA` (dark mode)
- Surface/Background: `#FFFFFF` (light) / `#262626` (dark)
- Accent colors: Blues (`#2563EB`, `#60A5FA`), reds for errors
- Notification-specific colors: 6 distinct colors for different notification types

**Material3 Components Most Used:**
1. `Scaffold` - Every screen
2. `Text` - Ubiquitous
3. `Icon` / `IconButton` - Throughout
4. `Card` / `Surface` - Content containers
5. `NavigationBar` / `Tab` - Navigation
6. `FloatingActionButton` - Call-to-action
7. `MaterialTheme` references - Color and typography

**Spacing System:**
- Consistent use of 4dp base unit (xs through xxl)
- Most common: 12.dp, 16.dp, 8.dp for padding/spacing

**Typography Usage:**
- `titleMedium` - Section headers
- `bodyMedium` - Main content
- `bodySmall` - Secondary text
- `labelSmall` - Badges, counts
- `headlineSmall` / `headlineLarge` - Major headings

**Design System Observations:**
- No custom Material Design overrides
- Clean, minimal top bar design (CompactTopBar at 48.dp)
- Heavy use of Material3 defaults
- Consistent color theming (light/dark modes fully implemented)
- Navigation via bottom bar + detail screens as modals/overlays

content.content:
1ŌåÆ# Hackers'Pub Android ŌĆö Full UI Redesign
     2ŌåÆ
     3ŌåÆ**Date:** 2026-03-19
     4ŌåÆ**Status:** Approved
     5ŌåÆ**Goal:** Replace the default Material Design 3 styling with a custom, Ivory-inspired design system that gives Hackers'Pub a distinctive, editorial identity across both light and dark themes.
     6ŌåÆ
     7ŌåÆ## Design Philosophy
     8ŌåÆ
     9ŌåÆPlatform-agnostic custom identity ŌĆö not Material, not iOS-native, but a unique Hackers'Pub look inspired by Ivory (Tapbots' Mastodon client). Near-monochrome palette with Deep Stone accent. Typography-first: font weight carries emphasis rather than color. Semantic colors (red, green) reserved for interactive state changes, giving them maximum impact against the neutral base.
    10ŌåÆ
    11ŌåÆ## Design System
    12ŌåÆ
    13ŌåÆ### Color Palette
    14ŌåÆ
    15ŌåÆ#### Light Theme
    16ŌåÆ| Token | Value | Usage |
    17ŌåÆ|-------|-------|-------|
    18ŌåÆ| `background` | `#FFFFFF` | Screen background |
    19ŌåÆ| `surface` | `#F2F2F7` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
    20ŌåÆ| `textPrimary` | `#1C1C1E` | Headlines, names, primary content |
    21ŌåÆ| `textBody` | `#3A3A3C` | Body text, post content |
    22ŌåÆ| `textSecondary` | `#AEAEB2` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tab labels |
    23ŌåÆ| `accent` | `#44403C` | Active tab icons/labels, links (via weight), follow buttons, interactive elements |
    24ŌåÆ| `accentMuted` | `#78716C` | Hashtags, relationship tags background at 10% opacity |
    25ŌåÆ| `divider` | `#F2F2F7` | Hairline separators between posts |
    26ŌåÆ| `buttonOutline` | `#D6D3D1` | Secondary button borders |
    27ŌåÆ| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Heart reactions, error states, notification dots |
    28ŌåÆ| `share` | `#34D399` | Share/repost active state |
    29ŌåÆ
    30ŌåÆ#### Dark Theme
    31ŌåÆ| Token | Value | Usage |
    32ŌåÆ|-------|-------|-------|
    33ŌåÆ| `background` | `#171717` | Screen background |
    34ŌåÆ| `surface` | `#262626` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
    35ŌåÆ| `textPrimary` | `#FAFAFA` | Headlines, names |
    36ŌåÆ| `textBody` | `#D4D4D4` | Body text |
    37ŌåÆ| `textSecondary` | `#737373` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tabs |
    38ŌåÆ| `accent` | `#D6D3D1` | Active tab icons/labels, interactive elements (inverted stone) |
    39ŌåÆ| `accentMuted` | `#A8A29E` | Hashtags, tags |
    40ŌåÆ| `divider` | `#262626` | Hairline separators |
    41ŌåÆ| `buttonOutline` | `#525252` | Secondary button borders |
    42ŌåÆ| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Same as light |
    43ŌåÆ| `share` | `#34D399` | Same as light |
    44ŌåÆ
    45ŌåÆ### Typography
    46ŌåÆ
    47ŌåÆSystem default (Roboto on Android). No custom fonts ŌĆö emphasis via weight hierarchy only.
    48ŌåÆ
    49ŌåÆ| Style | Size | Weight | Usage |
    50ŌåÆ|-------|------|--------|-------|
    51ŌåÆ| `titleLarge` | 22sp | 700 (Bold) | Screen titles (Timeline, Explore, etc.) |
    52ŌåÆ| `titleMedium` | 20sp | 700 (Bold) | Profile name |
    53ŌåÆ| `bodyLargeSemiBold` | 15sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Author names in post cards |
    54ŌåÆ| `bodyLarge` | 15sp | 400 (Regular) | Post content, bio text |
    55ŌåÆ| `bodyMedium` | 14sp | 400 (Regular) | Stats labels, settings items |
    56ŌåÆ| `labelMedium` | 13sp | 400 (Regular) | Handles, timestamps, engagement counts |
    57ŌåÆ| `labelSmall` | 12sp | 500 (Medium) | Hashtags, relationship tags |
    58ŌåÆ| `caption` | 11sp | 500 (Medium) | Tag pills, repost indicators |
    59ŌåÆ| `tabLabel` | 10sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Bottom tab labels |
    60ŌåÆ
    61ŌåÆ**Letter spacing:** -0.3sp on `titleLarge` for tighter headline feel. Default elsewhere.
    62ŌåÆ
    63ŌåÆ### Spacing
    64ŌåÆ
    65ŌåÆBase unit: 4dp. Consistent throughout.
    66ŌåÆ
    67ŌåÆ| Token | Value | Usage |
    68ŌåÆ|-------|-------|-------|
    69ŌåÆ| `xs` | 4dp | Fine spacing (between name and handle) |
    70ŌåÆ| `sm` | 8dp | Compact spacing (engagement icon gaps) |
    71ŌåÆ| `md` | 12dp | Element spacing (avatar-to-text gap, between post sections) |
    72ŌåÆ| `lg` | 16dp | Standard padding (screen edges, post padding) |
    73ŌåÆ| `xl` | 24dp | Section spacing (stats row gaps) |
    74ŌåÆ| `xxl` | 32dp | Large section spacing (sign-in margins) |
    75ŌåÆ
    76ŌåÆ### Shapes
    77ŌåÆ
    78ŌåÆ| Element | Radius | Size |
    79ŌåÆ|---------|--------|------|
    80ŌåÆ| Avatar (timeline) | Circle | 42dp |
    81ŌåÆ| Avatar (profile) | Circle | 80dp |
    82ŌåÆ| Avatar (repost indicator) | Circle | 16dp |
    83ŌåÆ| Pill buttons (Follow, etc.) | 20dp | Height ~36dp |
    84ŌåÆ| Icon buttons (compose, etc.) | Circle | 28dp |

    88ŌåÆNo card elevation or shadows anywhere. Post separation via hairline dividers only.
    89ŌåÆ
    90ŌåÆ### Icons

    93ŌåÆ
    94ŌåÆ- Active state: filled icon with accent color

    96ŌåÆ- Engagement active states per action:
    97ŌåÆ  - Reply: `accent` color when active (user has replied)

    99ŌåÆ  - Reaction/Heart: `reaction` red (`#E8453C`) when active, filled
   100ŌåÆ  - Quote: `accent` color when active (user has quoted)
   101ŌåÆ  - External share: no active state, always `textSecondary`
   102ŌåÆ
   103ŌåÆ### Bottom Navigation Bar
   104ŌåÆ

   115ŌåÆ
   116ŌåÆ### Media Grid

   121ŌåÆ- Three+ images: 2x2 grid, 4dp gaps

   124ŌåÆ## Screen Specifications
   125ŌåÆ
   126ŌåÆ### Timeline Screen

   164ŌåÆ
   165ŌåÆ**Engagement Stats Row:**

   169ŌåÆ- Tappable ŌĆö opens bottom sheet with actor list
   170ŌåÆ

   173ŌåÆ- Full-width row with evenly spaced action icons: Reply, Share, React, Quote, Delete (owner only), External Share
   174ŌåÆ- Icons: 20dp, `textSecondary` by default, semantic colors when active

   176ŌåÆ
   177ŌåÆ**Reaction Groups:**
   178ŌåÆ- Below action bar if reactions exist
   179ŌåÆ- Horizontal scrollable row of emoji pills
   180ŌåÆ- Each pill: emoji + count, `surface` background, 16dp border-radius, 8dp horizontal padding
   181ŌåÆ- Active (user reacted): `accent` at 10% opacity background, `accent` text
   182ŌåÆ
   183ŌåÆ**Reaction Picker (bottom sheet):**
   184ŌåÆ- Modal bottom sheet, `background` color
   185ŌåÆ- Grid of available emoji reactions, 7 columns
   186ŌåÆ- Each cell: 40dp, 8dp border-radius
   187ŌåÆ- Active reactions highlighted with `accent` at 15% opacity background
   188ŌåÆ- Close button top-right
   189ŌåÆ
   190ŌåÆ**Shares/Quotes List (bottom sheet):**
   191ŌåÆ- Modal bottom sheet with navigation title ("Shares" or "Quotes")
   192ŌåÆ- List of actor rows: 40dp circular avatar, name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`), handle (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`)
   193ŌåÆ- "Load more" button at bottom if paginated
   194ŌåÆ- Empty state: centered "No shares yet" / "No quotes yet"
   195ŌåÆ
   196ŌåÆ**Reply Thread:**
   197ŌåÆ- Below the main post, same post card format as timeline

   199ŌåÆ- Reply FAB: 56dp circle, `accent` background, white reply icon, bottom-right positioned, 16dp margin from edges

   202ŌåÆ

   228ŌåÆ- Notification type icons: all use `textSecondary` color (monochrome, consistent with design philosophy ŌĆö no per-type color coding)
   229ŌåÆ- Hairline dividers between items

   232ŌåÆ

   234ŌåÆ
