   241ŌåÆ**Content:** Same post list as timeline, scoped to local or global feed
   242ŌåÆ
   243ŌåÆ### Search Screen
   244ŌåÆ
   245ŌåÆ**Header:** Large bold title "Search"
   246ŌåÆ
   247ŌåÆ**Search Bar:** Rounded text field below header, `surface` background, 12dp border-radius, search icon left-aligned, 16dp horizontal margin
   248ŌåÆ
   249ŌåÆ**Results:** Actor rows (avatar + name + handle) and post cards, depending on result type
   250ŌåÆ
   251ŌåÆ### Compose Screen
   252ŌåÆ
   253ŌåÆ**Header:** Navigation bar style
   254ŌåÆ- Left: "Cancel" text button (`accent` color)
   255ŌåÆ- Right: "Post" pill button (`accent` background, white text), disabled state at 40% opacity
   256ŌåÆ- Title: "Compose", "Reply", or "Quoting" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, 15sp/600)
   257ŌåÆ
   258ŌåÆ**Content:**
   259ŌåÆ- Reply indicator (if replying): "Replying to @handle" in `textSecondary`, 13sp
   260ŌåÆ- Text editor: full-width, 15sp, placeholder "What's on your mind?"
   261ŌåÆ- Markdown support with live preview toggle
   262ŌåÆ
   263ŌåÆ**Bottom toolbar:** Visibility selector, language picker ŌĆö subtle icons in `textSecondary`
   264ŌåÆ
   265ŌåÆ### Settings Screen
   266ŌåÆ
   267ŌåÆ**Header:** Large bold title "Settings"
   268ŌåÆ
   269ŌåÆ**Content:** Grouped list sections with section headers (13sp/500, uppercase, `textSecondary`)
   270ŌåÆ
   271ŌåÆSections:
   272ŌåÆ- **App Info:** Logo (80dp, 16dp corner radius), app name, version
   273ŌåÆ- **Typography:** Font size slider (0.75xŌĆō2.0x)
   274ŌåÆ- **Timeline:** Markdown truncation options
   275ŌåÆ- **Engagement:** Confirmation toggles
   276ŌåÆ- **Links:** In-app browser toggle
   277ŌåÆ- **About:** Open source licenses, links
   278ŌåÆ
   279ŌåÆEach row: standard list item, 16dp padding, `textPrimary` label, `textSecondary` value/description. Hairline dividers between rows.
   280ŌåÆ
   281ŌåÆ### Sign-In Screen
   282ŌåÆ
   283ŌåÆ**Layout:** Centered vertically
   284ŌåÆ
   285ŌåÆ- Logo: 120dp, centered
   286ŌåÆ- Title: "Hackers' Pub" (22sp/700), 16dp below logo
   287ŌåÆ- Subtitle: "Sign in to continue" (14sp, `textSecondary`), 4dp below title
   288ŌåÆ- Username field: rounded border (12dp radius), `surface` background, 32dp below subtitle, 32dp horizontal margin
   289ŌåÆ- Verification code field: same style (appears after username submission)
   290ŌåÆ- Primary button: pill shape, `accent` background, white text, full width within margins
   291ŌåÆ- Error text: `error` color, 13sp, below button
   292ŌåÆ
   293ŌåÆ## Migration Strategy
   294ŌåÆ
   295ŌåÆThis redesign replaces the existing Material Design 3 theming while keeping the same Compose architecture. Changes are purely in the UI layer:
   296ŌåÆ
   297ŌåÆ1. **Theme.kt** ŌĆö Replace M3 color scheme with custom color tokens
   298ŌåÆ2. **Spacing.kt** ŌĆö Already exists, minor adjustments to values
   299ŌåÆ3. **New: Typography.kt** ŌĆö Define custom text styles (not M3 Typography)
   300ŌåÆ4. **New: Shapes.kt** ŌĆö Define shape tokens
   301ŌåÆ5. **New: Icons.kt** ŌĆö Custom icon set (if switching from Material Icons to Feather/Lucide)
   302ŌåÆ6. **Each screen** ŌĆö Replace M3 components (TopAppBar, FloatingActionButton, etc.) with custom composables
   303ŌåÆ7. **PostCard** ŌĆö Restyle engagement bar, remove card elevation, update spacing
   304ŌåÆ8. **CompactTopBar** ŌĆö Replace with new LargeTitle header composable
   305ŌåÆ
   306ŌåÆNo changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. Pure visual transformation.
   307ŌåÆ
   308ŌåÆ**Note on profile stats:** The current data model (`Actor`) does not include follower/following/post counts. The stats row in the profile screen should only display stats that are available from the API. If counts are not available, omit the stats row entirely rather than showing zeros.
   309ŌåÆ
   310ŌåÆ**Note on font scaling:** The custom typography definitions serve as base values. The existing `LocalFontScale` mechanism continues to apply ŌĆö all `sp` values are multiplied by the user's font scale preference (0.75xŌĆō2.0x).
   311ŌåÆ
   312ŌåÆ## Out of Scope
   313ŌåÆ
   314ŌåÆ- Custom animations/transitions (can be added later)
   315ŌåÆ- Custom font families (using system Roboto)
   316ŌåÆ- Tablet/landscape layouts
   317ŌåÆ- Widget design
   318ŌåÆ- Onboarding flow
   319ŌåÆ

file.content:
# Hackers'Pub Android ŌĆö Full UI Redesign

**Date:** 2026-03-19
**Status:** Approved
**Goal:** Replace the default Material Design 3 styling with a custom, Ivory-inspired design system that gives Hackers'Pub a distinctive, editorial identity across both light and dark themes.

## Design Philosophy

Platform-agnostic custom identity ŌĆö not Material, not iOS-native, but a unique Hackers'Pub look inspired by Ivory (Tapbots' Mastodon client). Near-monochrome palette with Deep Stone accent. Typography-first: font weight carries emphasis rather than color. Semantic colors (red, green) reserved for interactive state changes, giving them maximum impact against the neutral base.

## Design System

### Color Palette

#### Light Theme
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `background` | `#FFFFFF` | Screen background |
| `surface` | `#F2F2F7` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
| `textPrimary` | `#1C1C1E` | Headlines, names, primary content |
| `textBody` | `#3A3A3C` | Body text, post content |
| `textSecondary` | `#AEAEB2` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tab labels |
| `accent` | `#44403C` | Active tab icons/labels, links (via weight), follow buttons, interactive elements |
| `accentMuted` | `#78716C` | Hashtags, relationship tags background at 10% opacity |
| `divider` | `#F2F2F7` | Hairline separators between posts |
| `buttonOutline` | `#D6D3D1` | Secondary button borders |
| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Heart reactions, error states, notification dots |
| `share` | `#34D399` | Share/repost active state |

#### Dark Theme
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `background` | `#171717` | Screen background |
| `surface` | `#262626` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
| `textPrimary` | `#FAFAFA` | Headlines, names |
| `textBody` | `#D4D4D4` | Body text |
| `textSecondary` | `#737373` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tabs |
| `accent` | `#D6D3D1` | Active tab icons/labels, interactive elements (inverted stone) |
| `accentMuted` | `#A8A29E` | Hashtags, tags |
| `divider` | `#262626` | Hairline separators |
| `buttonOutline` | `#525252` | Secondary button borders |
| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Same as light |
| `share` | `#34D399` | Same as light |

### Typography

System default (Roboto on Android). No custom fonts ŌĆö emphasis via weight hierarchy only.

| Style | Size | Weight | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|-------|
| `titleLarge` | 22sp | 700 (Bold) | Screen titles (Timeline, Explore, etc.) |
| `titleMedium` | 20sp | 700 (Bold) | Profile name |
| `bodyLargeSemiBold` | 15sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Author names in post cards |
| `bodyLarge` | 15sp | 400 (Regular) | Post content, bio text |
| `bodyMedium` | 14sp | 400 (Regular) | Stats labels, settings items |
| `labelMedium` | 13sp | 400 (Regular) | Handles, timestamps, engagement counts |
| `labelSmall` | 12sp | 500 (Medium) | Hashtags, relationship tags |
| `caption` | 11sp | 500 (Medium) | Tag pills, repost indicators |
| `tabLabel` | 10sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Bottom tab labels |

**Letter spacing:** -0.3sp on `titleLarge` for tighter headline feel. Default elsewhere.

### Spacing

Base unit: 4dp. Consistent throughout.

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `xs` | 4dp | Fine spacing (between name and handle) |
| `sm` | 8dp | Compact spacing (engagement icon gaps) |
| `md` | 12dp | Element spacing (avatar-to-text gap, between post sections) |
| `lg` | 16dp | Standard padding (screen edges, post padding) |
| `xl` | 24dp | Section spacing (stats row gaps) |
| `xxl` | 32dp | Large section spacing (sign-in margins) |

### Shapes

| Element | Radius | Size |
|---------|--------|------|
| Avatar (timeline) | Circle | 42dp |
| Avatar (profile) | Circle | 80dp |
| Avatar (repost indicator) | Circle | 16dp |
| Pill buttons (Follow, etc.) | 20dp | Height ~36dp |
| Icon buttons (compose, etc.) | Circle | 28dp |
| Relationship tags | Full capsule | Auto-width |
| Notification dot | Circle | 8dp |

No card elevation or shadows anywhere. Post separation via hairline dividers only.

### Icons

Outlined stroke icons (Feather/Lucide style), 22dp for tab bar, 16dp for engagement bar. Stroke width 1.5dp.

- Active state: filled icon with accent color
- Inactive state: outlined icon with secondary color
- Engagement active states per action:
  - Reply: `accent` color when active (user has replied)
  - Share/Repost: `share` green (`#34D399`) when active
  - Reaction/Heart: `reaction` red (`#E8453C`) when active, filled
  - Quote: `accent` color when active (user has quoted)
  - External share: no active state, always `textSecondary`

### Bottom Navigation Bar

- Height: 56dp (standard)
- Background: `background` color (white in light, `#171717` in dark)
- Top border: 1dp hairline in `divider` color
- 4 tabs (authenticated): Home, Explore, Alerts, Search
- 4 tabs (unauthenticated): Local, Fediverse, Search, Sign In
- Icon size: 22dp, stroke width 1.5dp
- Label: 10sp/600 (`tabLabel`), 3dp below icon
- Active tab: filled icon + label in `accent` color
- Inactive tab: outlined icon + label in `textSecondary` color
- Notification dot: 8dp red circle (`reaction` color), positioned top-right of Alerts icon with 2dp white border

### Media Grid

- Images: 8dp border-radius on all corners
- Single image: full width, max-height 300dp, `contentScale = Crop`
- Two images: side-by-side, 4dp gap between
- Three+ images: 2x2 grid, 4dp gaps
- Container: no border, no elevation, clips to rounded shape

## Screen Specifications

### Timeline Screen

**Header:**
- Large bold title "Timeline" (22sp/700) top-left
- Right side: compose button (28dp circle, surface background, + icon) and user avatar (28dp circle)
- No border below header ŌĆö content starts immediately

**Content:**
- Vertical scrolling list (LazyColumn)
- Posts separated by 1dp hairline dividers (`divider` color) with 16dp horizontal margin
- Pull-to-refresh support

**Post Card Layout:**
- 16dp horizontal padding, 12dp vertical padding
- Repost indicator (if shared): 16dp avatar + repost icon + actor name, caption size, secondary color, indented to align with post content (54dp left padding = 42dp avatar + 12dp gap)
- Author row: 42dp circular avatar, 12dp gap, then name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, `textPrimary`) + timestamp (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`) on same baseline
- Body text: 15sp/400, `textBody` color, 4dp below author row
- Hashtags: 11sp/500, `accentMuted` color, 6dp below body
- Engagement bar: 10dp below content, icons (16dp) + counts (13sp), 18dp gaps between items. Muted by default, semantic colors when active (red heart filled, green repost)

**Quoted Post (if present):**
- Indented block below body text
- 1dp border in `divider` color, 8dp border-radius, 8dp padding
- Smaller avatar (32dp), author info, truncated content

**Floating Action Button:** None ŌĆö compose is in the header

### Post Detail Screen

**Header:** Back arrow (left) + ellipsis menu (right), title "Post" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`)

**Post Content (expanded view):**
- Same author row as timeline post card (avatar, name, handle)
- Full body text rendering (no truncation), `bodyLarge`
- Full timestamp below body: absolute date/time format, `labelMedium`, `textSecondary`
- Visibility indicator: icon + label, `caption`, `textSecondary`

**Article posts:** If post type is Article, show article title in `titleMedium` (20sp/700) above body content, with an "Article" badge (`caption`, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, capsule shape)

**Engagement Stats Row:**
- Horizontal row below post content, 12dp vertical padding
- Counts displayed as: "12 Shares ┬Ę 23 Reactions ┬Ę 4 Quotes"
- `bodyMedium`, counts in `textPrimary` (bold), labels in `textSecondary`
- Tappable ŌĆö opens bottom sheet with actor list

**Action Bar:**
- Below stats, separated by hairline dividers above and below
- Full-width row with evenly spaced action icons: Reply, Share, React, Quote, Delete (owner only), External Share
- Icons: 20dp, `textSecondary` by default, semantic colors when active
- Delete icon: `reaction` red color

**Reaction Groups:**
- Below action bar if reactions exist
- Horizontal scrollable row of emoji pills
- Each pill: emoji + count, `surface` background, 16dp border-radius, 8dp horizontal padding
- Active (user reacted): `accent` at 10% opacity background, `accent` text

**Reaction Picker (bottom sheet):**
- Modal bottom sheet, `background` color
- Grid of available emoji reactions, 7 columns
- Each cell: 40dp, 8dp border-radius
- Active reactions highlighted with `accent` at 15% opacity background
- Close button top-right

**Shares/Quotes List (bottom sheet):**
- Modal bottom sheet with navigation title ("Shares" or "Quotes")
- List of actor rows: 40dp circular avatar, name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`), handle (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`)
- "Load more" button at bottom if paginated
- Empty state: centered "No shares yet" / "No quotes yet"

**Reply Thread:**
- Below the main post, same post card format as timeline
- Replies listed with hairline dividers
- Reply FAB: 56dp circle, `accent` background, white reply icon, bottom-right positioned, 16dp margin from edges

### Profile Screen

**Header:** Back arrow (left) + ellipsis menu (right), no title text

**Profile Section (centered):**
- 80dp circular avatar
- Name: 20sp/700, 12dp below avatar
- Handle: 14sp/400, `textSecondary`, 2dp below name
- Bio: 14sp/400, `textBody`, centered, 10dp below handle, 24dp horizontal margin
- Stats row: 24dp gap between items, centered, 14dp below bio
  - Each stat: count (16sp/700) above label (12sp/secondary)
  - Three items: Posts, Followers, Following
- Action buttons: 16dp below stats, centered
  - Follow: pill button, `accent` background, white text, 28dp horizontal padding
  - Share: pill button, transparent, `buttonOutline` border, share icon only
- Relationship tag: "Follows you" capsule, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, 11sp/500, 10dp below buttons

**Content:** Hairline divider, then post list identical to timeline (without avatars if showing own profile ŌĆö keep avatars for consistency)

### Notifications Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Notifications" (same as timeline)

**Notification Rows:**
- 42dp actor avatar (circular), 12dp gap
- Action text: actor name (bold) + action description + timestamp
- Notification type indicated by text ("liked your post", "shared your post", "followed you")
- Notification type icons: all use `textSecondary` color (monochrome, consistent with design philosophy ŌĆö no per-type color coding)
- Hairline dividers between items
- Unread indicator: red dot (8dp) on the Alerts tab icon
- Empty state: centered text "No notifications yet"

### Explore Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Explore"

**Segmented Tabs:** Below header, "Local" / "Global" segmented control
- Active tab: `accent` text, underline indicator
- Inactive tab: `textSecondary`

**Content:** Same post list as timeline, scoped to local or global feed

### Search Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Search"

**Search Bar:** Rounded text field below header, `surface` background, 12dp border-radius, search icon left-aligned, 16dp horizontal margin

**Results:** Actor rows (avatar + name + handle) and post cards, depending on result type

### Compose Screen

**Header:** Navigation bar style
- Left: "Cancel" text button (`accent` color)
- Right: "Post" pill button (`accent` background, white text), disabled state at 40% opacity
- Title: "Compose", "Reply", or "Quoting" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, 15sp/600)

**Content:**
- Reply indicator (if replying): "Replying to @handle" in `textSecondary`, 13sp
- Text editor: full-width, 15sp, placeholder "What's on your mind?"
- Markdown support with live preview toggle

**Bottom toolbar:** Visibility selector, language picker ŌĆö subtle icons in `textSecondary`

### Settings Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Settings"

**Content:** Grouped list sections with section headers (13sp/500, uppercase, `textSecondary`)

Sections:
- **App Info:** Logo (80dp, 16dp corner radius), app name, version
- **Typography:** Font size slider (0.75xŌĆō2.0x)
- **Timeline:** Markdown truncation options
- **Engagement:** Confirmation toggles
- **Links:** In-app browser toggle
- **About:** Open source licenses, links

Each row: standard list item, 16dp padding, `textPrimary` label, `textSecondary` value/description. Hairline dividers between rows.

### Sign-In Screen

**Layout:** Centered vertically

- Logo: 120dp, centered
- Title: "Hackers' Pub" (22sp/700), 16dp below logo
- Subtitle: "Sign in to continue" (14sp, `textSecondary`), 4dp below title
- Username field: rounded border (12dp radius), `surface` background, 32dp below subtitle, 32dp horizontal margin
- Verification code field: same style (appears after username submission)
- Primary button: pill shape, `accent` background, white text, full width within margins
- Error text: `error` color, 13sp, below button

## Migration Strategy

This redesign replaces the existing Material Design 3 theming while keeping the same Compose architecture. Changes are purely in the UI layer:

1. **Theme.kt** ŌĆö Replace M3 color scheme with custom color tokens
2. **Spacing.kt** ŌĆö Already exists, minor adjustments to values
3. **New: Typography.kt** ŌĆö Define custom text styles (not M3 Typography)
4. **New: Shapes.kt** ŌĆö Define shape tokens
5. **New: Icons.kt** ŌĆö Custom icon set (if switching from Material Icons to Feather/Lucide)
6. **Each screen** ŌĆö Replace M3 components (TopAppBar, FloatingActionButton, etc.) with custom composables
7. **PostCard** ŌĆö Restyle engagement bar, remove card elevation, update spacing
8. **CompactTopBar** ŌĆö Replace with new LargeTitle header composable

No changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. Pure visual transformation.

**Note on profile stats:** The current data model (`Actor`) does not include follower/following/post counts. The stats row in the profile screen should only display stats that are available from the API. If counts are not available, omit the stats row entirely rather than showing zeros.

**Note on font scaling:** The custom typography definitions serve as base values. The existing `LocalFontScale` mechanism continues to apply ŌĆö all `sp` values are multiplied by the user's font scale preference (0.75xŌĆō2.0x).

## Out of Scope

- Custom animations/transitions (can be added later)
- Custom font families (using system Roboto)
- Tablet/landscape layouts
- Widget design
- Onboarding flow

input.content:
# Hackers'Pub Android ŌĆö Full UI Redesign Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Replace Material Design 3 defaults with a custom Ivory-inspired design system (Deep Stone accent, near-monochrome, typography-first) across all screens.

**Architecture:** Pure UI-layer transformation. No changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. New design tokens (colors, typography, shapes) defined as Compose objects with `CompositionLocal` access. M3 components replaced with custom composables where they deviate from the spec.

**Tech Stack:** Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Material3 (selectively ŌĆö keeping M3 under the hood where compatible), Coil for images.

**Design Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-19-android-redesign-design.md`

---

## File Structure

### New Files
| File | Responsibility |
|------|---------------|
| `ui/theme/Colors.kt` | Custom color token objects (light/dark), `LocalAppColors` CompositionLocal |
| `ui/theme/AppTypography.kt` | Custom `TextStyle` definitions, `LocalAppTypography` CompositionLocal |
| `ui/theme/AppShapes.kt` | Shape token constants (radii, sizes) |
| `ui/components/LargeTitleHeader.kt` | Ivory-style large title header replacing CompactTopBar |
| `ui/components/BottomNavBar.kt` | Custom bottom navigation bar with notification dot |

### Modified Files
| File | What Changes |
|------|-------------|
| `ui/theme/Theme.kt` | Wire new color/typography CompositionLocals into HackersPubTheme |
| `ui/theme/Spacing.kt` | No changes needed (values already match spec) |
| `ui/HackersPubApp.kt` | Replace `NavigationBar` with `BottomNavBar`, update tab config |
| `ui/components/PostCard.kt` | Remove Card elevation, new spacing/colors/typography, update engagement bar |
| `ui/components/HtmlContent.kt` | Update link/mention colors to use `AppColors` |
| `ui/components/CompactTopBar.kt` | Delete (replaced by LargeTitleHeader) |
| `ui/components/MentionAutocomplete.kt` | Update colors/sizing to use design tokens |
| `ui/components/ReactionPicker.kt` | Update colors/sizing to use design tokens |
| `ui/screens/timeline/TimelineScreen.kt` | Replace CompactTopBar + FAB with LargeTitleHeader |
| `ui/screens/notifications/NotificationsScreen.kt` | New header, monochrome notification icons, new avatar sizing |
| `ui/screens/explore/ExploreScreen.kt` | New header, restyle tabs |
| `ui/screens/search/SearchScreen.kt` | New header, restyle search bar and results |
| `ui/screens/settings/SettingsScreen.kt` | New header, restyle list items |
| `ui/screens/profile/ProfileScreen.kt` | Centered layout, new sizing, pill buttons |
| `ui/screens/postdetail/PostDetailScreen.kt` | New header, restyle engagement stats/action bar/sheets |
| `ui/screens/compose/ComposeScreen.kt` | New navigation bar header, pill post button |
| `ui/screens/auth/SignInScreen.kt` | Restyle fields and buttons to spec |
| `MainActivity.kt` | Update status bar / system bars color for new background |

All paths are relative to `app/src/main/java/pub/hackers/android/`.

---

## Task 1: Design System ŌĆö Colors

**Files:**
- Create: `ui/theme/Colors.kt`
- Modify: `ui/theme/Theme.kt`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create `Colors.kt` with light and dark color token objects**

```kotlin
package pub.hackers.android.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.runtime.Immutable
import androidx.compose.runtime.staticCompositionLocalOf
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color

@Immutable
data class AppColorScheme(
    val background: Color,
    val surface: Color,
    val textPrimary: Color,
    val textBody: Color,
    val textSecondary: Color,
    val accent: Color,
    val accentMuted: Color,
    val divider: Color,
    val buttonOutline: Color,
    val reaction: Color,
    val share: Color,
)

val LightAppColors = AppColorScheme(
    background = Color(0xFFFFFFFF),
    surface = Color(0xFFF2F2F7),
    textPrimary = Color(0xFF1C1C1E),
    textBody = Color(0xFF3A3A3C),
    textSecondary = Color(0xFFAEAEB2),
    accent = Color(0xFF44403C),
    accentMuted = Color(0xFF78716C),
    divider = Color(0xFFF2F2F7),
    buttonOutline = Color(0xFFD6D3D1),
    reaction = Color(0xFFE8453C),
    share = Color(0xFF34D399),
)

val DarkAppColors = AppColorScheme(
    background = Color(0xFF171717),
    surface = Color(0xFF262626),
    textPrimary = Color(0xFFFAFAFA),
    textBody = Color(0xFFD4D4D4),
    textSecondary = Color(0xFF737373),
    accent = Color(0xFFD6D3D1),
    accentMuted = Color(0xFFA8A29E),
    divider = Color(0xFF262626),
    buttonOutline = Color(0xFF525252),
    reaction = Color(0xFFE8453C),
    share = Color(0xFF34D399),
)

val LocalAppColors = staticCompositionLocalOf { LightAppColors }
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Update `Theme.kt` to provide `LocalAppColors`**

Keep the existing `MaterialTheme` wrapper (needed for M3 components that still exist like `ModalBottomSheet`, `Switch`, `Slider`) but add `CompositionLocalProvider` for `LocalAppColors`. Update the M3 `colorScheme` to map to the new tokens so M3 components pick up our colors automatically.

Key changes in `HackersPubTheme`:
- Select `LightAppColors` or `DarkAppColors` based on `isSystemInDarkTheme()`
- Map them into a `lightColorScheme()` / `darkColorScheme()` so M3 components still function
- Wrap `MaterialTheme` content in `CompositionLocalProvider(LocalAppColors provides colors)`
- Update status bar color to use `colors.background`

- [ ] **Step 3: Verify the app builds and runs with no visual regression**

Run: `./gradlew assembleDebug`

At this point colors are provided but nothing consumes them yet ŌĆö the app should look identical.

- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**

```
git add -A && git commit -m "feat: add custom color token system (AppColorScheme)"
```

---

## Task 2: Design System ŌĆö Typography

**Files:**
- Create: `ui/theme/AppTypography.kt`
- Modify: `ui/theme/Theme.kt`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create `AppTypography.kt` with all text styles**

```kotlin
package pub.hackers.android.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.runtime.Immutable
import androidx.compose.runtime.staticCompositionLocalOf
import androidx.compose.ui.text.TextStyle
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp

@Immutable
data class AppTextStyles(
    val titleLarge: TextStyle,
    val titleMedium: TextStyle,
    val bodyLargeSemiBold: TextStyle,
    val bodyLarge: TextStyle,
    val bodyMedium: TextStyle,
    val labelMedium: TextStyle,
    val labelSmall: TextStyle,
    val caption: TextStyle,
    val tabLabel: TextStyle,
)

val AppTypographyDefaults = AppTextStyles(
    titleLarge = TextStyle(fontSize = 22.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, letterSpacing = (-0.3).sp),
    titleMedium = TextStyle(fontSize = 20.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold),
    bodyLargeSemiBold = TextStyle(fontSize = 15.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold),
    bodyLarge = TextStyle(fontSize = 15.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal),
    bodyMedium = TextStyle(fontSize = 14.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal),
    labelMedium = TextStyle(fontSize = 13.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal),
    labelSmall = TextStyle(fontSize = 12.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium),
    caption = TextStyle(fontSize = 11.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium),
    tabLabel = TextStyle(fontSize = 10.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold),
)

val LocalAppTypography = staticCompositionLocalOf { AppTypographyDefaults }
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Provide `LocalAppTypography` in `HackersPubTheme`**

Add `LocalAppTypography provides AppTypographyDefaults` to the existing `CompositionLocalProvider` block. Ensure the existing `LocalFontScale` mechanism is preserved ŌĆö font scaling is applied at the composable level, not in the type definitions.

- [ ] **Step 3: Verify build**

Run: `./gradlew assembleDebug`

- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**

```
git add -A && git commit -m "feat: add custom typography token system (AppTextStyles)"
```

Custom bottom navigation bar matching spec:

```kotlin
@Composable
fun BottomNavBar(
    items: List<BottomNavItem>,
    selectedRoute: String,
    onItemSelected: (BottomNavItem) -> Unit,
    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
)

data class BottomNavItem(
    val route: String,
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Update `HackersPubApp.kt`**

Replace the M3 `NavigationBar` + `NavigationBarItem` block with `BottomNavBar`. Update tab configuration:

- Unauthenticated: keep existing pattern but with new component

**Important:** The current app has 5 tabs (Timeline, Notifications, Explore, Search, Settings) when authenticated. The spec calls for 4 tabs (Home, Explore, Alerts, Search). Settings needs to be accessible via a gear icon in the header or from the profile screen. Add a settings gear icon to the Timeline header's trailing content.

toolUseResult.content:
# Hackers'Pub Android ŌĆö Full UI Redesign Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Replace Material Design 3 defaults with a custom Ivory-inspired design system (Deep Stone accent, near-monochrome, typography-first) across all screens.

**Architecture:** Pure UI-layer transformation. No changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. New design tokens (colors, typography, shapes) defined as Compose objects with `CompositionLocal` access. M3 components replaced with custom composables where they deviate from the spec.

**Tech Stack:** Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Material3 (selectively ŌĆö keeping M3 under the hood where compatible), Coil for images.

**Design Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-19-android-redesign-design.md`

---

## File Structure

### New Files
| File | Responsibility |
|------|---------------|
| `ui/theme/Colors.kt` | Custom color token objects (light/dark), `LocalAppColors` CompositionLocal |
| `ui/theme/AppTypography.kt` | Custom `TextStyle` definitions, `LocalAppTypography` CompositionLocal |
| `ui/theme/AppShapes.kt` | Shape token constants (radii, sizes) |
| `ui/components/LargeTitleHeader.kt` | Ivory-style large title header replacing CompactTopBar |
| `ui/components/BottomNavBar.kt` | Custom bottom navigation bar with notification dot |

### Modified Files
| File | What Changes |
|------|-------------|
| `ui/theme/Theme.kt` | Wire new color/typography CompositionLocals into HackersPubTheme |
| `ui/theme/Spacing.kt` | No changes needed (values already match spec) |
| `ui/HackersPubApp.kt` | Replace `NavigationBar` with `BottomNavBar`, update tab config |
| `ui/components/PostCard.kt` | Remove Card elevation, new spacing/colors/typography, update engagement bar |
| `ui/components/HtmlContent.kt` | Update link/mention colors to use `AppColors` |
| `ui/components/CompactTopBar.kt` | Delete (replaced by LargeTitleHeader) |
| `ui/components/MentionAutocomplete.kt` | Update colors/sizing to use design tokens |
| `ui/components/ReactionPicker.kt` | Update colors/sizing to use design tokens |
| `ui/screens/timeline/TimelineScreen.kt` | Replace CompactTopBar + FAB with LargeTitleHeader |
| `ui/screens/notifications/NotificationsScreen.kt` | New header, monochrome notification icons, new avatar sizing |
| `ui/screens/explore/ExploreScreen.kt` | New header, restyle tabs |
| `ui/screens/search/SearchScreen.kt` | New header, restyle search bar and results |
| `ui/screens/settings/SettingsScreen.kt` | New header, restyle list items |
| `ui/screens/profile/ProfileScreen.kt` | Centered layout, new sizing, pill buttons |
| `ui/screens/postdetail/PostDetailScreen.kt` | New header, restyle engagement stats/action bar/sheets |
| `ui/screens/compose/ComposeScreen.kt` | New navigation bar header, pill post button |
| `ui/screens/auth/SignInScreen.kt` | Restyle fields and buttons to spec |
| `MainActivity.kt` | Update status bar / system bars color for new background |

All paths are relative to `app/src/main/java/pub/hackers/android/`.

---

## Task 1: Design System ŌĆö Colors

**Files:**
- Create: `ui/theme/Colors.kt`
- Modify: `ui/theme/Theme.kt`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create `Colors.kt` with light and dark color token objects**

```kotlin
package pub.hackers.android.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.runtime.Immutable
import androidx.compose.runtime.staticCompositionLocalOf
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color

@Immutable
data class AppColorScheme(
    val background: Color,
    val surface: Color,
    val textPrimary: Color,
    val textBody: Color,
    val textSecondary: Color,
    val accent: Color,
    val accentMuted: Color,
    val divider: Color,
    val buttonOutline: Color,
    val reaction: Color,
    val share: Color,
)

val LightAppColors = AppColorScheme(
    background = Color(0xFFFFFFFF),
    surface = Color(0xFFF2F2F7),
    textPrimary = Color(0xFF1C1C1E),
    textBody = Color(0xFF3A3A3C),
    textSecondary = Color(0xFFAEAEB2),
    accent = Color(0xFF44403C),
    accentMuted = Color(0xFF78716C),
    divider = Color(0xFFF2F2F7),
    buttonOutline = Color(0xFFD6D3D1),
    reaction = Color(0xFFE8453C),
    share = Color(0xFF34D399),
)

val DarkAppColors = AppColorScheme(
    background = Color(0xFF171717),
    surface = Color(0xFF262626),
    textPrimary = Color(0xFFFAFAFA),
    textBody = Color(0xFFD4D4D4),
    textSecondary = Color(0xFF737373),
    accent = Color(0xFFD6D3D1),
    accentMuted = Color(0xFFA8A29E),
    divider = Color(0xFF262626),
    buttonOutline = Color(0xFF525252),
    reaction = Color(0xFFE8453C),
    share = Color(0xFF34D399),
)

val LocalAppColors = staticCompositionLocalOf { LightAppColors }
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Update `Theme.kt` to provide `LocalAppColors`**

Keep the existing `MaterialTheme` wrapper (needed for M3 components that still exist like `ModalBottomSheet`, `Switch`, `Slider`) but add `CompositionLocalProvider` for `LocalAppColors`. Update the M3 `colorScheme` to map to the new tokens so M3 components pick up our colors automatically.

Key changes in `HackersPubTheme`:
- Select `LightAppColors` or `DarkAppColors` based on `isSystemInDarkTheme()`
- Map them into a `lightColorScheme()` / `darkColorScheme()` so M3 components still function
- Wrap `MaterialTheme` content in `CompositionLocalProvider(LocalAppColors provides colors)`
- Update status bar color to use `colors.background`

- [ ] **Step 3: Verify the app builds and runs with no visual regression**

Run: `./gradlew assembleDebug`

At this point colors are provided but nothing consumes them yet ŌĆö the app should look identical.

- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**

```
git add -A && git commit -m "feat: add custom color token system (AppColorScheme)"
```

---

## Task 2: Design System ŌĆö Typography

**Files:**
- Create: `ui/theme/AppTypography.kt`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create `AppTypography.kt` with all text styles**

```kotlin
package pub.hackers.android.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.runtime.Immutable
import androidx.compose.runtime.staticCompositionLocalOf
import androidx.compose.ui.text.TextStyle
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp

@Immutable
data class AppTextStyles(
    val titleLarge: TextStyle,
    val titleMedium: TextStyle,
    val bodyLargeSemiBold: TextStyle,
    val bodyLarge: TextStyle,
    val bodyMedium: TextStyle,
    val labelMedium: TextStyle,
    val labelSmall: TextStyle,
    val caption: TextStyle,
    val tabLabel: TextStyle,
)

val AppTypographyDefaults = AppTextStyles(
    titleLarge = TextStyle(fontSize = 22.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, letterSpacing = (-0.3).sp),
    titleMedium = TextStyle(fontSize = 20.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold),
    bodyLargeSemiBold = TextStyle(fontSize = 15.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold),
    bodyLarge = TextStyle(fontSize = 15.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal),
    bodyMedium = TextStyle(fontSize = 14.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal),
    labelMedium = TextStyle(fontSize = 13.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal),
    labelSmall = TextStyle(fontSize = 12.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium),
    caption = TextStyle(fontSize = 11.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium),
    tabLabel = TextStyle(fontSize = 10.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold),
)

val LocalAppTypography = staticCompositionLocalOf { AppTypographyDefaults }
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Provide `LocalAppTypography` in `HackersPubTheme`**

Add `LocalAppTypography provides AppTypographyDefaults` to the existing `CompositionLocalProvider` block. Ensure the existing `LocalFontScale` mechanism is preserved ŌĆö font scaling is applied at the composable level, not in the type definitions.

- [ ] **Step 2: Update `HackersPubApp.kt`**

- Unauthenticated: keep existing pattern but with new component

**Important:** The current app has 5 tabs (Timeline, Notifications, Explore, Search, Settings) when authenticated. The spec calls for 4 tabs (Home, Explore, Alerts, Search). Settings needs to be accessible via a gear icon in the header or from the profile screen. Add a settings gear icon to the Timeline header's trailing content.

content.content:
1ŌåÆ# Hackers'Pub Android ŌĆö Full UI Redesign Implementation Plan
     2ŌåÆ
     3ŌåÆ> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.
     4ŌåÆ
     5ŌåÆ**Goal:** Replace Material Design 3 defaults with a custom Ivory-inspired design system (Deep Stone accent, near-monochrome, typography-first) across all screens.
     6ŌåÆ
     7ŌåÆ**Architecture:** Pure UI-layer transformation. No changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. New design tokens (colors, typography, shapes) defined as Compose objects with `CompositionLocal` access. M3 components replaced with custom composables where they deviate from the spec.
     8ŌåÆ
     9ŌåÆ**Tech Stack:** Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Material3 (selectively ŌĆö keeping M3 under the hood where compatible), Coil for images.
    10ŌåÆ
    11ŌåÆ**Design Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-19-android-redesign-design.md`
    12ŌåÆ
    13ŌåÆ---
    14ŌåÆ
    15ŌåÆ## File Structure
    16ŌåÆ
    17ŌåÆ### New Files
    18ŌåÆ| File | Responsibility |
    19ŌåÆ|------|---------------|
    20ŌåÆ| `ui/theme/Colors.kt` | Custom color token objects (light/dark), `LocalAppColors` CompositionLocal |
    21ŌåÆ| `ui/theme/AppTypography.kt` | Custom `TextStyle` definitions, `LocalAppTypography` CompositionLocal |
    22ŌåÆ| `ui/theme/AppShapes.kt` | Shape token constants (radii, sizes) |
    23ŌåÆ| `ui/components/LargeTitleHeader.kt` | Ivory-style large title header replacing CompactTopBar |
    24ŌåÆ| `ui/components/BottomNavBar.kt` | Custom bottom navigation bar with notification dot |
    25ŌåÆ
    26ŌåÆ### Modified Files
    27ŌåÆ| File | What Changes |
    28ŌåÆ|------|-------------|
    29ŌåÆ| `ui/theme/Theme.kt` | Wire new color/typography CompositionLocals into HackersPubTheme |
    30ŌåÆ| `ui/theme/Spacing.kt` | No changes needed (values already match spec) |
    31ŌåÆ| `ui/HackersPubApp.kt` | Replace `NavigationBar` with `BottomNavBar`, update tab config |
    32ŌåÆ| `ui/components/PostCard.kt` | Remove Card elevation, new spacing/colors/typography, update engagement bar |
    33ŌåÆ| `ui/components/HtmlContent.kt` | Update link/mention colors to use `AppColors` |
    34ŌåÆ| `ui/components/CompactTopBar.kt` | Delete (replaced by LargeTitleHeader) |
    35ŌåÆ| `ui/components/MentionAutocomplete.kt` | Update colors/sizing to use design tokens |
    36ŌåÆ| `ui/components/ReactionPicker.kt` | Update colors/sizing to use design tokens |
    37ŌåÆ| `ui/screens/timeline/TimelineScreen.kt` | Replace CompactTopBar + FAB with LargeTitleHeader |
    38ŌåÆ| `ui/screens/notifications/NotificationsScreen.kt` | New header, monochrome notification icons, new avatar sizing |
    39ŌåÆ| `ui/screens/explore/ExploreScreen.kt` | New header, restyle tabs |
    40ŌåÆ| `ui/screens/search/SearchScreen.kt` | New header, restyle search bar and results |
    41ŌåÆ| `ui/screens/settings/SettingsScreen.kt` | New header, restyle list items |
    42ŌåÆ| `ui/screens/profile/ProfileScreen.kt` | Centered layout, new sizing, pill buttons |
    43ŌåÆ| `ui/screens/postdetail/PostDetailScreen.kt` | New header, restyle engagement stats/action bar/sheets |
    44ŌåÆ| `ui/screens/compose/ComposeScreen.kt` | New navigation bar header, pill post button |
    45ŌåÆ| `ui/screens/auth/SignInScreen.kt` | Restyle fields and buttons to spec |
    46ŌåÆ| `MainActivity.kt` | Update status bar / system bars color for new background |
    47ŌåÆ
    48ŌåÆAll paths are relative to `app/src/main/java/pub/hackers/android/`.
    49ŌåÆ
    50ŌåÆ---
    51ŌåÆ
    52ŌåÆ## Task 1: Design System ŌĆö Colors
    53ŌåÆ
    54ŌåÆ**Files:**
    55ŌåÆ- Create: `ui/theme/Colors.kt`
    56ŌåÆ- Modify: `ui/theme/Theme.kt`
    57ŌåÆ
    58ŌåÆ- [ ] **Step 1: Create `Colors.kt` with light and dark color token objects**
    59ŌåÆ
    60ŌåÆ```kotlin
    61ŌåÆpackage pub.hackers.android.ui.theme
    62ŌåÆ
    63ŌåÆimport androidx.compose.runtime.Immutable
    64ŌåÆimport androidx.compose.runtime.staticCompositionLocalOf
    65ŌåÆimport androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
    66ŌåÆ
    67ŌåÆ@Immutable
    68ŌåÆdata class AppColorScheme(
    69ŌåÆ    val background: Color,
    70ŌåÆ    val surface: Color,
    71ŌåÆ    val textPrimary: Color,
    72ŌåÆ    val textBody: Color,
    73ŌåÆ    val textSecondary: Color,
    74ŌåÆ    val accent: Color,
    75ŌåÆ    val accentMuted: Color,
    76ŌåÆ    val divider: Color,
    77ŌåÆ    val buttonOutline: Color,
    78ŌåÆ    val reaction: Color,
    79ŌåÆ    val share: Color,
    80ŌåÆ)
    81ŌåÆ
    82ŌåÆval LightAppColors = AppColorScheme(
    83ŌåÆ    background = Color(0xFFFFFFFF),
    84ŌåÆ    surface = Color(0xFFF2F2F7),
    85ŌåÆ    textPrimary = Color(0xFF1C1C1E),
    86ŌåÆ    textBody = Color(0xFF3A3A3C),
    87ŌåÆ    textSecondary = Color(0xFFAEAEB2),
    88ŌåÆ    accent = Color(0xFF44403C),
    89ŌåÆ    accentMuted = Color(0xFF78716C),
    90ŌåÆ    divider = Color(0xFFF2F2F7),
    91ŌåÆ    buttonOutline = Color(0xFFD6D3D1),
    92ŌåÆ    reaction = Color(0xFFE8453C),
    93ŌåÆ    share = Color(0xFF34D399),
    94ŌåÆ)
    95ŌåÆ
    96ŌåÆval DarkAppColors = AppColorScheme(
    97ŌåÆ    background = Color(0xFF171717),
    98ŌåÆ    surface = Color(0xFF262626),
    99ŌåÆ    textPrimary = Color(0xFFFAFAFA),
   100ŌåÆ    textBody = Color(0xFFD4D4D4),
   101ŌåÆ    textSecondary = Color(0xFF737373),
   102ŌåÆ    accent = Color(0xFFD6D3D1),
   103ŌåÆ    accentMuted = Color(0xFFA8A29E),
   104ŌåÆ    divider = Color(0xFF262626),
   105ŌåÆ    buttonOutline = Color(0xFF525252),
   106ŌåÆ    reaction = Color(0xFFE8453C),
   107ŌåÆ    share = Color(0xFF34D399),
   108ŌåÆ)
   109ŌåÆ
   110ŌåÆval LocalAppColors = staticCompositionLocalOf { LightAppColors }
   111ŌåÆ```
   112ŌåÆ
   113ŌåÆ- [ ] **Step 2: Update `Theme.kt` to provide `LocalAppColors`**
   114ŌåÆ
   115ŌåÆKeep the existing `MaterialTheme` wrapper (needed for M3 components that still exist like `ModalBottomSheet`, `Switch`, `Slider`) but add `CompositionLocalProvider` for `LocalAppColors`. Update the M3 `colorScheme` to map to the new tokens so M3 components pick up our colors automatically.

1ŌåÆ# Hackers'Pub Android ŌĆö Full UI Redesign
     2ŌåÆ
     3ŌåÆ**Date:** 2026-03-19
     4ŌåÆ**Status:** Approved
     5ŌåÆ**Goal:** Replace the default Material Design 3 styling with a custom, Ivory-inspired design system that gives Hackers'Pub a distinctive, editorial identity across both light and dark themes.
     6ŌåÆ
     7ŌåÆ## Design Philosophy
     8ŌåÆ
     9ŌåÆPlatform-agnostic custom identity ŌĆö not Material, not iOS-native, but a unique Hackers'Pub look inspired by Ivory (Tapbots' Mastodon client). Near-monochrome palette with Deep Stone accent. Typography-first: font weight carries emphasis rather than color. Semantic colors (red, green) reserved for interactive state changes, giving them maximum impact against the neutral base.
    10ŌåÆ
    11ŌåÆ## Design System
    12ŌåÆ
    13ŌåÆ### Color Palette
    14ŌåÆ
    15ŌåÆ#### Light Theme
    16ŌåÆ| Token | Value | Usage |
    17ŌåÆ|-------|-------|-------|
    18ŌåÆ| `background` | `#FFFFFF` | Screen background |
    19ŌåÆ| `surface` | `#F2F2F7` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
    20ŌåÆ| `textPrimary` | `#1C1C1E` | Headlines, names, primary content |
    21ŌåÆ| `textBody` | `#3A3A3C` | Body text, post content |
    22ŌåÆ| `textSecondary` | `#AEAEB2` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tab labels |
    23ŌåÆ| `accent` | `#44403C` | Active tab icons/labels, links (via weight), follow buttons, interactive elements |
    24ŌåÆ| `accentMuted` | `#78716C` | Hashtags, relationship tags background at 10% opacity |
    25ŌåÆ| `divider` | `#F2F2F7` | Hairline separators between posts |
    26ŌåÆ| `buttonOutline` | `#D6D3D1` | Secondary button borders |
    27ŌåÆ| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Heart reactions, error states, notification dots |
    28ŌåÆ| `share` | `#34D399` | Share/repost active state |
    29ŌåÆ
    30ŌåÆ#### Dark Theme
    31ŌåÆ| Token | Value | Usage |
    32ŌåÆ|-------|-------|-------|
    33ŌåÆ| `background` | `#171717` | Screen background |
    34ŌåÆ| `surface` | `#262626` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
    35ŌåÆ| `textPrimary` | `#FAFAFA` | Headlines, names |
    36ŌåÆ| `textBody` | `#D4D4D4` | Body text |
    37ŌåÆ| `textSecondary` | `#737373` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tabs |
    38ŌåÆ| `accent` | `#D6D3D1` | Active tab icons/labels, interactive elements (inverted stone) |
    39ŌåÆ| `accentMuted` | `#A8A29E` | Hashtags, tags |
    40ŌåÆ| `divider` | `#262626` | Hairline separators |
    41ŌåÆ| `buttonOutline` | `#525252` | Secondary button borders |
    42ŌåÆ| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Same as light |
    43ŌåÆ| `share` | `#34D399` | Same as light |
    44ŌåÆ
    45ŌåÆ### Typography
    46ŌåÆ
    47ŌåÆSystem default (Roboto on Android). No custom fonts ŌĆö emphasis via weight hierarchy only.
    48ŌåÆ
    49ŌåÆ| Style | Size | Weight | Usage |
    50ŌåÆ|-------|------|--------|-------|
    51ŌåÆ| `titleLarge` | 22sp | 700 (Bold) | Screen titles (Timeline, Explore, etc.) |
    52ŌåÆ| `titleMedium` | 20sp | 700 (Bold) | Profile name |
    53ŌåÆ| `bodyLargeSemiBold` | 15sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Author names in post cards |
    54ŌåÆ| `bodyLarge` | 15sp | 400 (Regular) | Post content, bio text |
    55ŌåÆ| `bodyMedium` | 14sp | 400 (Regular) | Stats labels, settings items |
    56ŌåÆ| `labelMedium` | 13sp | 400 (Regular) | Handles, timestamps, engagement counts |
    57ŌåÆ| `labelSmall` | 12sp | 500 (Medium) | Hashtags, relationship tags |
    58ŌåÆ| `caption` | 11sp | 500 (Medium) | Tag pills, repost indicators |
    59ŌåÆ| `tabLabel` | 10sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Bottom tab labels |
    60ŌåÆ
    61ŌåÆ**Letter spacing:** -0.3sp on `titleLarge` for tighter headline feel. Default elsewhere.
    62ŌåÆ
    63ŌåÆ### Spacing
    64ŌåÆ
    65ŌåÆBase unit: 4dp. Consistent throughout.
    66ŌåÆ
    67ŌåÆ| Token | Value | Usage |
    68ŌåÆ|-------|-------|-------|
    69ŌåÆ| `xs` | 4dp | Fine spacing (between name and handle) |
    70ŌåÆ| `sm` | 8dp | Compact spacing (engagement icon gaps) |
    71ŌåÆ| `md` | 12dp | Element spacing (avatar-to-text gap, between post sections) |
    72ŌåÆ| `lg` | 16dp | Standard padding (screen edges, post padding) |
    73ŌåÆ| `xl` | 24dp | Section spacing (stats row gaps) |
    74ŌåÆ| `xxl` | 32dp | Large section spacing (sign-in margins) |
    75ŌåÆ
    76ŌåÆ### Shapes
    77ŌåÆ
    78ŌåÆ| Element | Radius | Size |
    79ŌåÆ|---------|--------|------|
    80ŌåÆ| Avatar (timeline) | Circle | 42dp |
    81ŌåÆ| Avatar (profile) | Circle | 80dp |
    82ŌåÆ| Avatar (repost indicator) | Circle | 16dp |
    83ŌåÆ| Pill buttons (Follow, etc.) | 20dp | Height ~36dp |
    84ŌåÆ| Icon buttons (compose, etc.) | Circle | 28dp |
    85ŌåÆ| Relationship tags | Full capsule | Auto-width |
    86ŌåÆ| Notification dot | Circle | 8dp |
    87ŌåÆ
    88ŌåÆNo card elevation or shadows anywhere. Post separation via hairline dividers only.
    89ŌåÆ
    90ŌåÆ### Icons
    91ŌåÆ
    92ŌåÆOutlined stroke icons (Feather/Lucide style), 22dp for tab bar, 16dp for engagement bar. Stroke width 1.5dp.
    93ŌåÆ
    94ŌåÆ- Active state: filled icon with accent color
    95ŌåÆ- Inactive state: outlined icon with secondary color
    96ŌåÆ- Engagement active states per action:
    97ŌåÆ  - Reply: `accent` color when active (user has replied)
    98ŌåÆ  - Share/Repost: `share` green (`#34D399`) when active
    99ŌåÆ  - Reaction/Heart: `reaction` red (`#E8453C`) when active, filled
   100ŌåÆ  - Quote: `accent` color when active (user has quoted)
   101ŌåÆ  - External share: no active state, always `textSecondary`
   102ŌåÆ
   103ŌåÆ### Bottom Navigation Bar
   104ŌåÆ
   105ŌåÆ- Height: 56dp (standard)
   106ŌåÆ- Background: `background` color (white in light, `#171717` in dark)
   107ŌåÆ- Top border: 1dp hairline in `divider` color
   108ŌåÆ- 4 tabs (authenticated): Home, Explore, Alerts, Search
   109ŌåÆ- 4 tabs (unauthenticated): Local, Fediverse, Search, Sign In
   110ŌåÆ- Icon size: 22dp, stroke width 1.5dp

   112ŌåÆ- Active tab: filled icon + label in `accent` color
   113ŌåÆ- Inactive tab: outlined icon + label in `textSecondary` color
   114ŌåÆ- Notification dot: 8dp red circle (`reaction` color), positioned top-right of Alerts icon with 2dp white border
   115ŌåÆ
   116ŌåÆ### Media Grid
   117ŌåÆ
   118ŌåÆ- Images: 8dp border-radius on all corners
   119ŌåÆ- Single image: full width, max-height 300dp, `contentScale = Crop`
   120ŌåÆ- Two images: side-by-side, 4dp gap between
   121ŌåÆ- Three+ images: 2x2 grid, 4dp gaps
   122ŌåÆ- Container: no border, no elevation, clips to rounded shape
   123ŌåÆ
   124ŌåÆ## Screen Specifications
   125ŌåÆ
   126ŌåÆ### Timeline Screen
   127ŌåÆ
   128ŌåÆ**Header:**
   129ŌåÆ- Large bold title "Timeline" (22sp/700) top-left
   130ŌåÆ- Right side: compose button (28dp circle, surface background, + icon) and user avatar (28dp circle)
   131ŌåÆ- No border below header ŌĆö content starts immediately
   132ŌåÆ
   133ŌåÆ**Content:**
   134ŌåÆ- Vertical scrolling list (LazyColumn)
   135ŌåÆ- Posts separated by 1dp hairline dividers (`divider` color) with 16dp horizontal margin
   136ŌåÆ- Pull-to-refresh support
   137ŌåÆ
   138ŌåÆ**Post Card Layout:**
   139ŌåÆ- 16dp horizontal padding, 12dp vertical padding
   140ŌåÆ- Repost indicator (if shared): 16dp avatar + repost icon + actor name, caption size, secondary color, indented to align with post content (54dp left padding = 42dp avatar + 12dp gap)
   141ŌåÆ- Author row: 42dp circular avatar, 12dp gap, then name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, `textPrimary`) + timestamp (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`) on same baseline
   142ŌåÆ- Body text: 15sp/400, `textBody` color, 4dp below author row
   143ŌåÆ- Hashtags: 11sp/500, `accentMuted` color, 6dp below body
   144ŌåÆ- Engagement bar: 10dp below content, icons (16dp) + counts (13sp), 18dp gaps between items. Muted by default, semantic colors when active (red heart filled, green repost)
   145ŌåÆ
   146ŌåÆ**Quoted Post (if present):**
   147ŌåÆ- Indented block below body text
   148ŌåÆ- 1dp border in `divider` color, 8dp border-radius, 8dp padding
   149ŌåÆ- Smaller avatar (32dp), author info, truncated content
   150ŌåÆ
   151ŌåÆ**Floating Action Button:** None ŌĆö compose is in the header
   152ŌåÆ
   153ŌåÆ### Post Detail Screen

   156ŌåÆ
   157ŌåÆ**Post Content (expanded view):**
   158ŌåÆ- Same author row as timeline post card (avatar, name, handle)
   159ŌåÆ- Full body text rendering (no truncation), `bodyLarge`
   160ŌåÆ- Full timestamp below body: absolute date/time format, `labelMedium`, `textSecondary`
   161ŌåÆ- Visibility indicator: icon + label, `caption`, `textSecondary`
   162ŌåÆ
   163ŌåÆ**Article posts:** If post type is Article, show article title in `titleMedium` (20sp/700) above body content, with an "Article" badge (`caption`, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, capsule shape)
   164ŌåÆ
   165ŌåÆ**Engagement Stats Row:**
   166ŌåÆ- Horizontal row below post content, 12dp vertical padding
   167ŌåÆ- Counts displayed as: "12 Shares ┬Ę 23 Reactions ┬Ę 4 Quotes"
   168ŌåÆ- `bodyMedium`, counts in `textPrimary` (bold), labels in `textSecondary`
   169ŌåÆ- Tappable ŌĆö opens bottom sheet with actor list
   170ŌåÆ
   171ŌåÆ**Action Bar:**

   173ŌåÆ- Full-width row with evenly spaced action icons: Reply, Share, React, Quote, Delete (owner only), External Share
   174ŌåÆ- Icons: 20dp, `textSecondary` by default, semantic colors when active
   175ŌåÆ- Delete icon: `reaction` red color
   176ŌåÆ
   177ŌåÆ**Reaction Groups:**

   180ŌåÆ- Each pill: emoji + count, `surface` background, 16dp border-radius, 8dp horizontal padding
   181ŌåÆ- Active (user reacted): `accent` at 10% opacity background, `accent` text
   182ŌåÆ
   183ŌåÆ**Reaction Picker (bottom sheet):**
   184ŌåÆ- Modal bottom sheet, `background` color
   185ŌåÆ- Grid of available emoji reactions, 7 columns
   186ŌåÆ- Each cell: 40dp, 8dp border-radius

   188ŌåÆ- Close button top-right
   189ŌåÆ
   190ŌåÆ**Shares/Quotes List (bottom sheet):**

   193ŌåÆ- "Load more" button at bottom if paginated

   195ŌåÆ
   196ŌåÆ**Reply Thread:**

   199ŌåÆ- Reply FAB: 56dp circle, `accent` background, white reply icon, bottom-right positioned, 16dp margin from edges
   200ŌåÆ
   201ŌåÆ### Profile Screen

   210ŌåÆ- Stats row: 24dp gap between items, centered, 14dp below bio
   211ŌåÆ  - Each stat: count (16sp/700) above label (12sp/secondary)
   212ŌåÆ  - Three items: Posts, Followers, Following
   213ŌåÆ- Action buttons: 16dp below stats, centered

   224ŌåÆ**Notification Rows:**

   232ŌåÆ
   233ŌåÆ### Explore Screen

   236ŌåÆ

   239ŌåÆ- Inactive tab: `textSecondary`

   247ŌåÆ**Search Bar:** Rounded text field below header, `surface` background, 12dp border-radius, search icon left-aligned, 16dp horizontal margin
   248ŌåÆ

   250ŌåÆ
   251ŌåÆ### Compose Screen
   252ŌåÆ
   253ŌåÆ**Header:** Navigation bar style
   254ŌåÆ- Left: "Cancel" text button (`accent` color)
   255ŌåÆ- Right: "Post" pill button (`accent` background, white text), disabled state at 40% opacity
   256ŌåÆ- Title: "Compose", "Reply", or "Quoting" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, 15sp/600)
   257ŌåÆ
   258ŌåÆ**Content:**

   260ŌåÆ- Text editor: full-width, 15sp, placeholder "What's on your mind?"
   261ŌåÆ- Markdown support with live preview toggle
   262ŌåÆ
   263ŌåÆ**Bottom toolbar:** Visibility selector, language picker ŌĆö subtle icons in `textSecondary`
   264ŌåÆ
   265ŌåÆ### Settings Screen
   266ŌåÆ
   267ŌåÆ**Header:** Large bold title "Settings"
   268ŌåÆ
   269ŌåÆ**Content:** Grouped list sections with section headers (13sp/500, uppercase, `textSecondary`)
   270ŌåÆ
   271ŌåÆSections:
   272ŌåÆ- **App Info:** Logo (80dp, 16dp corner radius), app name, version
   273ŌåÆ- **Typography:** Font size slider (0.75xŌĆō2.0x)
   274ŌåÆ- **Timeline:** Markdown truncation options
   275ŌåÆ- **Engagement:** Confirmation toggles
   276ŌåÆ- **Links:** In-app browser toggle
   277ŌåÆ- **About:** Open source licenses, links
   278ŌåÆ
   279ŌåÆEach row: standard list item, 16dp padding, `textPrimary` label, `textSecondary` value/description. Hairline dividers between rows.
   280ŌåÆ
   281ŌåÆ### Sign-In Screen
   282ŌåÆ
   283ŌåÆ**Layout:** Centered vertically
   284ŌåÆ
   285ŌåÆ- Logo: 120dp, centered
   286ŌåÆ- Title: "Hackers' Pub" (22sp/700), 16dp below logo
   287ŌåÆ- Subtitle: "Sign in to continue" (14sp, `textSecondary`), 4dp below title
   288ŌåÆ- Username field: rounded border (12dp radius), `surface` background, 32dp below subtitle, 32dp horizontal margin
   289ŌåÆ- Verification code field: same style (appears after username submission)
   290ŌåÆ- Primary button: pill shape, `accent` background, white text, full width within margins
   291ŌåÆ- Error text: `error` color, 13sp, below button
   292ŌåÆ
   293ŌåÆ## Migration Strategy
   294ŌåÆ
   295ŌåÆThis redesign replaces the existing Material Design 3 theming while keeping the same Compose architecture. Changes are purely in the UI layer:
   296ŌåÆ
   297ŌåÆ1. **Theme.kt** ŌĆö Replace M3 color scheme with custom color tokens
   298ŌåÆ2. **Spacing.kt** ŌĆö Already exists, minor adjustments to values
   299ŌåÆ3. **New: Typography.kt** ŌĆö Define custom text styles (not M3 Typography)
   300ŌåÆ4. **New: Shapes.kt** ŌĆö Define shape tokens
   301ŌåÆ5. **New: Icons.kt** ŌĆö Custom icon set (if switching from Material Icons to Feather/Lucide)
   302ŌåÆ6. **Each screen** ŌĆö Replace M3 components (TopAppBar, FloatingActionButton, etc.) with custom composables
   303ŌåÆ7. **PostCard** ŌĆö Restyle engagement bar, remove card elevation, update spacing
   304ŌåÆ8. **CompactTopBar** ŌĆö Replace with new LargeTitle header composable
   305ŌåÆ
   306ŌåÆNo changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. Pure visual transformation.
   307ŌåÆ
   308ŌåÆ**Note on profile stats:** The current data model (`Actor`) does not include follower/following/post counts. The stats row in the profile screen should only display stats that are available from the API. If counts are not available, omit the stats row entirely rather than showing zeros.
   309ŌåÆ
   310ŌåÆ**Note on font scaling:** The custom typography definitions serve as base values. The existing `LocalFontScale` mechanism continues to apply ŌĆö all `sp` values are multiplied by the user's font scale preference (0.75xŌĆō2.0x).
   311ŌåÆ
   312ŌåÆ## Out of Scope
   313ŌåÆ
   314ŌåÆ- Custom animations/transitions (can be added later)
   315ŌåÆ- Custom font families (using system Roboto)
   316ŌåÆ- Tablet/landscape layouts
   317ŌåÆ- Widget design
   318ŌåÆ- Onboarding flow
   319ŌåÆ

    96ŌåÆsealed class DetailScreen(val route: String) {
    97ŌåÆ    data object SignIn : DetailScreen("signin?token={token}&code={code}") {
    98ŌåÆ        fun createRoute(token: String? = null, code: String? = null): String {
    99ŌåÆ            val params = mutableListOf<String>()
   100ŌåÆ            if (token != null) params.add("token=$token")
   101ŌåÆ            if (code != null) params.add("code=$code")
   102ŌåÆ            return if (params.isEmpty()) "signin" else "signin?${params.joinToString("&")}"
   103ŌåÆ        }
   104ŌåÆ    }
   105ŌåÆ    data object Compose : DetailScreen("compose?replyTo={replyTo}&quoteOf={quoteOf}") {
   106ŌåÆ        fun createRoute(replyTo: String? = null, quoteOf: String? = null): String {
   107ŌåÆ            val params = mutableListOf<String>()
   108ŌåÆ            if (replyTo != null) params.add("replyTo=$replyTo")
   109ŌåÆ            if (quoteOf != null) params.add("quoteOf=$quoteOf")
   110ŌåÆ            return if (params.isEmpty()) "compose" else "compose?${params.joinToString("&")}"
   111ŌåÆ        }
   112ŌåÆ    }
   113ŌåÆ    data object PostDetail : DetailScreen("post/{postId}") {
   114ŌåÆ        fun createRoute(postId: String) = "post/$postId"
   115ŌåÆ    }
   116ŌåÆ    data object Profile : DetailScreen("profile/{handle}") {
   117ŌåÆ        fun createRoute(handle: String) = "profile/$handle"
   118ŌåÆ    }
   119ŌåÆ}

   121ŌåÆ@Composable
   122ŌåÆfun HackersPubApp(
   123ŌåÆ    deepLinkData: pub.hackers.android.DeepLinkData? = null,

   126ŌåÆ    val navController = rememberNavController()

   128ŌåÆ
   129ŌåÆ    val fontSizePercent by viewModel.preferencesManager.fontSizePercent.collectAsState(initial = 100)
   130ŌåÆ
   131ŌåÆ    // Handle deep link for verification
   132ŌåÆ    LaunchedEffect(deepLinkData) {
   133ŌåÆ        deepLinkData?.let {
   134ŌåÆ            navController.navigate("signin?token=${it.token}&code=${it.code}")
   135ŌåÆ        }
   136ŌåÆ    }
   137ŌåÆ
   138ŌåÆ    ProvideInAppBrowserUriHandler(preferencesManager = viewModel.preferencesManager) {
   139ŌåÆ    CompositionLocalProvider(LocalFontScale provides (fontSizePercent / 100f)) {
   140ŌåÆ
   141ŌåÆ    val bottomNavItems = if (isLoggedIn) {
   142ŌåÆ        listOf(Screen.Timeline, Screen.Notifications, Screen.Explore, Screen.Search, Screen.Settings)
   143ŌåÆ    } else {
   144ŌåÆ        listOf(Screen.Explore, Screen.Search, Screen.Settings)
   145ŌåÆ    }
   146ŌåÆ
   147ŌåÆ    val navBackStackEntry by navController.currentBackStackEntryAsState()
   148ŌåÆ    val currentDestination = navBackStackEntry?.destination
   149ŌåÆ    val showBottomBar = bottomNavItems.any { it.route == currentDestination?.route }
   150ŌåÆ
   151ŌåÆ    Scaffold(
   152ŌåÆ        bottomBar = {
   153ŌåÆ            if (showBottomBar) {
   154ŌåÆ                NavigationBar(
   155ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier
   156ŌåÆ                        .windowInsetsPadding(WindowInsets.navigationBars)
   157ŌåÆ                        .height(56.dp),
   158ŌåÆ                    windowInsets = WindowInsets(0)
   159ŌåÆ                ) {
   160ŌåÆ                    bottomNavItems.forEach { screen ->
   161ŌåÆ                        val selected = currentDestination?.hierarchy?.any { it.route == screen.route } == true
   162ŌåÆ                        NavigationBarItem(
   163ŌåÆ                            icon = {
   164ŌåÆ                                Icon(
   165ŌåÆ                                    if (selected) screen.selectedIcon else screen.unselectedIcon,
   166ŌåÆ                                    contentDescription = stringResource(screen.titleResId)
   167ŌåÆ                                )
   168ŌåÆ                            },
   169ŌåÆ                            label = null,
   170ŌåÆ                            selected = selected,
   171ŌåÆ                            onClick = {
   172ŌåÆ                                navController.navigate(screen.route) {
   173ŌåÆ                                    popUpTo(navController.graph.findStartDestination().id) {
   174ŌåÆ                                        saveState = true
   175ŌåÆ                                    }
   176ŌåÆ                                    launchSingleTop = true
   177ŌåÆ                                    restoreState = true
   178ŌåÆ                                }
   179ŌåÆ                            }
   180ŌåÆ                        )
   181ŌåÆ                    }
   182ŌåÆ                }
   183ŌåÆ            }
   184ŌåÆ        }
   185ŌåÆ    ) { innerPadding ->
   186ŌåÆ        NavHost(
   187ŌåÆ            navController = navController,
   188ŌåÆ            startDestination = if (isLoggedIn) Screen.Timeline.route else Screen.Explore.route,
   189ŌåÆ            modifier = Modifier.padding(innerPadding)
   190ŌåÆ        ) {
   191ŌåÆ            composable(Screen.Timeline.route) {
   192ŌåÆ                TimelineScreen(
   193ŌåÆ                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   194ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   195ŌåÆ                    },
   196ŌåÆ                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   197ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   198ŌåÆ                    },
   199ŌåÆ                    onComposeClick = { replyTo ->
   200ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo))
   201ŌåÆ                    },
   202ŌåÆ                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   203ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   204ŌåÆ                    }
   205ŌåÆ                )
   206ŌåÆ            }
   207ŌåÆ
   208ŌåÆ            composable(Screen.Notifications.route) {
   209ŌåÆ                NotificationsScreen(
   210ŌåÆ                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   211ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   212ŌåÆ                    },
   213ŌåÆ                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   214ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   215ŌåÆ                    },
   216ŌåÆ                    onComposeClick = {
   217ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute())
   218ŌåÆ                    }
   219ŌåÆ                )
   220ŌåÆ            }
   221ŌåÆ
   222ŌåÆ            composable(Screen.Explore.route) {
   223ŌåÆ                ExploreScreen(
   224ŌåÆ                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   225ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   226ŌåÆ                    },
   227ŌåÆ                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   228ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   229ŌåÆ                    },
   230ŌåÆ                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   231ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(postId))
   232ŌåÆ                    },
   233ŌåÆ                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   234ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   235ŌåÆ                    },
   236ŌåÆ                    onComposeClick = {
   237ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute())
   238ŌåÆ                    },
   239ŌåÆ                    onSignInClick = {
   240ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.SignIn.createRoute())
   241ŌåÆ                    },
   242ŌåÆ                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   243ŌåÆ                )
   244ŌåÆ            }
   245ŌåÆ
   246ŌåÆ            composable(Screen.Search.route) {
   247ŌåÆ                SearchScreen(
   248ŌåÆ                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   249ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   250ŌåÆ                    },
   251ŌåÆ                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   252ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   253ŌåÆ                    },
   254ŌåÆ                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   255ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo = postId))
   256ŌåÆ                    },
   257ŌåÆ                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   258ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   259ŌåÆ                    }
   260ŌåÆ                )
   261ŌåÆ            }
   262ŌåÆ
   263ŌåÆ            composable(Screen.Settings.route) {
   264ŌåÆ                SettingsScreen(
   265ŌåÆ                    onSignInClick = {
   266ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.SignIn.createRoute())
   267ŌåÆ                    },
   268ŌåÆ                    onSignOutComplete = {
   269ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(Screen.Explore.route) {
   270ŌåÆ                            popUpTo(0) { inclusive = true }
   271ŌåÆ                        }
   272ŌåÆ                    },
   273ŌåÆ                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   274ŌåÆ                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   275ŌåÆ                    },
   276ŌåÆ                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   277ŌåÆ                )
   278ŌåÆ            }
   279ŌåÆ
   280ŌåÆ            composable(
   281ŌåÆ                route = DetailScreen.SignIn.route,
   282ŌåÆ                arguments = listOf(
   283ŌåÆ                    navArgument("token") {
   284ŌåÆ                        type = NavType.StringType
   285ŌåÆ                        nullable = true
   286ŌåÆ                        defaultValue = null
   287ŌåÆ                    },
   288ŌåÆ                    navArgument("code") {
   289ŌåÆ                        type = NavType.StringType
   290ŌåÆ                        nullable = true
   291ŌåÆ                        defaultValue = null
   292ŌåÆ                    }
   293ŌåÆ                )
   294ŌåÆ            ) { backStackEntry ->
   295ŌåÆ                val token = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("token")
   296ŌåÆ                val code = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("code")
   297ŌåÆ                SignInScreen(

   300ŌåÆ                    onSignInSuccess = {

   303ŌåÆ                        }
   304ŌåÆ                    },
   305ŌåÆ                    onNavigateBack = {
   306ŌåÆ                        navController.popBackStack()
   307ŌåÆ                    }
   308ŌåÆ                )
   309ŌåÆ            }
   310ŌåÆ
   311ŌåÆ            composable(
   312ŌåÆ                route = DetailScreen.Compose.route,
   313ŌåÆ                arguments = listOf(
   314ŌåÆ                    navArgument("replyTo") {
   315ŌåÆ                        type = NavType.StringType
   316ŌåÆ                        nullable = true
   317ŌåÆ                        defaultValue = null
   318ŌåÆ                    },
   319ŌåÆ                    navArgument("quoteOf") {
   320ŌåÆ                        type = NavType.StringType
   321ŌåÆ                        nullable = true
   322ŌåÆ                        defaultValue = null
   323ŌåÆ                    }
   324ŌåÆ                )
   325ŌåÆ            ) { backStackEntry ->
   326ŌåÆ                val replyTo = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("replyTo")
   327ŌåÆ                val quoteOf = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("quoteOf")
   328ŌåÆ                ComposeScreen(
   329ŌåÆ                    replyToId = replyTo,

   331ŌåÆ                    onPostSuccess = {
   332ŌåÆ                        navController.popBackStack()
   333ŌåÆ                    },
   334ŌåÆ                    onNavigateBack = {

   336ŌåÆ                    }
   337ŌåÆ                )
   338ŌåÆ            }
   339ŌåÆ
   340ŌåÆ            composable(
   341ŌåÆ                route = DetailScreen.PostDetail.route,

   343ŌåÆ            ) { backStackEntry ->

   352ŌåÆ                    },
   353ŌåÆ                    onReplyClick = { id ->

   355ŌåÆ                    },
   356ŌåÆ                    onQuoteClick = { id ->

   358ŌåÆ                    },

    64ŌåÆ@Composable
    65ŌåÆfun PostCard(

    67ŌåÆ    onClick: () -> Unit,

    74ŌåÆ    onQuotedPostClick: ((String) -> Unit)? = null,

    79ŌåÆ    val isRepost = post.sharedPost != null
    80ŌåÆ
    81ŌåÆ    Card(

    90ŌåÆ        Column(

    92ŌåÆ        ) {
    93ŌåÆ            if (isRepost) {
    94ŌåÆ                Row(

    96ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 8.dp)
    97ŌåÆ                ) {
    98ŌåÆ                    Icon(
    99ŌåÆ                        imageVector = Icons.Filled.Repeat,
   100ŌåÆ                        contentDescription = null,
   101ŌåÆ                        tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary,

   103ŌåÆ                    )
   104ŌåÆ                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   105ŌåÆ                    Text(

   107ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   108ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary

   111ŌåÆ            }
   112ŌåÆ
   113ŌåÆ            Row(

   126ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   127ŌåÆ
   128ŌåÆ                Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   129ŌåÆ                    Row(

   131ŌåÆ                    ) {
   132ŌåÆ                        Text(
   133ŌåÆ                            text = displayPost.actor.name ?: displayPost.actor.handle,
   134ŌåÆ                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   135ŌåÆ                            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   136ŌåÆ                            maxLines = 1,
   137ŌåÆ                            overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis,
   138ŌåÆ                            modifier = Modifier
   139ŌåÆ                                .weight(1f, fill = false)
   140ŌåÆ                                .clickable { onProfileClick(displayPost.actor.handle) }
   141ŌåÆ                        )
   142ŌåÆ                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   143ŌåÆ                        Text(

   145ŌåÆ                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   146ŌåÆ                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant

   148ŌåÆ                    }
   149ŌåÆ
   150ŌåÆ                    Text(
   151ŌåÆ                        text = "@${displayPost.actor.handle}",
   152ŌåÆ                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   153ŌåÆ                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   154ŌåÆ                        maxLines = 1,
   155ŌåÆ                        overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   156ŌåÆ                    )
   157ŌåÆ                }
   158ŌåÆ            }
   159ŌåÆ
   160ŌåÆ            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   161ŌåÆ
   162ŌåÆ            if (displayPost.typename == "Article") {
   163ŌåÆ                Text(
   164ŌåÆ                    text = "Article",
   165ŌåÆ                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   166ŌåÆ                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   167ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier
   168ŌåÆ                        .background(
   169ŌåÆ                            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.1f),
   170ŌåÆ                            RoundedCornerShape(4.dp)
   171ŌåÆ                        )
   172ŌåÆ                        .padding(horizontal = 6.dp, vertical = 2.dp)
   173ŌåÆ                )
   174ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   175ŌåÆ            }
   176ŌåÆ
   177ŌåÆ            displayPost.name?.let { title ->
   178ŌåÆ                Text(
   179ŌåÆ                    text = title,
   180ŌåÆ                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   181ŌåÆ                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   182ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 4.dp)
   183ŌåÆ                )
   184ŌåÆ            }
   185ŌåÆ
   186ŌåÆ            val truncatedContent = if (contentMaxLength > 0 && displayPost.content.length > contentMaxLength) {
   187ŌåÆ                displayPost.content.take(contentMaxLength)
   188ŌåÆ            } else {
   189ŌåÆ                displayPost.content
   190ŌåÆ            }
   191ŌåÆ            val isTruncated = contentMaxLength > 0 && displayPost.content.length > contentMaxLength
   192ŌåÆ
   193ŌåÆ            HtmlContent(
   194ŌåÆ                html = truncatedContent,
   195ŌåÆ                maxLines = if (contentMaxLength > 0) Int.MAX_VALUE else 10,
   196ŌåÆ                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   197ŌåÆ                onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   198ŌåÆ            )
   199ŌåÆ
   200ŌåÆ            if (isTruncated || (contentMaxLength == 0 && displayPost.content.length > 500)) {
   201ŌåÆ                Text(
   202ŌåÆ                    text = stringResource(R.string.read_more),
   203ŌåÆ                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   204ŌåÆ                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   205ŌåÆ                    modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 4.dp)
   206ŌåÆ                )
   207ŌåÆ            }
   208ŌåÆ
   209ŌåÆ            if (displayPost.media.isNotEmpty()) {
   210ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   211ŌåÆ                MediaGrid(media = displayPost.media)
   212ŌåÆ            }
   213ŌåÆ
   214ŌåÆ            if (displayPost.quotedPost != null) {
   215ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   216ŌåÆ                QuotedPostPreview(
   217ŌåÆ                    post = displayPost.quotedPost!!,
   218ŌåÆ                    onClick = { onQuotedPostClick?.invoke(displayPost.quotedPost!!.id) },
   219ŌåÆ                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   220ŌåÆ                )
   221ŌåÆ            }
   222ŌåÆ
   223ŌåÆ            if (displayPost.reactionGroups.isNotEmpty()) {
   224ŌåÆ                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   225ŌåÆ                FlowRow(
   226ŌåÆ                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(6.dp),
   227ŌåÆ                    verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   228ŌåÆ                ) {
   229ŌåÆ                    displayPost.reactionGroups.forEach { group ->
   230ŌåÆ                        Surface(
   231ŌåÆ                            shape = RoundedCornerShape(16.dp),
   232ŌåÆ                            color = if (group.viewerHasReacted)
   233ŌåÆ                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.15f)
   234ŌåÆ                            else
   235ŌåÆ                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
   236ŌåÆ                        ) {
   237ŌåÆ                            Row(
   238ŌåÆ                                modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 8.dp, vertical = 4.dp),
   239ŌåÆ                                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   240ŌåÆ                            ) {
   241ŌåÆ                                if (group.emoji != null) {
   242ŌåÆ                                    Text(
   243ŌåÆ                                        text = group.emoji,
   244ŌåÆ                                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall
   245ŌåÆ                                    )
   246ŌåÆ                                } else if (group.customEmoji != null) {
   247ŌåÆ                                    AsyncImage(
   248ŌåÆ                                        model = group.customEmoji.imageUrl,
   249ŌåÆ                                        contentDescription = group.customEmoji.name,
   250ŌåÆ                                        modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp)
   251ŌåÆ                                    )
   252ŌåÆ                                }
   253ŌåÆ                                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   254ŌåÆ                                Text(
   255ŌåÆ                                    text = group.count.toString(),
   256ŌåÆ                                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   257ŌåÆ                                    color = if (group.viewerHasReacted)
   258ŌåÆ                                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   259ŌåÆ                                    else
   260ŌåÆ                                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   261ŌåÆ                                )
   262ŌåÆ                            }
   263ŌåÆ                        }
   264ŌåÆ                    }
   265ŌåÆ                }
   266ŌåÆ            }
   267ŌåÆ
   268ŌåÆ            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   269ŌåÆ
   270ŌåÆ            EngagementBar(
   271ŌåÆ                post = displayPost,
   272ŌåÆ                onReplyClick = onReplyClick,
   273ŌåÆ                onShareClick = onShareClick,
   274ŌåÆ                onQuoteClick = onQuoteClick,
   275ŌåÆ                onReactionClick = onReactionClick,
   276ŌåÆ                onExternalShareClick = onExternalShareClick
   277ŌåÆ            )
   278ŌåÆ        }
   279ŌåÆ    }
   280ŌåÆ}

   282ŌåÆ@Composable

   336ŌåÆ            }
   337ŌåÆ        }
   338ŌåÆ    }
   339ŌåÆ}

   341ŌåÆ@Composable
   342ŌåÆprivate fun EngagementButton(
   343ŌåÆ    icon: androidx.compose.ui.graphics.vector.ImageVector,
   344ŌåÆ    count: Int,
   345ŌåÆ    contentDescription: String,

   350ŌåÆ        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically

   353ŌåÆ            onClick = { onClick?.invoke() },
   354ŌåÆ            enabled = onClick != null

   356ŌåÆ            Icon(
   357ŌåÆ                imageVector = icon,
   358ŌåÆ                contentDescription = contentDescription,

   360ŌåÆ                modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)

   363ŌåÆ        if (count > 0) {
   364ŌåÆ            Text(

   368ŌåÆ            )
   369ŌåÆ        }
   370ŌåÆ    }
   371ŌåÆ}
